title: Miss World 2025 Opal Suchata Expresses Desire to Work in Hindi Films: 'A Wonderful Opportunity I'd Love to Explore.
content: Miss World 2025 Opal Suchata Praises India, Expresses Desire to Act in Bollywood Films Miss World 2025 Opal Suchata, who made history as the first Thai woman to win the prestigious crown, has expressed her admiration for India and her interest in working in Hindi cinema. Speaking during her visit to Hyderabad, the global beauty queen said, “If I get the opportunity, I would love to act in Bollywood films; it’s a wonderful opportunity.” Her statement has sparked excitement among fans and film industry insiders, as international stars continue to show growing interest in Bollywood. Reflecting on her India experience, Opal was full of praise. “It was amazing. Since the first day I was here, everyone has been so nice. People are amazing and have been so wonderful to me,” she said. The Miss World winner also appreciated the scenic beauty and cultural richness of the places she visited, calling India’s infrastructure and nature “so beautiful.” She confirmed she would “definitely be back,” highlighting the strong connection she feels with the country. Opal extended her heartfelt thanks to the Telangana government for their hospitality, saying, “Thank you for providing us with the best accommodation and allowing us to have such a great time in your home.” Her appreciation underscored the successful hosting of the Miss World 2025 event in Hyderabad, which received praise from many international delegates. Miss World America 2025, Jessica Pedroso, also applauded Hyderabad as an ideal host city. She expressed her love for Indian culture, cuisine, and the warmth of the people, even singling out butter chicken as “so amazing.” Meanwhile, India’s Nandini Gupta, who had made it to the Top 40 and was among the fast-tracked Top 18 contestants, unfortunately missed a spot in the Top 8, ending the nation’s hopes for the crown this year.

title: Aamir Khan Sparks Buzz About Marriage Plans With Gauri Spratt After Just 4 Months of Dating
content: Bollywood superstar Aamir Khan recently opened up about how his perception of marriage has evolved over the years. Comparing his earlier decision to marry Reena Dutta after just four months of knowing her, Aamir admitted that he now views such quick decisions as mistakes. Speaking on Raj Shamani’s podcast, the actor revealed that he would not consider marrying someone he has known for only four months today, highlighting how time and maturity have changed his understanding of lifelong commitment. Aamir Khan on Dating Gauri Spratt and Taking Time Before MarriageCurrently dating Gauri Spratt, Aamir Khan emphasized that his approach to relationships has shifted significantly. Reflecting on whether he would marry Gauri after just a few months of dating, he candidly stated that rushing into marriage is no longer something he would do. “I ask myself now—if I meet someone, can I decide to marry in just four months? No. It's a lifelong journey,” Aamir explained. This honest insight offers a glimpse into how the actor is taking a more thoughtful and emotionally aware path in his relationship with Gauri. Mental Health Therapy Helped Aamir Khan Recognize Red FlagsAamir also credited mental health therapy for his personal growth and deeper understanding of relationships. He shared that he wasn't in therapy during his marriage to Reena Dutta, but therapy now allows him to practice self-reflection and recognize red flags early in a relationship. “I understand myself better now, and I can spot red flags much faster,” Aamir said. His openness about therapy and mental wellness adds an important dimension to the celebrity dating conversation, inspiring others to prioritize emotional health in relationships.

title: Supreme Court Takes Cognizance of Brutal Rape-Murder Case in Kolkata
content: The Supreme Court on Monday raised serious concerns over the missing post-mortem challan in the high-profile Kolkata rape-murder case involving a young medical student at RG Kar Medical College. A bench led by Chief Justice DY Chandrachud directed the Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) to probe the disappearance of the mandatory document required during the body’s handover for post-mortem. The apex court also instructed protesting resident doctors in West Bengal to resume work by 5 PM Tuesday, assuring them of no disciplinary action upon return. Additionally, the court ordered the immediate removal of the victim’s photos from all social media platforms to protect her dignity and privacy.The court further criticized the Kolkata Police for a 14-hour delay in filing the First Information Report (FIR) after the brutal incident. Highlighting procedural lapses, the bench—which includes Justices JB Pardiwala and Manoj Misra—questioned both the CBI and West Bengal government about the missing challan. Solicitor General Tushar Mehta confirmed that the CBI lacked the document, while senior advocate Kapil Sibal, appearing for the state, promised to verify its whereabouts. The Supreme Court has now instructed the CBI to submit a fresh, detailed status report by September 17. On the one-month anniversary of the incident, West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee responded to allegations that the victim’s family was offered hush money. She firmly denied the claim, stating in a press conference, “No money was offered. They were only asked if any work should be done in memory of their daughter. If someone alleges money was offered, it must be proven.” The case continues to spark public outrage and intense scrutiny over lapses in investigation and justice delivery.

title: Google Faces Legal Heat Over Alleged Ad Market Monopoly
content: Antitrust Trial Puts Spotlight on Google Ad Market Monopoly : Google's dominance in the online advertising ecosystemfaced a major legal challenge onMonday as the U.S. Department of Justice (DoJ)launched a high-stakesantitrust trial. Prosecutors argue thatGoogle’s ad market monopolyhas allowed it to suppress fair competition through aggressive monetization practices. This marks the second major blow to the tech giant after a judge recently sided with the DoJ in a separate case over Google’s alleged illegal monopoly in online search Billions at Risk in Google Ad Market Monopoly Case : At the heart of the trial is Google’s AdTech empire, which facilitates transactions between advertisers and publishers and generates over 75% of the company’s revenue. In 2023 alone, Google earned more than $200 billion from digital advertising. Prosecutors claim that Google takes up to 36% of ad spend due to its monopolistic grip on the market. The antitrust suit aims to dismantle parts of the company's advertising technology infrastructure to restore fair competition. DoJ Details Charges Against Google in Ad Monopoly Case : According to the DoJ, Google monopolised critical segments of the ad tech stack, including ad servers, ad networks, and ad exchanges. The tech giant allegedly bundled advertising toolsin a way that restricted publishers’ and advertisers’ choices. These practices, prosecutors argue, have harmed competition, raised costs, and undermined digital journalism, further strengtheningGoogle’s ad market monopoly. Google Defends Itself Against Ad Monopoly Allegations : Google has pushed back against the allegations, stating it does not overcharge for advertising services and that its end-to-end ad tech solutions enhance performance, speed, and security. The company claims its systems are interoperable with third-party exchanges, giving users flexibility. Google’s legal team also criticized the DoJ for focusing on outdated metrics, noting that the advertising landscape has shifted toward mobile apps, video platforms, and social media since 2012—further challenging the basis of the Google ad market monopoly claims.

title: BJP Hits Back at Rahul Gandhi Over 'Surrender' Jibe at PM Modi: Says 'His Heart Beats for Pakistan
content: The Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has strongly criticized Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi for alleging that Prime Minister Narendra Modi “surrendered” to US pressure during the India-Pakistan military standoff following Operation Sindoor. Rahul Gandhi's claim that PM Modi backed down after a call from then-US President Donald Trump has triggered a sharp political backlash and reignited the debate over India’s foreign policy decisions during times of military tension. BJP national spokesperson Pradeep Bhandari accused Rahul Gandhi of siding with anti-India sentiments, stating that “Rahul Gandhi’s heart beats for Pakistan”. Bhandari said that such comments from the Congress MP reflect his values and disrespect the dignity of the Prime Minister. He called the remarks indecent and claimed that they expose Rahul Gandhi’s loyalty and mindset during sensitive national matters.Bhandari further credited PM Modi for delivering a strong response to Pakistan’s terror operations, emphasizing that the Modi government has consistently maintained a tough stance on cross-border terrorism. “From Salman Khurshid to Shashi Tharoor, every Congress leader seems to echo the same narrative, and even Pakistan is picking up on it. The people of India see this uncivilised Rahul Gandhi as playing into Pakistan's hands, damaging national unity,” he added.

title: Virat Kohli Breaks Silence on IPL Future After RCB's Maiden Trophy Win: 'There Is an End Date.
content: Virat Kohli fans, rejoice! After 18 long seasons, Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) have finally lifted their first-ever IPL trophy — and at the heart of it all was the King himself, Virat Kohli. This historic RCB IPL 2025 win is more than just a title; it’s a monumental moment in Indian cricket history. Kohli, who has carried the hopes of millions for over a decade, was finally crowned an IPL champion. Just as Kohli once dedicated the 2011 World Cup to Sachin Tendulkar, current RCB players revealed they wanted to win it for Kohli. The emotional scenes of the entire team lifting him, showering him with hugs, and shedding tears of joy went viral instantly. He embraced his wife Anushka Sharma, reunited with legends like AB de Villiers and Chris Gayle, and celebrated like never before. While the visuals were unforgettable, what made headlines was Kohli’s heartfelt reflection on his IPL journey and his future in the game. With his T20I and Test retirements behind him, fans feared another retirement post from Kohli might be on the horizon. However, during his emotional post-match address, Kohli acknowledged that “there is an end date,” but reassured fans that he still has some cricket left in him. His statement, though cryptic, confirmed that while the end may be near, it’s not here yet. As the search volume around "Virat Kohli IPL retirement," "RCB IPL 2025 win," and "Kohli’s cricket future" surges online, one thing is clear—this victory has etched his legacy permanently in IPL

title: Aamir Khan Opens Up About His Favorite SRK and Salman Khan Films.
content: Aamir Khan, Shah Rukh Khan, and Salman Khan are often celebrated as the last of Bollywood’s legendary superstars. The trio ruled the box office through the 1990s and continues to captivate audiences even today. Among them, Aamir Khan is gearing up for the release of his upcoming film Sitaare Zameen Par, keeping fans excited about what's next from the perfectionist actor. At the Bollywood Hungama Style Icons Summit & Awards 2025, Aamir Khan praised his contemporaries and revealed his favorite performances. He shared, “My favourite performance of Salman’s is Bajrangi Bhaijaan and Dabangg. As for Shah Rukh, I really loved Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge, and Kuch Kuch Hota Hai is one of my favourite films of his.” Interestingly, he also admitted he hasn't watched SRK’s recent blockbusters Pathaan and Jawan yet. Adding to the excitement, Aamir addressed the long-standing buzz about a potential collaboration between the three Khans. He confirmed that discussions have taken place with both Shah Rukh Khan and Salman Khan about working together on a project. While nothing has been finalized, fans continue to hope for the ultimate on-screen reunion of Bollywood's biggest icons.

title: Vijay Mallya on Kingfisher Calendar Models: Why Deepika and Katrina Were His Top Picks.
content: Before Deepika Padukone and Katrina Kaif rose to superstardom in Bollywood, they were among the early faces featured in Vijay Mallya’s iconic Kingfisher Calendar. Launched in 2003 under the Kingfisher brand and shot by renowned photographer Atul Kasbekar, the calendar became a cultural sensation by the late 2000s. Known for its bold themes and glamorous swimsuit shoots in exotic locations, the Kingfisher Calendar served as a powerful launchpad for future Bollywood actresses. In a recent interview on Raj Shamani’s podcast, Vijay Mallya reflected on the legacy of the Kingfisher Calendar, crediting its success to the selection of the “right girls.” He said, “We chose the right girls, whether it was Deepika Padukone, Katrina Kaif… we had all the heroines and stars on the calendar at a younger age. We picked the right talent.” The calendar not only boosted the modeling careers of these women but also played a key role in shaping the glamorous image associated with early 2000s Bollywood.

title: ICICI Bank Scam: ₹4.58 Crore Stolen via FD Breakage, Overdrafts, and Fake Personal Loans.
content: In a shocking case of financial fraud, a 26-year-old woman working as a relationshipmanager at ICICI Bank was arrested for allegedly stealing ₹4.58 crore from unsuspecting customers. Driven by a severe addiction to stock market trading, particularly in futures and options (F&O), she diverted customer funds to invest in high-risk speculative trades. Shockingly, she didn’t even spare her own family—reportedly taking money from her father-in-law to continue her F&O trading activities. The fraud came to light when ICICI Bank’s internal audit team flagged suspicious transactions involving fixed deposits, overdraft facilities, and personal loans. Upon verification, the branch manager filed a formal FIR against the accused, revealing the scale of the scam. She allegedly manipulated customer accounts without authorization, siphoning off funds for personal trading activities in the stock market. The accused was arrested by Udyog Nagar Police Station in Kota, Rajasthan, on May 31, 2025, during her sister’s wedding. The police confirmed her custody and stated that a chargesheet will be filed after the investigation is complete. The case has raised serious concerns about internal controls and employee vetting procedures at private sector banks like ICICI.

title: Bengaluru Stampede Fallout: Virat Kohli Accused of Promoting IPL Gambling, Attracting Huge Crowd.
content: A police complaint has been filed against cricketer Virat Kohli in connection with the tragic stampede outside Bengaluru's Chinnaswamy Stadium, which left 11 people dead and 56 injured. The incident occurred on June 3 when a massive crowd gathered to welcome Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) after their historic IPL victory — the team’s first in 18 years. According to an ANI report, social activist HM Venkatesh submitted the complaint at Cubbon Park police station, alleging that Kohli’s public promotion of the IPL celebrations led to the chaotic crowd surge. The authorities have confirmed that the complaint will be considered under an already registered case and examined during the ongoing investigation. The stampede took place as thousands of fans swarmed the stadium to get a glimpse of their favorite players, especially RCB captain Virat Kohli. What was meant to be a celebratory event turned into a deadly incident, sparking public outcry and renewed scrutiny of crowd control measures at major sporting events.

title: Actress quits Bollywood after Motherhood.
content: The dazzling world of Bollywood has long been a magnet for aspiring stars, offering glamour, fame, and fortune. However, not everyone chooses to stay in the spotlight forever. Athiya Shetty, who made a promising debut in a Salman Khan production, chose to walk away from the film industry after just four films. Embracing motherhood and family life, she decided to prioritize love over limelight — a decision that surprised many of her fans. Born on November 5, 1992, Athiya is the daughter of Bollywood veteran Suniel Shetty and philanthropist Mana Shetty. Inspired by her father, she pursued a career in acting and trained at the prestigious New York Film Academy. Her Bollywood journey, although brief, showcased her talent and potential in front of the camera. Before stepping into the film world, Athiya completed her early education at the Cathedral and John Connon School and later attended the American School of Bombay. After a few years in the film industry, she chose a different path — one centered around a quieter life with her husband, Indian cricketer KL Rahul. Today, Athiya finds happiness away from the spotlight, embracing motherhood and the simplicity of family life.

title: Karnataka Cops Crack Drishyam-Inspired Murder Case Hidden for 5 Years.
content: In 2013, the Malayalam thriller Drishyam captivated audiences with its tale of a man who cleverly concealed a murder from the police. What was fiction for many turned into a chilling blueprint for a real-life crime in Karnataka. Over a decade later, in 2024, a routine missing person report would begin to unravel a murder that had remained hidden for years—eerily similar to the cinematic plot that inspired it. On August 12, 2024, a man named Balaraju arrived at the Magadi police station, deeply concerned about his missing friend, Lalitha. A beautician known to many as Divya, the 30-year-old woman had disappeared without a trace from Madanayakanahalli, a suburb on the outskirts of Bengaluru. Balaraju's complaint would set off an investigation that revealed a far more sinister story beneath the surface. Divya had been living apart from her husband, Umesh, for two years and was raising their five-year-old son alone while going through divorce proceedings. As police dug deeper into her disappearance, the layers of deceit began to unfold—leading investigators to a Drishyam-style cover-up that had successfully kept a murder hidden for years.

title: Chenab Bridge Inauguration: PM Modi Unveils World’s Tallest Railway Arch in J&K.
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi is set to inaugurate the Chenab Bridge, the world’s highest railway arch bridge, during his visit to Katra, Jammu and Kashmir. As part of his development push, Modi will also launch multiple infrastructure projects worth over ₹46,000 crore in the region. Katra, known as the base camp for pilgrims visiting the Mata Vaishno Devi temple, will serve as the focal point of these ambitious upgrades. According to the Prime Minister’s Office (PMO), the Chenab Bridge stands as an engineering marvel, rising 359 metres above the Chenab River. Spanning 1,315 metres, the steel arch bridge is designed to withstand high-intensity earthquakes and extreme wind conditions, showcasing India’s advanced capabilities in rail infrastructure development. The bridge is expected to significantly improve regional connectivity, especially between Jammu and Srinagar. Once operational, the Vande Bharat train will run across the Chenab Bridge, cutting the travel time between Katra and Srinagar to just around three hours. The project underscores PM Modi’s vision to transform railway connectivity in Jammu and Kashmir, bringing speed, safety, and strategic infrastructure to the heart of the Himalayas.

title: Russia and Ukraine Agree to Troop Exchange, But Peace Talks Stall.
content: Ukraine and Russia held their second direct peace talks in two weeks, agreeing to a swap of 6,000 dead and seriously wounded troops but failing to make progress toward ending the ongoing Ukraine-Russia war. Russia presented a memorandum demanding Ukraine withdraw from the four annexed regions and halt military mobilization and Western arms support. Ukraine's delegation, led by Defense Minister Rustem Umerov, said they would respond after reviewing the document, proposing further talks later in June. The talks came a day after Ukraine launched its most ambitious drone attack of the war, targeting multiple Russian air bases across three time zones, damaging or destroying over 40 warplanes. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy hailed the operation as a strategic blow to Russia's air power, calling it a turning point. Meanwhile, Russia responded with its largest drone assault to date, launching 472 drones in a massive strike against Ukraine’s civilian areas. Russia's demands for a ceasefire include Ukraine abandoning NATO ambitions, declaring neutrality, ending martial law, and recognizing Russian as an official language. The proposals also require Ukraine to ban foreign troops on its soil and limit its military size—conditions previously rejected by Kyiv and Western allies. A temporary 2–3 day truce to recover battlefield bodies was offered, but Zelenskyy criticized it as insincere. While the battlefield remains active with deadly strikes on both sides, including in Kherson and Zaporizhzhia, peace prospects remain slim. US-led efforts to broker a ceasefire have stalled, with both sides standing firm on their conditions. Analysts view Ukraine’s long-range drone attacks as a major setback for Russia’s strategic capabilities, potentially increasing pressure on the Kremlin to return to meaningful negotiations.

title: Rinku Singh vs Priya Saroj: Net Worth Comparison Shocks Fans.
content: Indian cricketer Rinku Singh got engaged to newly elected Samajwadi Party MP Priya Saroj on June 8, in a lavish ceremony at the Centrum 5-star hotel in Lucknow. The star-studded event was graced by big names like Akhilesh Yadav, Jaya Bachchan, and BCCI Vice President Rajeev Shukla. The engagement of Rinku Singh and Priya Saroj marks the union of two rising stars from Indian cricket and politics, drawing nationwide attention. Rinku Singh’s net worth has seen a significant rise since his debut for Team India in 2023. With his consistent performance in the Indian Premier League (IPL) since 2018 and his popularity, Rinku’s income has soared. As per reports, his estimated net worth ranges between ₹7 to ₹8 crore. He currently holds a Grade C BCCI central contract worth ₹1 crore per year and was retained by Kolkata Knight Riders in IPL 2025 for ₹13 crore. He also owns a house in Aligarh valued at ₹3 crore. On the other hand, MP Priya Saroj, the youngest Member of Parliament from Machhlishahr, Uttar Pradesh, has declared modest assets. According to her election affidavit, Priya Saroj's total declared assets amount to ₹11.25 lakh, including over ₹10 lakh in bank savings and 5 grams of gold. She has no property or vehicle registered in her name, reflecting a humble financial start despite coming from a political family background—her father Toofani Saroj is a three-time MP and current MLA. The Rinku Singh–Priya Saroj engagement has not only captured public interest but also sparked conversations around their contrasting financial profiles. While Rinku Singh’s net worth is currently much higher than Priya Saroj’s, both are embarking on successful careers—Rinku in Indian cricket and Priya in national politics. The couple is set to marry on November 18 in Varanasi, marking a unique alliance between sports and governanc

title: Housefull 5 Box Office Report: ₹32 Crore on Day 3, Akshay Kumar’s Film Heads to ₹90 Crore.
content: Housefull 5’, starring Akshay Kumar, Abhishek Bachchan, Riteish Deshmukh, and Jacqueline Fernandez, is performing impressively at the box office. According to Sacnilk, the film earned ₹24 crore on its opening day, jumped to ₹31 crore on Day 2, and collected ₹32 crore on its first Sunday. With a total of ₹87 crore in just three days, the movie is inching towards the ₹90 crore mark and may cross ₹100 crore by Monday if momentum continues. The film saw a strong turnout on Sunday, June 8, 2025, with a Hindi occupancy rate of 39.52%. Morning shows began with 17.72% occupancy, rising to 48.80% in the afternoon, peaking at 54.77% in the evening, and closing at 36.78% during night shows. These figures indicate growing word-of-mouth and positive public response to the film's comedy, ensemble cast, and music. Adding to the buzz, Akshay Kumar surprised fans by visiting a cinema in disguise, wearing the ‘Killer Mask’ from the film. The superstar interacted with viewers after the screening, many of whom didn’t realize it was him. Fans praised the humor, dance numbers, and Akshay’s performance, helping boost the movie's appeal. With strong earnings and creative promotions, ‘Housefull 5’ is set to become one of the biggest Bollywood hits of 2025.

title: Ruturaj Gaikwad to Play for Yorkshire: CSK Captain's County Cricket Move Confirmed.
content: CSK captain Ruturaj Gaikwad has officially signed with Yorkshire County Cricket Club for the remainder of the 2025 season. The 28-year-old will join the squad ahead of the Rothesay County Championship clash against Surrey, scheduled to take place in Scarborough this July. In addition to his participation in the County Championship, Gaikwad will also be available for the Metro Bank One Day Cup, committing to Yorkshire for the entire domestic campaign. Ruturaj Gaikwad’s IPL 2025 season with Chennai Super Kings was cut short due to an injury, but his form and fitness have since seen him named in the India A squad currently touring England. Although the CSK skipper has not featured in the playing XI for the two unofficial Tests, his presence in the squad reflects his ongoing value to Indian cricket. His move to Yorkshire is expected to provide him with vital match time and exposure to English conditions. Known for his consistency and adaptability, the Pune-born cricketer has played six ODIs and 23 T20 Internationals for India, earning a reputation as a dependable top-order batter. His versatility will be an asset to Yorkshire as they aim to strengthen their lineup for both red and white-ball formats. With this signing, Yorkshire gains a player with IPL leadership experience and international caliber, while Gaikwad gains a platform to further sharpen his skills in county cricket.

title: No RCB Stake Sale: Diageo Rejects Rumors, Terms Them Speculative.
content: According to a recent Bloomberg report, RCB owner Diageo is reportedly exploring strategic options, including a possible partial or full stake sale of the franchise. The British distiller is said to be in early discussions with potential advisers and is seeking a valuation close to $2 billion. This development comes amid growing regulatory pressure from the Indian Health Ministry, which is pushing to curb the indirect promotion of tobacco, alcohol, and other unhealthy products during IPL events. Despite the speculation, Diageo has dismissed the reports as ‘speculative’, denying any confirmed stake sale plans. While direct advertising of liquor and tobacco is banned in India, brands like Diageo have historically promoted related products—such as energy and soft drinks—using top cricket stars. The government’s scrutiny on surrogate advertising in IPL has intensified, triggering brands to reassess their visibility strategies. Royal Challengers Bangalore (RCB), one of the original IPL franchises, was acquired by Diageo following the downfall of Vijay Mallya’s Kingfisher Airlines. Recently, RCB clinched their first IPL title, adding significant value to the franchise. With Virat Kohli’s immense social media presence and the IPL’s skyrocketing market valuation, ownership of a team like RCB is increasingly seen as a prized asset in the sports and entertainment industry.

title: MS Dhoni Among 8 Cricketers Inducted Into Prestigious ICC Hall of Fame.
content: Former India captain MS Dhoni has been officially inducted into the ICC Hall of Fame 2025, joining the elite ranks of cricketing greats. Alongside Dhoni, Australian legend Matthew Hayden and South African stalwart Hashim Amla were also honoured by the International Cricket Council for their remarkable contributions to the game. Widely hailed for his composure under pressure, sharp tactical mind, and game-finishing prowess, Dhoni’s induction celebrates his legacy as one of the greatest wicketkeeper-captains in cricket history. The ICC lauded MS Dhoni’s stellar international career, highlighting his 17,266 international runs, 829 dismissals, and 538 matches across all formats. Dhoni led India to historic victories including the 2007 T20 World Cup, 2011 ODI World Cup, and 2013 Champions Trophy, establishing himself as a dominant force in world cricket. His consistency, fitness, and leadership made him a global icon, admired by fans and players alike. Reacting to the honour, Dhoni expressed heartfelt gratitude: “It is an honour to be named in the ICC Hall of Fame, which recognises the contributions of cricketers across generations. To have your name remembered alongside such all-time greats is a wonderful feeling. It is something that I will cherish forever.” Dhoni’s induction cements his status as a true cricket legend, whose impact continues to inspire the next generation.

title: Sitaare Zameen Par: Aamir Khan Defends Age Gap with Genelia Deshmukh, Calls It Irrelevant in Modern Cinema.
content: Aamir Khan’s upcoming film Sitaare Zameen Par is generating massive buzz not just for its storyline, but also for its groundbreaking release strategy. Known for pushing cinematic boundaries, Aamir is set to redefine how Bollywood films hit theatres. Partnering with PVR-Inox for domestic distribution and Anil Thadani for international markets, Sitaare Zameen Par will adopt a slow-burn release model, starting with limited shows and gradually increasing based on audience response. This innovative approach aims to maximize viewer engagement and extend the film's theatrical run. Breaking away from the typical high-voltage opening weekend model, Aamir Khan’s Sitaare Zameen Par focuses on emotional resonance and steady word-of-mouth growth. Inspired by Rajshri Productions’ timeless strategy used for classics like Hum Aapke Hain Koun..! the actor personally consulted with the Rajshri team to understand how to sustain audience interest over time. By pacing the film’s rollout, Aamir aims to avoid overcrowded theatres on Day 1 and the steep drop-offs seen in many recent releases. While the film stars Aamir Khan alongside Genelia Deshmukh, the 23-year age gap between the lead actors has also sparked conversations. However, the spotlight remains on Aamir’s thoughtful release plan and his commitment to quality storytelling. Sitaare Zameen Par is poised to set a new benchmark in Bollywood, blending innovative marketing, strategic distribution, and a deep understanding of audience behavior to ensure lasting box office success.

title: Bollywood Stars Acquire Vijay Mallya’s Kingfisher Villa in Goa, Rebrand It as King’s Mansion.
content: Once a symbol of Vijay Mallya’s lavish lifestyle, Goa’s iconic Kingfisher Villa has found new owners in Bollywood actor Sachiin Joshi and his wife, former actress Urvashi Sharma. Now rebranded as King’s Mansion, the luxurious property located on Candolim Beach has been given a new lease on life. Known for its opulence and celebrity-filled parties, the estate has undergone a transformation—but its dramatic history still echoes through its walls. The buzz around the villa resurged following Royal Challengers Bangalore’s historic IPL 2025 win, a team originally owned by Mallya. As media attention revisited the embattled tycoon, Kingfisher Villa re-entered the public eye. Once the epicenter of Mallya’s “Good Times,” the property became a financial asset seized by banks after his alleged Rs 900 crore loan default. In 2017, after three failed auctions, Sachiin Joshi purchased the villa for Rs 73.01 crore, just under the revised reserve price, from a consortium led by the State Bank of India. Spanning over 12,000 square feet on a three-acre property, King’s Mansion stands as a luxurious reminder of the past with a modern identity. The estate’s transition from Kingfisher Villa to King’s Mansion marks not only a change in ownership but a shift in narrative—from scandal and bankruptcy to revival and glamor. With Joshi and Sharma at the helm, the property now aims to write a new chapter in Goa’s luxury real estate scene.

title: How the Kingfisher Calendar Catapulted Deepika Padukone and Katrina Kaif to Fame: Vijay Mallya Shares the Secret.
content: Vijay Mallya, the former liquor tycoon and founder of Kingfisher Airlines, recently reflected on the impact of the iconic Kingfisher Swimsuit Calendar during a podcast with YouTuber Raj Shamani. Launched in 2003 and shot by acclaimed photographer Atul Kasbekar, the calendar quickly became a pop-culture sensation and played a pivotal role in launching several Bollywood careers, including those of Deepika Padukone and Katrina Kaif. Mallya revealed that the calendar was a strategic branding initiative rather than a personal venture. “I did it because it was a fantastic marketing tool. It didn’t bring anything to me personally, but it did wonders for the Kingfisher brand,” he shared. The calendar, known for its glamor and high production value, became synonymous with aspiration, luxury, and breakthrough talent in the entertainment industry. Deepika Padukone also acknowledged the calendar’s role in shaping her early career. In a 2009 interview with FilmiBeat, she stated, “At the beginning of my career, I was part of the calendar, and it’s getting better every year.” The Kingfisher Calendar not only highlighted upcoming talent but also became a powerful launchpad for models aspiring to enter Bollywood, solidifying its place in Indian pop culture history.

title: Aamir Khan Responds to 'Sitaare Zameen Par' Trolls: "My Job Is to Make It, Yours to Watch It.
content: In an industry where originality is often considered sacred, Aamir Khan is unapologetically challenging the norm. The Bollywood icon is facing criticism for his upcoming film Sitaare Zameen Par, which many claim is a frame-by-frame remake of the Spanish hit Campeones. But instead of shying away from the controversy, Aamir is embracing it—making it clear that for him, storytelling isn’t confined by language or origin. This isn’t the first time Aamir has tackled a remake. His previous film, Laal Singh Chaddha, a Hindi adaptation of Forrest Gump, also drew mixed reactions. Yet, Aamir remains unfazed. Speaking on Raj Shamani’s podcast, he candidly described himself as “a little crazy” and “not very practical,” adding that remaking stories doesn’t feel like a creative compromise. Instead, he sees them as fresh canvases—opportunities to reinterpret existing tales through his unique perspective. Despite the online trolling and intense scrutiny, Aamir Khan stands firm in his belief that remakes have artistic merit. He views the process not as replication but as transformation—where emotional depth and cultural nuance can be reimagined for a new audience. For Aamir, it’s not about playing it safe—it’s about making stories that matter, no matter where they come from.

title: Inside the Meghalaya Honeymoon Murder: Sonal Raghuvanshi’s Role in Raja Raghuvanshi’s Death.
content: A romantic honeymoon in Meghalaya turned into a gruesome tragedy for 30-year-old Indore businessman Raja Raghuvanshi, whose decomposed body was discovered on 2 June in a gorge near the scenic Weisawdong Falls in East Khasi Hills. He had been missing since 23 May, just days after arriving in Meghalaya with his wife Sonam Raghuvanshi for what was supposed to be a peaceful getaway. The shocking Meghalaya honeymoon murder case has captured nationwide attention due to its chilling details. Police have taken five people into custody in connection with the brutal Raja Raghuvanshi murder. The suspects include his wife Sonam Raghuvanshi (25), her alleged lover Raj Kushwaha (21), and three other accused—Vishal Singh Chauhan (22), Anand Kurmi (23), and Akash Rajput (19)—who are believed to have executed the killing. Investigators say the crime was carefully planned, with Raja allegedly lured to the remote location before being attacked. According to ACP Poonam Chand Yadav, all four male accused have confessed to their involvement in the Meghalaya honeymoon murder case. "The first blow was delivered by Vishal, also known as Vicky Thakur," said Yadav in a statement to India Today TV. Shockingly, Sonam was present during the attack and reportedly watched as her husband was killed before the accused threw his body into a deep gorge.

title: Rape Accused Hacked to Death in Odisha: 8 Women Survivors Take Violent Revenge.
content: In a shocking case from Odisha’s Gajapati district, a group of women allegedly killed a 60-year-old man accused of sexually assaulting multiple women in their village and later burned his body to erase evidence. The brutal incident occurred on the night of June 3, when the man allegedly raped a 52-year-old widow, triggering an act of collective revenge by survivors of his past crimes. Ten people, including eight women and two men, have been arrested in connection with the Odisha rape accused murder case, according to police officials. Following a missing person complaint filed by the accused's family, police launched a search and later recovered bones and ashes from a forested hillock about 2 km from the village. Mohana police station in-charge, Basant Sethi, confirmed that the man was hacked to death while he slept, and his body was subsequently burned by the group. A village ward member is also among the ten arrested for their alleged role in this violent act of retribution. The group of women—most of them survivors of repeated sexual assault by the deceased—allegedly convened a meeting after the June 3 incident and resolved to take justice into their own hands. The 52-year-old widow, the most recent victim, is said to have struck the first blow, with others joining in to ensure the act was completed. Two local men also assisted in the crime, which the women described as the only way to stop the accused's continued abuse. According to Gajapati SP Jatindra Kumar Panda, the women had never filed any police complaint against the man, who had been sexually preying on women in the village since becoming a widower four years ago. At least six of the arrested women revealed they had been sexually assaulted by the deceased, prompting widespread discussion on the lack of legal recourse and the failure of the system to protect vulnerable women in rural Odisha.

title: Russian Envoy Confirms Upcoming US-Russia Talks in Moscow.
content: Bilateral talks between the United States and Russia are set to shift from Istanbul to Moscow, according to Russia’s new ambassador to Washington. Speaking to the state-run TASS news agency, Ambassador Darchiev confirmed that US-Russia diplomatic negotiations aimed at resolving long-standing tensions will take place “in the very near future” in the Russian capital. The move highlights renewed attempts to address deteriorating Russia-US relations. The Ukraine war has triggered one of the worst confrontations between Moscow and the West since the Cold War era. Senior diplomats from both Washington and Moscow told Reuters in 2024 that current relations are at their lowest point in decades. The ongoing conflict has deepened geopolitical rifts, prompting high-stakes diplomacy to prevent further escalation between the two nuclear powers. Former U.S. President Donald Trump has repeatedly described the Ukraine conflict as a proxy war between the U.S. and Russia. He has also warned about the growing risk of global escalation, even suggesting the potential for a world war. With diplomatic efforts resuming in Moscow, the upcoming US-Russia talks are expected to focus on de-escalating tensions and finding common ground amid rising global concerns.

title: India’s Rapid Rise: Surpassing China, US, EU, and Germany in Economic Momentum.
content: India's economic growth is expected to moderate slightly in FY26, with the World Bank revising its forecast to 6.3%, down from 6.7% estimated in January. Despite this downward revision, India is projected to remain the fastest-growing major economy globally, even as other leading economies such as China, the US, and those in the EU face economic slowdowns. The resilience of India’s economy highlights its strong fundamentals in the face of global uncertainties. India first emerged as the world’s fastest-growing major economy in 2015, overtaking China in terms of GDP growth. This momentum was driven by a combination of favorable global conditions—such as low oil prices—and domestic macroeconomic stability supported by structural reforms. From 2015 to 2018, India’s GDP growth ranged between 7.5% and 8%, while China's growth slowed to around 6.5–6.7% due to its shift from investment-led to consumption-led growth. However, the period from 2019 to 2020 brought significant challenges. Growth began to slow in late 2018 due to banking sector stress, especially among NBFCs, declining private consumption, and sluggish investment. By FY2019–20, GDP growth had dropped to 5%, down from 6.1% the previous year, impacted by global headwinds, weakening demand in manufacturing and construction, and financial sector difficulties. The onset of the COVID-19 pandemic further compounded these issues, disrupting momentum across sectors.

title: How India Is Leading the Defence Race with Drones, Data, and Next-Gen Warfare Tech.
content: India’s Drone Warfare Era Begins: AI, Kamikaze Drones, and a High-Tech Defence Race Warfare in the 21st century has radically transformed. The modern enemy may not arrive with boots and rifles, but instead with AI-powered strategies, drone swarms, and silent cyberattacks. For India, this next-gen battlefield is no longer theoretical—it’s a reality. In May 2025, the India-Pakistan conflict escalated into the most serious military clash in decades, featuring high-tech warfare tools like loitering munitions and kamikaze drones. This marked South Asia’s first large-scale deployment of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) in active combat, signaling the dawn of AI-driven drone warfare in the region. “Drones are no longer limited to aerial surveillance,” said Agnishwar Jayaprakash, founder of Garuda Aerospace, one of India's leading drone tech startups. “Today’s defense drones must carry payloads, drop precision bombs, and conduct kamikaze missions. That demands tight integration between AI-based navigation and explosive delivery systems.” This shift underscores how India’s military drone technology is rapidly evolving to meet modern threats. Garuda Aerospace is at the forefront of India’s drone defense technology ecosystem, alongside a growing number of startups and defense firms investing in autonomous weapons, AI-guided drones, and advanced cyber-defense tools. As geopolitical tensions rise, India’s focus on drone warfare and defense innovation is reshaping its national security strategy for the digital age.

title: Open AI Rolls Out o3-Pro Model for ChatGPT Pro and Enterprise Teams.
content: OpenAI has officially launched the o3-pro model for ChatGPT Pro and Teams users, delivering major improvements in performance and functionality. In a post on X, the company stated that expert evaluations consistently rated the o3-pro model higher than its predecessor, o3, especially in critical areas like science, education, programming, data analysis, and writing. This marks a significant upgrade for users relying on ChatGPT for advanced tasks. The company further noted that reviewers found the OpenAI o3-pro model to be superior in clarity, comprehensiveness, instruction-following, and accuracy—key benchmarks for high-performing AI systems. Starting Wednesday, the o3-pro model will o3-pro for all ChatGPT Pro and Team users. Enterprise and Education users will receive access to the new model next week, as part of OpenAI’s continued rollout across its ecosystem. Beyond improved conversational capabilities, the ChatGPT o3-pro model supports web browsing, file analysis, image interpretation, Python execution, and personalized responses using memory. The model is also now live on OpenAI’s developer API, making it accessible to a broader community of developers and businesses looking to integrate cutting-edge AI into their applications.

title: Inside Karan Johar and Kartik Aaryan's Fallout and Reunion: What Really Happened.
content: It’s no secret that Kartik Aaryan and Karan Johar had a major fallout in 2021 during the production of Dostana 2. Kartik, who was cast alongside Janhvi Kapoor, was unexpectedly dropped from the film after the shoot had already begun. Rumors circulated that Kartik’s "unprofessional behavior" led to the rift, causing a wave of controversy across Bollywood. The fallout between the actor and the filmmaker became one of the most talked-about events in the industry. In a recent interview with Bollywood Hungama, Karan Johar opened up about his patch-up with Kartik Aaryan. “We internally discussed it, worked it out, and we let bygones be bygones,” Johar said, calling Kartik a hardworking star with great instincts for screenplays. He further explained, “It’s a tiny industry, like a family. Sometimes we have complaints, but good people want to make good films and collaborate on meaningful content.” This confirmation came after the duo announced two new projects together—Tu Meri Main Tera and Nagzilla. Kartik Aaryan has always maintained a calm stance about the fallout with Karan Johar. On his 33rd birthday in 2023, KJo took to Instagram to announce a new film with Kartik, officially marking the end of their feud. Later, in an interview with Lallantop, Kartik said, “I was silent when the news came out and I choose to stay silent even now. I focus 100% on my work and stay away from unnecessary controversies.” With both stars moving past the Dostana 2 controversy, fans can now look forward to their exciting upcoming collaborations.

title: Karan Johar Slams Bollywood Trends: ‘Herd Mentality Is Killing Originality.
content: Karan Johar Slams Bollywood’s Herd Mentality, Calls for Original StorytellingIn a candid interview with Bollywood Hungama, filmmaker Karan Johar addressed what he sees as the biggest challenge facing the Hindi film industry today—Bollywood’s herd mentality. Johar criticized the growing trend where producers and creators rush to replicate what has previously worked, rather than investing in fresh, original content. Karan highlighted how successful films like Pushpa, Chhaava, and Stree triggered waves of imitation across the industry. “Everyone’s trying to do what others are doing,” he said. “You see Pushpa doing well in tier-2 and tier-3 markets, and suddenly 20 filmmakers want to chase that same formula. Stree worked because it was unique. Horror comedies became a trend after that, but few matched the originality.” According to Johar, this copycat culture is leading to creative stagnation in Bollywood. Johar emphasized that originality and innovation in Bollywood are essential to sustain audience interest. “We need ideas that are individually strong and genre-defining—not repetitive clones of past successes,” he explained. KJo’s remarks come at a time when the film industry is under growing pressure to deliver both commercially and creatively, especially in a post-pandemic entertainment landscape.

title: Akshay Kumar’s Housefull 5 Roars at Box Office: ₹116.6 Cr in 5 Days, Beats Sky Force, Holiday Records
content: After a string of underwhelming releases, Akshay Kumar seems to be back on track with Housefull 5, directed by Tarun Mansukhani. The ensemble whodunit comedy, featuring over 20 actors, earned ₹11.7 crore on Tuesday, a slight dip from Monday’s ₹13.15 crore. Yet, the film’s consistent double-digit earnings post-opening weekend signal strong audience hold and helped it pass the crucial Monday test. Over the weekend, it grossed ₹24.35 crore (Friday), ₹32.38 crore (Saturday), and ₹35.10 crore (Sunday), bringing the domestic total to ₹116.6 crore by Day 5. Housefull 5 has already outperformed Akshay Kumar’s 2018 sports drama Gold (₹104.72 crore), as well as previous installments of the franchise like Housefull 2 (₹106 crore) and Housefull 3 (₹109.14 crore). It has also surpassed the collections of Holiday – A Soldier Is Never Off Duty (₹112.45 crore) and even Sky Force (₹112.75 crore), which was considered Kumar’s comeback earlier this year. With two versions—‘A’ and ‘B’—playing in cinemas simultaneously (each featuring different endings and killers), the unique format has added curiosity and repeat viewership value. The film’s solo Hindi release and strong franchise recall have given it a clear runway before the release of Aamir Khan’s Sitaare Zameen Par, scheduled for next week. The upcoming film is a spiritual sequel to Taare Zameen Par and is expected to bring fresh competition. Until then, Housefull 5 is on track to not just enter but solidify its place in the ₹200 crore club, marking another major success in Akshay Kumar’s box office career.

title: Watch: AB de Villiers Shares Heartfelt Letter to Virat Kohli and RCB After Historic IPL Title Triumph.
content: Former South Africa cricketer AB de Villiers shared an emotional letter after Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) clinched their maiden IPL title on June 3, ending an 18-year wait. Taking to social media, de Villiers posted a heartfelt video message titled “Dear RCB Family,” expressing his overwhelming emotions and admiration for the team’s historic triumph. “Last night was something that words will never fully do justice to,” he began, describing the electric atmosphere at the Narendra Modi Stadium in Ahmedabad during the IPL 2025 final. As de Villiers walked into the stadium, he was struck by the sea of red and gold — a passionate display from RCB fans that made the neutral venue feel like the Chinnaswamy Stadium. He wrote, “What I witnessed was not just a cricket match, but a culmination of beliefs, heartbreaks, near misses, miracles, and undying loyalty.” The former RCB star, who spent a major part of his IPL career with the franchise, said that finally lifting the IPL trophy felt like a dream come true, one even better than he had imagined. In his letter, de Villiers also praised the franchise's foundation, leadership, and unwavering fanbase. He emphasized that the win was much more than just a title — it was the reward for years of hard work, perseverance, and belief. “RCB, the team that became family to me, are now champions of IPL. Wow, feels good to say that,” he added, while describing the moment as surreal and deeply fulfilling. RCB, led by Rajat Patidar, defeated Punjab Kings by 6 runs in a thrilling IPL 2025 final to break their long-standing title drought. After posting 190/9 in the first innings, RCB's bowlers delivered under pressure by taking key wickets at crucial moments. The victory not only marked a major milestone for the franchise but also stirred raw emotions in icons like Virat Kohli, whom de Villiers described standing “at long-off, right in front of me” — a moment that made the night unforgettable.

title: Watch: Ravi Shastri Breaks Silence on Virat Kohli's Test Retirement – Says 'It Could Have Been Handled Better
content: Former India head coach Ravi Shastri got emotional while reacting to Virat Kohli's retirement from Test cricket, calling it a moment that could have been handled with more care. Shastri, who shared a highly successful partnership with Kohli during his captaincy years, praised the star batter’s immense contribution to the longest format. "It’s only when you go that people truly realise how big a player you were," said Shastri, emphasizing that Kohli’s legacy goes far beyond statistics. Speaking on Kohli's influence, Shastri highlighted the batter's leadership and impact, especially during overseas tours. “The way he played at Lord’s, the intensity he brought to the field, and how the team turned games around — it was unreal,” he said. According to Shastri, Kohli was not just a great cricketer but a true ambassador for Test cricket, keeping the format alive with his passion and aggressive style of play, especially away from home. Virat Kohli announced his retirement from Test cricket last month, describing the decision as extremely difficult but necessary. He stated that he had given everything to Test cricket and leaves with no regrets. Kohli, who made his Test debut in 2011 against the West Indies, went on to become India’s captain in 2014. Over a span of 14 years, he played 123 Test matches, scoring 9,230 runs, including 30 centuries — making him India’s fourth-highest Test run-scorer after Sachin Tendulkar, Rahul Dravid, and Sunil Gavaskar. Kohli's final Test appearance came earlier this year in Sydney during the Border-Gavaskar Trophy against Australia. India lost the match and the series 3-1, marking the end of Kohli’s remarkable red-ball journey. However, his recent performances were under scrutiny, particularly during the Australia tour, where he scored just one century and 190 runs in nine innings. Despite the dip in form, Shastri and fans alike believe Kohli’s contribution to Indian Test cricket remains unmatched.

title: Gujarat Congress Leader Rajesh Soni Arrested Over Facebook Posts on Operation Sindoor, Charged Under New BNS Law.
content: Gujarat Congress leader Rajesh Soni was arrested on Friday by the state’s Cyber Crime Cell for controversial Facebook posts related to Operation Sindoor. The posts allegedly spread misinformation and undermined the morale of Indian armed forces. One of the posts depicted Prime Minister Narendra Modi in a fighter pilot uniform, while another falsely claimed that “the Indian government surrendered during the operation,” according to police. Authorities said these posts posed a threat to national security and public morale during a sensitive military mission. Superintendent of Police (CID-Cyber Crime), Bharatsinh Tank, confirmed that Soni's statements could demoralize defence personnel and endanger India's sovereignty. The Congress leader was booked under the newly enforced Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) laws, including Section 152, which penalizes acts that threaten the unity and integrity of India. This section carries strict penalties, including up to life imprisonment or a minimum of seven years in prison, along with a financial fine. In addition, Soni faces charges under Section 353(1)(a) of the BNS, concerning statements that incite public mischief or disrupt public order. The charges reflect the government’s ongoing effort to clamp down on what it sees as irresponsible and inflammatory content on social media. The arrest has triggered debate over freedom of expression, with critics claiming that the government is attempting to suppress dissent during a time when national unity is crucial. Operation Sindoor has been a major military offensive launched by India to dismantle terror infrastructure across the Pakistan border and in PoK. While hailed as a decisive move under India’s zero-tolerance policy on cross-border terrorism, the operation has also stirred controversy over media narratives and political speech. Rajesh Soni’s arrest highlights the growing tension between national security priorities and the protection of civil liberties in the digital era.

title: Aamir Khan on Losing Iconic 'Darr' Role to Shah Rukh Khan: 'I Was Removed After Saying Yes.
content: Aamir Khan recently broke his silence on why he lost the iconic role in Yash Chopra’s 1993 blockbuster Darr, which ultimately went to Shah Rukh Khan. Contrary to the long-standing belief that Aamir had rejected the film, the actor clarified that he was actually removed from the project. “I didn’t say no to Darr. I said yes, but I was fired because I requested a joint narration,” Aamir revealed in an interview, shedding light on the real reason behind his exit from the cult classic. Explaining his side, Aamir Khan said that his demand for a joint narration wasn’t unreasonable but rooted in his collaborative approach to filmmaking. “I believe when two lead actors are involved, both should hear the narration together so we can work as a team,” Aamir stated. However, veteran filmmaker Yash Chopra disagreed with the idea, which led to Khan being ousted from the project. “Yash ji did not want to do that, so he fired me,” he added candidly . Aamir Khan called the request a matter of personal principle and said he follows the same approach in all his projects. “If there are multiple actors in a film, I believe everyone should be present during the narration. That’s how teams are built,” he explained. His exit paved the way for Shah Rukh Khan to step in, a move that turned out to be a defining moment in SRK’s career. Released in 1993, Darr became a massive hit and solidified Shah Rukh Khan’s anti-hero image. The psychological thriller, co-starring Juhi Chawla and Sunny Deol, is remembered for SRK’s chilling portrayal and his iconic dialogue, “I love you, K-k-k-Kiran.” On the work front, Aamir Khan is now preparing for his big-screen comeback with Sitaare Zameen Par, directed by RS Prasanna, which is set to release in theatres soon.

title: Air India Aircraft Crash Near Meghaninagar, Ahmedabad — 242 Passengers Aboard.
content: A London-bound Air India flight crashed minutes after takeoff from Ahmedabad airport on Thursday, killing most of the 242 passengers and crew onboard, including former Gujarat Chief Minister Vijay Rupani. The Boeing 787 Dreamliner was en route to London’s Gatwick Airport when it lost altitude and plummeted into a densely populated residential area in Meghaninagar. As per early reports, at least 204 bodies have been recovered, though official confirmation is awaited. The crash occurred at approximately 1:39 PM, just minutes after departure, sending thick plumes of smoke over the Meghaninagar locality. The aircraft reportedly collided with a doctors’ hostel within the BJ Medical College residential complex, causing severe destruction. Police and rescue teams have cordoned off the crash site and are working to recover victims from the debris. Air India Flight AI-171, carrying 230 passengers and 12 crew members, was operating a long-haul international route to the United Kingdom when disaster struck. The presence of prominent political leader Vijay Rupani on board adds a grave dimension to the tragedy. Initial investigations suggest a technical malfunction during takeoff, although a full probe by aviation authorities is underway. Eyewitnesses described scenes of chaos and panic as the plane crashed into the medical college housing quarters near the Ahmedabad airport. Several residents of the area were reportedly injured, though official casualty numbers on the ground are yet to be confirmed. The Meghaninagar plane crash is now being termed one of the deadliest aviation disasters in recent Indian history.

title: Emotional Moment: Kareena and Saif Support Karisma Kapoor After Sunjay Kapur’s Unexpected Death in London news.
content: Bollywood celebrities Kareena Kapoor Khan and Saif Ali Khan were seen arriving late Thursday night at Karisma Kapoor’s residence in Mumbai, shortly after the news of her ex-husband Sunjay Kapur’s sudden demise in London broke out. Sunjay, a well-known businessman, reportedly suffered a heart attack while playing polo in England. He was 53 years old. The couple had been married for over a decade before officially divorcing in 2016. Karisma Kapoor’s close friends Malaika Arora and Amrita Arora also paid a late-night visit to her home to offer condolences. Videos show Malaika dressed in a beige outfit, looking visibly emotional as she stood behind a glass door speaking with family. Another clip captured her seated in a car with Amrita's son, attempting to avoid paparazzi. Kareena and Saif were also seen shielding their faces from cameras as they entered Karisma’s residence. The news of Sunjay Kapur’s death was confirmed by author and businessman Suhel Seth on X (formerly Twitter), who wrote, “Deeply saddened at the passing of @sunjaykapur… a terrible loss and deepest condolences to his family and colleagues @sonacomstar. Om Shanti.” The sudden demise of the 53-year-old industrialist has left many shocked, especially those close to the Kapoor family. Karisma Kapoor married Sunjay Kapur in 2003, and the couple had two children together. In 2010, Karisma moved back to Mumbai from Delhi, and the couple officially filed for divorce in 2014. Their separation was finalized in 2016 after a prolonged legal process. Following their divorce, Sunjay Kapur married model and entrepreneur Priya Sachdev, with whom he shares a son.

title: Arjun Kapoor on Shah Rukh Khan: ‘He’s Even Ahead of AI – That’s His Genius
content: Bollywood actor Arjun Kapoor opened up about his early days in the film industry and shared a heartfelt tribute to superstar Shah Rukh Khan. Speaking on the Raj Shamani podcast, Arjun reminisced about his time as an assistant director on the sets of Kal Ho Naa Ho, where he had the chance to closely observe Shah Rukh Khan. “I was completely enamoured by him. Some people are touched by the divine—he transcends generations. His intelligence, emotional depth, and human compassion are so advanced, I truly think he’s ahead of artificial intelligence,” Arjun said. Arjun highlighted SRK’s emotional empathy, shaped by personal tragedies like the loss of his parents, and how it influences his interactions. “Even on a film set, he treats you with respect. He reads a lot, he’s always learning, and everything he says comes from a place of deep understanding,” Arjun said. He also admired Khan’s awareness and ability to be fully present in a conversation: “He looks you in the eye, engages with you completely, yet he’s so aware of everything else happening around him. That combination is rare.” Continuing his praise, Arjun spoke about Shah Rukh Khan’s humility and accessibility. “Even today, if I message him, he replies. Despite his global stardom, he maintains personal warmth. He’s Shah Rukh Khan, but he never lets you feel the gap. He connects with your soul when he speaks,” Arjun shared. Calling him “timeless and larger-than-life,” Arjun emphasized that every interaction with SRK leaves a lasting impact, making him truly one of a kind in the film industry.

title: Israel-Iran Conflict Escalates: Reasons Behind June 13 Strikes.
content: On Friday, June 13, Israel launched a massive military assault on Iran, targeting nuclear facilities and key military infrastructure. According to the Israel Defense Forces (IDF), dozens of fighter jets carried out precision strikes in multiple regions across Iran, marking the first phase of Operation Rising Lion. The IDF confirmed that the targets included Iran’s nuclear enrichment facilities and strategic military assets. Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu addressed the nation shortly after the strikes, confirming that Israel aimed to eliminate the growing Iranian threat. He said Israeli forces struck Iran’s “nuclear weaponisation programme,” its “ballistic missile programme,” and even targeted top nuclear scientists. Netanyahu emphasized that Iran had enriched enough uranium to create nine atomic bombs, warning that Tehran could develop a nuclear weapon within months if left unchecked. The June 13 airstrikes come amid soaring tensions between Israel and Iran, especially following the Hamas attack on October 7, 2023, and ongoing conflict in Gaza. Israel considers a nuclear-armed Iran an existential threat and views the operation as a critical move to dismantle Iran’s regional influence and military power. Netanyahu accused Iran of turning its “genocidal rhetoric” into real nuclear ambitions, declaring that Israel will take decisive action to protect its future.

title: Controversy Erupts as Astrologer Uses Air India Crash to Validate Prediction.
content: An astrologer is facing intense backlash for allegedly predicting the Air India crash that occurred on June 12 near Ahmedabad. The tragic accident happened when an Air India plane crashed into the B J Medical College building in Meghaninagar, just moments after takeoff. The devastating incident claimed the lives of over 250 passengers and crew, plunging the nation into deep grief. Shortly after the incident, an X (formerly Twitter) user named Sharmistha, who identifies as an astrology practitioner, claimed the tragedy aligned with her earlier predictions. In a post dated June 12, she wrote, “It is very unfortunate that we lost so many lives in the Air India crash in Ahmedabad." She continued, “Jupiter is yet to enter Ardra, and India’s Mars Mahadasha is yet to begin—yet so much has already started. Her remarks drew widespread condemnation online, with many accusing her of being insensitive and using a national tragedy to promote astrology. Social media users criticized the post as opportunistic and disrespectful to the victims and their families. The controversy has reignited debate around ethical boundaries in public commentary, especially during times of crisis.

title: BCCI Axes India vs India A Clash Before England Series, Major Letdown for Cricket Fans.
content: India will play a crucial intra-squad warm-up match against India A from June 13 to 16 at Kent County Cricket Ground in Beckenham, ahead of their first Test against England starting June 20. This practice match marks the final on-field preparation for the Indian team. Earlier this month, India A played two unofficial Tests against the England Lions to gear up for the tour, both of which were live-streamed on JioHotstar. In a surprising move, the BCCI announced that the match will be played behind closed doors, with no access to media or broadcasters. “June 13–16: Closed intra-squad game. No vision access to Media/Broadcast. On the final day, a player/member of support staff will be made available to the media,” BCCI said in an official statement. Although no specific reason was cited, it is understood that since the match does not hold first-class status, the board opted to keep it private—similar to pre-series preparations during the Border-Gavaskar Trophy. There is some confusion over player roles, as multiple cricketers are listed in both the India and India A squads. Players like KL Rahul, Karun Nair, Yashasvi Jaiswal, Dhruv Jurel, Nitish Kumar Reddy, Shardul Thakur, Akash Deep, and Abhimanyu Easwaran are expected to feature, but it’s unclear which side they will represent during the match. This overlap adds uncertainty about team composition and strategy for the warm-up fixture.

title: Ahmedabad Plane Crash: What Vishwas Kumar Ramesh Said to PM Modi After Surviving.
content: Vishwas Kumar Ramesh, the only survivor of the tragic Air India crash in Ahmedabad, met Prime Minister Narendra Modi on Friday at the Ahmedabad Civil Hospital, where he is receiving treatment. PM Modi, who visited the crash site and met several victims' families, inquired about Ramesh's health and listened to his account of the incident. "The prime minister asked about my well-being and how it all unfolded. I told him that I am okay," Ramesh told DD News. Recalling the horrific accident, Ramesh—who was seated in row 11A, near the emergency exit—said he still struggles to comprehend how he survived. “For a moment, I thought I was going to die. But when I opened my eyes and saw the wreckage, I realized I was alive,” he said in an interview with the Hindustan Times. Ramesh described the moments before the crash: “Within 5 to 10 seconds of takeoff, the flight felt stuck in the air, lights started flickering, and then we hit something. Ramesh said his section of the aircraft didn’t crash onto the building’s roof like the rest of the plane, which may have saved his life. “When I saw the exit, I thought I could come out. I tried, and I did. Others on the opposite side may not have had that chance.” He recalled seeing passengers and crew die in front of him and said, “I walked out of the rubble. I still don’t know how I made it.” The Air India flight AI171, carrying 241 passengers, crashed shortly after taking off from Ahmedabad, with Ramesh as the sole survivor. A high-level probe has been ordered by the civil aviation ministry.

title: Bihar: Truck Crashes Into Tejashwi Yadav’s Escort Vehicle, 3 Policemen Hurt.
content: ejashwi Yadav Narrowly Escapes Convoy Accident in Bihar, 3 Security Personnel InjuredRashtriya Janata Dal (RJD) leader Tejashwi Yadav had a narrow escape late Friday night when a speeding truck crashed into his convoy on the national highway while returning from Madhepura to Patna. According to reports, the incident occurred around 1:30 am when Yadav had stopped for a tea break. As he and other leaders were stepping out of the car, the truck rammed into 2–3 escort vehicles, injuring three members of his security team. “I was just five feet away when it happened,” Yadav said, adding that the truck had passed the toll gate and immediate action must be taken against those responsible. In response to the incident, Tejashwi Yadav launched a scathing attack on the Nitish Kumar-led Bihar government, accusing it of failing to maintain law and order. "Criminals are running loose, and daily crimes are being reported with the police appearing helpless," he told the media. Calling the state of governance "maha-jungle raj," Yadav criticized the administration's lack of accountability and inaction, especially in addressing serious crimes and public safety concerns. RJD Leader Highlights Healthcare Collapse at AIIMS Patna and PMCHTejashwi also targeted the state’s crumbling healthcare infrastructure, specifically highlighting AIIMS Patna and PMCH. “Patients are not getting beds; their families are sleeping on roads,” he said after visiting AIIMS. He described scenes of disorganization and suffering, where people were pleading for basic care. “This is the reality of Bihar’s health system under this government. Instead of easing people’s pain, they are adding to it,” he said, calling out both the state and central governments for their neglect.

title: South Africa’s World Test Title Win Could Mark New Era in Cricket History.
content: South Africa are on the brink of a historic victory in the ICC World Test Championship final, with just 69 runs needed to beat Australia at Lord’s. Batting coach Ashwell Prince described the potential win as “massive for the country,” as the Proteas look to overcome their long-standing reputation as international cricket’s perennial underachievers. With eight wickets in hand, South Africa appear poised to end their painful history of faltering in high-stakes matches. Openers Aiden Markram, who remains unbeaten on 102, and captain Temba Bavuma, on 65 not out, led a dominant third-day batting display that has put South Africa in a commanding position. A win in the WTC final would help erase the "chokers" tag that has haunted the team for decades, particularly in ICC white-ball tournaments. Despite 18 appearances in ODI and T20 World Cups, South Africa have made it to just one final — the 2024 T20 World Cup in the Caribbean — where they narrowly lost to India. Prince expressed the tension and excitement in the Proteas camp, saying, “This would be a massive achievement for South African cricket, not just for this match but for the long-term confidence of the team.” He added that past squads have often been strong contenders but failed to close out crucial games. “We’ve had great teams in the past fall short. Now we’re determined to rewrite that story.” As day four approaches, Prince emphasized the importance of staying grounded and focused. He praised Markram as “someone for the big occasion” and stressed that the team’s preparation would remain consistent. “We don’t need to do anything extraordinary — just stick to the basics, stay in the moment, and take it one ball at a time,” he said. With a potential WTC title within reach, South Africa are eyeing not just a win, but redemption on the global Test stage.

title: Famed Bollywood Writer Dies in Debt; Javed Akhtar Alleges Raj Kapoor’s Role.
content: In 1947, a young apprentice named Shankardas Kesarilal—later known to the world as Shailendra—worked at the Matunga railway workshop in Bombay. A gifted poet, he spent his spare time writing verses and reciting them at local mushairas. During one such event, his poignant poem ‘Jalta Hai Punjab’ caught the attention of emerging filmmaker Raj Kapoor. Although Kapoor offered to feature the poem in his debut film Aag, Shailendra, then affiliated with the left-leaning Indian People’s Theatre Association (IPTA), declined due to his skepticism towards commercial cinema. However, financial pressures following his wife's pregnancy compelled him to return to Kapoor. At the time, Barsaat was in production and two songs were pending. For ₹500, Shailendra penned ‘Barsaat Mein’ and ‘Patli Kamar Hai’, both set to music by the then-rising duo Shankar–Jaikishan. This marked the genesis of one of Hindi cinema’s most iconic creative alliances. The collaboration between Raj Kapoor, Shailendra, and Shankar–Jaikishan redefined the emotional and lyrical depth of post-independence Bollywood. Shailendra’s words resonated across generations—most famously in ‘Awara Hoon’, which found fans beyond India, notably in the Soviet Union and the Middle East. His lyrics for Shree 420, especially ‘Pyaar Hua Iqraar Hua’, became timeless classics. Though closely associated with Kapoor’s vision, Shailendra also lent his poetic genius to celebrated directors like Bimal Roy (Do Bigha Zameen, Madhumati, Bandini) and Vijay Anand (Guide, Kala Bazar), collaborating with music legends such as Salil Chowdhury, S.D. Burman, and Ravi Shankar. Driven by creative ambition and loyalty, Shailendra turned producer in 1960, backing the film Teesri Kasam—starring Raj Kapoor and Waheeda Rehman, and directed by Basu Bhattacharya. Based on Phanishwar Nath Renu’s short story Maare Gaye Gulfam, the film is now hailed as a classic. Yet, it was a commercial disaster, pushing Shailendra into deep financial distress. According to renowned lyricist Javed Akhtar, Raj Kapoor’s repeated delays and failure to commit shooting dates significantly hampered the film’s progress. Akhtar controversially asserted that Kapoor’s actions directly contributed to Shailendra’s financial ruin and ultimately, his untimely death—adding a tragic note to a legacy built on lyrical brilliance.

title: ₹90 Lakh NEET Scam Busted: CBI Detains 2 for Promising Exam Score Fixes via NTA Access.
content: The Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) has arrested two individuals, Sandeep Jawahar Shah and Salim Patel, for allegedly orchestrating a high-value scam targeting parents of NEET-UG 2025 aspirants. The duo reportedly promised to manipulate examination scores in exchange for a hefty sum of ₹90 lakh. Acting on a tip-off, CBI officials posed as parents and met Shah at a luxury hotel in Lower Parel, Mumbai. During the undercover meeting, Shah initially demanded ₹90 lakh but later reduced the amount to ₹87.5 lakh, assuring access to National Testing Agency (NTA) officials who could allegedly alter exam scores. The investigation soon expanded to include Salim Patel and another suspect, Javed Ali Patel, who reportedly accepted a ₹25 lakh advance payment through a hawala channel earlier in the week. Authorities believe the group had similarly defrauded other parents by offering score manipulation services under the guise of insider access to the NTA. Both Shah and Patel have been remanded to CBI custody until Monday as the probe continues. When interrogated, Salim Patel gave inconsistent statements and claimed that the meeting was facilitated by a third party identified as Rajiv Sinha, who remains untraceable. During searches, the agency recovered multiple documents related to other NEET candidates, indicating that more students may have been victims of this racket. The CBI is now investigating the wider network and has not ruled out further arrests.

title: Cristiano Ronaldo Joins 2025 Esports World Cup as Official Global Ambassador.
content: The Esports World Cup Foundation (EWCF) has officially named Portuguese football legend Cristiano Ronaldo as the Global Ambassador for the Esports World Cup 2025. The prestigious tournament is scheduled to take place in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, from July 8 to 21, and is set to bring together top-tier esports athletes from around the world. In a statement shared by the EWC, Ronaldo expressed his admiration for the esports industry, stating, “Sport is always evolving – and esports is one more frontier.” He emphasized that the passion, dedication, and competitive spirit of esports athletes closely mirror those found in traditional sports. His appointment signals a powerful endorsement for the growing legitimacy and global appeal of esports. Taking to X (formerly Twitter), Ronaldo added, “I’m proud to join the Esports World Cup as Global Ambassador – standing with esports athletes who rise above and inspire the next generation.” With this partnership, Ronaldo aims to bridge the gap between traditional and digital sports, motivating millions of fans and aspiring gamers worldwide.

title: Amid Israeli Onslaught, Iran Rejects US Nuclear Dialogue as Unjustified.
content: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has declared ongoing nuclear negotiations with the United States “unjustifiable” in light of what Tehran calls “barbaric” Israeli military strikes. The strongly worded statement, reported by Iranian state media, casts serious doubt on the sixth round of nuclear talks that was scheduled for Sunday in Oman. The warning follows what Iran describes as the most aggressive Israeli attack to date, prompting Tehran to question the legitimacy of continuing dialogue with Washington. Earlier, Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baghaei accused the U.S. of enabling Israel’s military campaign, stating, “You cannot claim to negotiate and at the same time allow the Zionist regime to attack Iranian territory.” Iran’s government condemned the nuclear discussions as “meaningless,” alleging direct U.S. complicity in Israeli aggression. However, Washington has denied the accusations and urged Tehran at the United Nations Security Council to resume talks, suggesting that a diplomatic solution remains viable. Former U.S. President Donald Trump escalated tensions further by praising Israel’s strikes as “excellent,” calling the conflict a “second chance” for Iranian leadership to avoid total destruction. He warned Tehran that any escalation could provoke unprecedented military retaliation, referencing the advanced weaponry supplied to Israel by the U.S. Trump also criticized Iran’s refusal to accept proposals related to uranium enrichment, reiterating that Israeli operations would continue if Iran posed a nuclear threat. Despite these developments, public sentiment within Iran appears defiant. Hamed Mousavi, a political science professor at Tehran University, told Al Jazeera that many Iranians see negotiations as pointless under current conditions. “The Israelis essentially destroyed the diplomatic pathway, and what’s surprising is the full coordination between the U.S. and Israel,” he noted. Mousavi added that expectations of unrest in Tehran have not materialized, stating, “The mood is defiant. There’s no significant support for Israeli actions among the Iranian public.”

title: Apple's Liquid Glass UI Explained: Why the Internet Is Buzzing with Memes and Reactions.
content: Apple has officially given iOS a dramatic facelift with the unveiling of its new "Liquid Glass" design at WWDC 2025.
