Despite having viewed early rushes of Dhurandhar, Ranveer remains unaware of the final polished first look. Aditya Dhar has taken extensive measures to keep the reveal under wraps, deliberately excluding even Ranveer’s team from the loop. This strategy underscores Dhar’s intention to make Ranveer’s milestone birthday truly memorable with an iconic cinematic surprise.

title: Animal star Rashmika Mandanna responds to Deepika Padukone’s alleged 8-hour shift request for Spirit:  ‘It’s fair that.
content: A significant debate is currently underway in Bollywood, focusing on the issue of 8-hour work shifts on film sets. This discussion gained prominence about a month ago when actor Deepika Padukone reportedly exited director Sandeep Reddy Vanga’s upcoming film Spirit. Rumors suggest that one reason for her departure was the denial of her request for an 8-hour work shift, as she is a new mother. Following this, Sandeep Reddy Vanga announced Animal actor Triptii Dimri as the female lead opposite Prabhas, sparking further conversations among industry insiders and fans. Joining the ongoing debate, actor Rashmika Mandanna, who previously collaborated with Sandeep Reddy Vanga on the Ranbir Kapoor-starrer Animal (2023), recently shared her perspective. In an interview with Mojo Story, Rashmika acknowledged the variety of opinions surrounding the topic and expressed understanding of the concerns raised. She stated, “It’s fair that you went and told your director, ‘Okay, this is the timeframe I want to work in. Can we do this?’” emphasizing the importance of clear communication between actors and directors regarding work hours. Rashmika also highlighted that, while the debate is important, there are even more challenging situations in the industry. She pointed out that some artists endure much harsher conditions, working for two to three days straight without going home or even taking a brief rest. Her comments shed light on the varying realities faced by actors and the need for a balanced approach to working conditions in the film industry.

title: Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey Telugu Remake: Can Tharun Bhascker and Eesha Rebba Do Justice to Basil Joseph-Darshana’s Original.
content: Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey, a 2022 Malayalam film starring Basil Joseph and Darshana Rajendran, received widespread acclaim for its quirky and engaging portrayal of a married couple constantly at odds. The film stands out as one of the most entertaining Malayalam releases in recent years, thanks to its unique narrative and compelling performances. Now, the film is being remade in Telugu under the title Om Shanti Shanti Shantihi, with Tharun Bhascker and Eesha Rebba cast in the lead roles. The remake carries high expectations, especially considering that even Bollywood perfectionist Aamir Khan had to abandon plans for a Hindi version due to challenges in finding the right cast. This highlights how difficult it is to recreate the essence of Jaya Jaya Jaya Jaya Hey in any language. The story centers on Jaya, played originally by Darshana Rajendran, who transforms from a simple woman with dreams into someone who endures frequent abuse and ultimately decides to stand up for herself. Basil Joseph’s portrayal of Rajesh, a meek-looking man with a violent temper, adds depth to the complex marital dynamics. The Telugu remake’s young leads face the challenge of capturing this intense emotional journey with the same authenticity.

title: China Responds to Trump’s New Tariff Threat Against BRICS Members.
content: China responded firmly to US President Donald Trump’s recent threat to impose an additional 10% tariff on countries aligned with the BRICS bloc’s “anti-America” policies, emphasizing that the BRICS grouping is not seeking confrontation. At a routine press briefing, Chinese Foreign Ministry spokeswoman Mao Ning reiterated Beijing’s stance that trade and tariff wars yield no winners and that protectionism is not a viable path forward. She condemned the use of tariffs as a tool for political coercion, stating, “The use of tariffs serves no one,” underscoring China’s opposition to punitive trade measures. The US tariff threat follows the recent BRICS 2025 Summit held in Brazil, where the ten-member bloc including Brazil, China, Egypt, Ethiopia, India, Indonesia, Iran, Russia, South Africa, and the United Arab Emirates jointly condemned the US-Israeli airstrikes on Iranian nuclear and military sites, labeling them “illegal” and urging adherence to international law. The BRICS declaration also criticized the indiscriminate rise in tariffs, warning that such actions could destabilize global trade and supply chains, though it did not explicitly name the US. The summit further addressed the conflict in Gaza, advocating for peaceful resolutions and condemning unilateral military escalations, reflecting the concerns of the Global South. In response to the BRICS summit and its statements, President Trump announced that tariff letters targeting 12 countries supporting the bloc’s policies are “signed and ready” to be issued imminently. This move comes as the US nears the end of a temporary pause on revised tariffs, initially imposed in April to counteract trade imbalances but later suspended amid diplomatic tensions. The administration’s decision to potentially reinstate and increase tariffs has sparked concerns over escalating trade conflicts and their impact on international relations and economic stability.

title: Companies Adopt AI to Reduce Costs, But Face New Expenses Hiring Humans to Correct Its Mistakes.
content: When artificial intelligence first surged in popularity, many companies hoped it would help them reduce headcount and cut costs. However, instead of saving money, many organizations that hastily replaced staff with AI are now rehiring humans to correct AI-generated errors, often at a significant expense. According to a BBC report, a growing number of software engineers and writers are being employed specifically to fix mistakes made by AI tools. For example, Sarah Skidd, a product marketing manager in Arizona, was recently contacted by a content agency struggling with AI-generated website copy for a hospitality client. The copy was basic and unengaging, failing to meet the client’s expectations. Skidd spent 20 hours rewriting the content from scratch at her usual rate of $100 per hour, resulting in a $2,000 bill for the agency. Many other writers have found themselves hired not to create original content but to correct the shortcomings of AI-generated text. Despite the rising adoption of AI tools like ChatGPT and Google Gemini, which are often viewed as cost-saving and efficiency-enhancing solutions, the technology still falls short of human standards in many areas. A recent survey by the UK’s Federation of Small Businesses revealed that 35% of small firms plan to expand AI use within the next two years. Nevertheless, experiences like Skidd’s indicate that businesses may face ongoing challenges in fully relying on AI without human intervention.

title: LJP’s Chirag Paswan Ends Speculation with Major Announcement Ahead of Bihar Assembly Election: ‘For a Better Future.
content: Union Minister Chirag Paswan announced on Sunday that he will contest the upcoming Bihar assembly elections, expressing his commitment to fulfilling the dreams of his late father, Ram Vilas Paswan, and working for a "better future" for the state. Speaking at a rally in Saran district near his Hajipur Lok Sabha constituency, Paswan declared his dedication to advancing Bihar’s development with the slogan "Bihar first, Bihari first." He emphasized his resolve to work tirelessly for the people of Bihar, promising to build a system that truly benefits its citizens. Paswan also voiced support for the introduction of a domicile policy for government jobs in Bihar, highlighting that it is a long-standing demand of the state's youth. He criticized opposition parties, particularly the Rashtriya Janata Dal (RJD) and Congress, for previously withdrawing the policy after coming to power and accused them of misleading the public. While the current Nitish Kumar-led NDA government has ruled out the domicile policy, Paswan stressed the importance of prioritizing the welfare of Bihar's youth. RJD leader Tejashwi Yadav, meanwhile, has pledged full implementation of the policy if his coalition wins the elections. Addressing concerns over law and order in Bihar, Paswan condemned the recent murder of businessman Gopal Khema in Patna, pointing to a worrying rise in crime and the collapse of governance. He urged the state government to take strict action against perpetrators to prevent such incidents from recurring. Paswan's Lok Janshakti Party, part of the ruling National Democratic Alliance (NDA) at the Centre alongside the Bharatiya Janata Party and Janata Dal (United), is expected to maintain its alliance in the upcoming elections, although Paswan has yet to confirm this officially.

title: Smriti Irani Makes a Comeback as Tulsi in the Reboot of Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi: Take a Look at the First Image.
content: Smriti Irani is all set to make her long-awaited return to television with the reboot of the iconic soap opera Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi. Fans have been eagerly anticipating her comeback as Tulsi Virani, a character that left an indelible mark on Indian television history. On Monday, the first look of Smriti in her classic Tulsi avatar was leaked online, reigniting nostalgia among viewers. In the leaked glimpse, Smriti is seen donning a maroon saree with an intricate zari border, staying true to her original style. Her look is completed with a prominent red bindi, traditional temple jewelry, and a black-beaded mangalsutra all elements that defined Tulsi’s iconic image. This reboot marks Smriti Irani’s return to acting after a gap of 15 years, making it a highly anticipated moment for her fans. Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi, produced by Ekta Kapoor under Balaji Telefilms, remains one of the most influential television serials in India. Originally airing on Star Plus from July 3, 2000, to November 6, 2008, the show ran for over 1,800 episodes. The reboot will also see Amar Upadhyay reprising his role as Mihir. Although it was initially scheduled to premiere on July 3, production has experienced a slight delay.

title: Nagarjuna Reveals Shocking Spoilers About His and Aamir Khan’s Roles in Rajinikanth’s Coolie.
content: Lokesh Kanagaraj’s much-anticipated film Coolie, starring Rajinikanth, features Nagarjuna and Aamir Khan in significant roles. In a recent interview with Mid-Day, Nagarjuna shared intriguing spoilers about their characters, revealing details that had not been previously disclosed. While Aamir Khan portrays Dahaa, a character introduced through a striking monochrome image of him smoking a pipe, Nagarjuna clarified that he and Aamir do not share any scenes, as their storylines unfold in separate chapters. He praised Aamir’s performance, calling it brilliant and hinting that audiences will be surprised to see a new side of the actor. Nagarjuna also revealed that he plays the film’s main antagonist, Simon, who goes head-to-head with Rajinikanth’s character. Describing the role as a refreshing change, Nagarjuna expressed excitement about the numerous confrontations he has with Rajinikanth on screen. However, he refrained from divulging specific plot details, though promotional materials suggest the storyline may center around gold smuggling. The actor’s portrayal promises to add a compelling dynamic to the film’s narrative. Directed by Lokesh Kanagaraj and produced by Kalanithi Maran’s Sun Pictures, Coolie is scheduled for theatrical release on August 14. It will compete at the box office with Ayan Mukerji’s War 2, starring Hrithik Roshan and Jr NTR. Alongside the leads, the film’s ensemble cast includes Upendra, Soubin Shahir, Sathyaraj, Shruti Haasan, Reba Monica John, Junior MGR, Monisha Blessy, and Kaali Venkat. While the plot remains largely under wraps, Coolie is not expected to be connected to Lokesh’s Cinematic Universe, which includes Kaithi, Vikram, Leo, and the upcoming Benz.

title: Google Introduces New AI-Powered Search Mode in India: How It Works.
content: Google has officially expanded its AI Mode in Search to all users across India, following a successful experimental launch as part of Google Labs. Initially available only in English and requiring a sign-up, the feature now offers AI-powered, nuanced responses to a wide range of queries without any registration. This allows users to explore complex topics, receive detailed explanations, and learn step-by-step instructions more effectively. The company reported positive feedback during the experimental phase, highlighting user appreciation for the speed and quality of AI-generated answers. With the broader rollout, AI Mode will appear directly in the Google Search interface and the search bar within the Google app, accessible to all users in India. For now, the feature supports English language queries. Users can interact with AI Mode through voice or text input and can also use Google Lens to submit photos for enhanced, context-aware responses with attributed links. Additionally, AI Mode supports follow-up questions by remembering the context of previous interactions, making the search experience more conversational and personalized.

title: Saiyaara Trailer: Ahaan Panday and Aneet Padda Spark Passion, Laughter, and Conflict in a Riveting Aashiqui-Inspired Love Story –Watch Now.
content: The much-anticipated trailer of Saiyaara, directed by Mohit Suri and starring Ahaan Panday and Aneet Padda, has been released on YRF’s YouTube channel. In the over two-minute video, Ahaan plays Krish Kapoor, an aspiring singer, while Aneet portrays a songwriter who crafts lyrics for his character. The trailer showcases their journey as they meet, spend time together, and fall in love, capturing moments of joy and connection. However, the story takes a dramatic turn when Aneet’s character threatens a distressed Krish with a knife, asking him to leave an event. This moment marks a shift in Krish's personality, revealing his heartbreak and anger. Varun Badola, playing Krish’s father, offers him a heartfelt warning: "Apne pyaar ke liye na khud ko khatam mat kar lena" (Don’t end your life for your love). The trailer also hints at complexities in their relationship, showing Aneet’s character getting married. Produced by Yash Raj Films CEO Akshaye Widhani, Saiyaara is set to release in theatres on July 19. Ahaan Panday, who was trained and groomed by Aditya Chopra at YRF for over six years, was introduced to director Mohit Suri through auditions and screen tests before signing on for the film. The trailer was shared with the caption highlighting the film’s portrayal of flawed yet pure love stories that heal the heart.

title: MNS Workers Detained During Thane Protest; Fadnavis States March Was Not Approved.
content: Members of Raj Thackeray's Maharashtra Navnirman Sena (MNS) were detained during a protest march in Thane amid rising tensions over a language dispute in Maharashtra. The party alleged that the state government was preventing the "Marathi people's march." While the MNS initially received permission for the protest, the government later revoked it due to the party's insistence on following a specific route. Prohibitory orders were imposed to restrict public assembly, leading to the detentions and accusations from the MNS. Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis clarified that the protest was allowed, but the police had authority over the route selection to ensure proper crowd and traffic management. Fadnavis explained that the MNS workers refused to take an alternate route suggested by the police, which resulted in the denial of permission for the march. He emphasized that the mood in Maharashtra is understanding and cautioned against divisive actions, stating, "Marathis are big-hearted people, not narrow-minded. "The protest by MNS came in response to a recent demonstration by traders against an alleged assault on a shop owner by men reportedly wearing MNS scarves for refusing to speak Marathi. Prior to the protest, local MNS leader Avinash Jadhav, who heads the party’s Thane and Palghar units, was detained from his home. Police reports indicate that Jadhav faces 28 cognizable offence cases. This police action highlights the ongoing conflict between the Maharashtra government and the opposition over language-related issues. Incidents involving violence against individuals for not speaking Marathi have increased recently. The controversy further intensified after the government introduced a mandate making Hindi a compulsory third language in primary schools, a decision later withdrawn following backlash from opposition parties and language advocacy groups.

title: Influencer Rajshree More Alleges Abuse by MNS Leader’s Son Raheel Sheikh: “Half-Naked, Drunk, and Abused Me.
content: Maharashtra Navnirman Sena (MNS) leader's son Raheel Sheikh was booked on Monday in a drunk driving case following allegations by Mumbai influencer Rajshree More. More accused Sheikh of repeatedly ramming her car while she was traveling from Goregaon to Andheri on Sunday night. In her complaint, she stated that Sheikh was intoxicated and partially undressed during the incident. More, who recorded the episode and shared the video on Instagram, described how Sheikh's SUV collided with her car multiple times. She initially thought it was accidental but realized she was being targeted when the ramming continued even after she sought help from two constables who sat in her car. More also claimed that Sheikh misbehaved with the police and used his father's name, Javed Sheikh, the state vice president of MNS, to intimidate her. According to More, the abuse and threats escalated once Sheikh noticed her recording the incident. Despite being drunk and half-naked, Sheikh was aware of his identity and threatened More, warning her that she would face consequences for her actions. This incident follows previous harassment More reportedly faced from MNS supporters due to her controversial remarks related to the Marathi language debate.

title: Chirag Paswan Recalls Father’s Strong Opposition to BJP Before 2014 NDA Return Ahead of Bihar Elections.
content: With the Bihar elections approaching, new political alignments are expected to take shape. Union minister Chirag Paswan recently revealed that his late father, Ram Vilas Paswan, was initially strongly opposed to aligning with the BJP before the 2014 general elections. Chirag recounted how his father had said, “I will poison myself than go with the BJP,” reflecting his deep resistance at the time. Despite this, Ram Vilas Paswan eventually rejoined the BJP-led NDA, marking a significant political shift after previously distancing himself following the 2002 Gujarat riots during Narendra Modi’s tenure as chief minister. Chirag also highlighted the difficulties they faced in trying to engage with the Congress leadership during that period, stating that they were unable to meet Rahul Gandhi for over three months despite multiple attempts. While they did meet Sonia Gandhi several times, a meeting with Rahul Gandhi never materialized. This lack of engagement reportedly contributed to Ram Vilas Paswan’s decision to join the BJP-led alliance, despite his initial reservations. Chirag acknowledged that after his father’s adamant stance against the BJP, he himself hesitated to press the issue further, but circumstances ultimately paved the way for the alliance. As Chirag Paswan prepares to contest the upcoming Bihar assembly elections, he has declared his ambition to be a key player in the state’s political landscape. He announced plans to contest all 243 seats, signaling a vigorous campaign, though it remains unclear if this refers to fielding candidates from his Lok Janshakti Party (Ramvilas) or a broader political strategy. Despite previous tensions with the BJP—especially after the party’s role in splitting his family’s political base—Chirag has reiterated his loyalty to the BJP/NDA alliance. He emphasized the need for youth to focus on progress rather than caste identity, signaling his intent to broaden his political appeal beyond traditional caste-based support.

title: Shreya Ghoshal Serenades Pregnant Fan with ‘Piyu Bole’ at Amsterdam Concert – Watch.
content: Shreya Ghoshal, one of India’s most renowned playback singers, continues to captivate audiences worldwide with her soulful voice and graceful presence. As the lead artist on the All Hearts Tour across various international cities, the National Award-winning vocalist has solidified her reputation as a defining voice of her generation. Her performances combine exceptional technical skill with deep emotional expression, transcending language barriers and resonating with listeners everywhere. Throughout her concerts and behind-the-scenes interactions, Shreya’s sincerity and warmth shine through, creating meaningful connections with fans. Her ability to engage with audiences not only through her music but also through genuine human moments sets her apart as an artist who truly understands the power of her craft. The recent concert in Amsterdam was a testament to Shreya’s enduring appeal, offering fans an evening filled with timeless melodies. Beyond the music, an intimate moment backstage highlighted the profound impact she has on people’s lives, reminding us all of music’s unique ability to heal, unite, and inspire.

title: Bigg Boss 19 Set to Premiere in August as a Digital-First Series: Report.
content: Bigg Boss 19 is set to make a grand return with one of the longest seasons in the show's history, spanning approximately five months. Scheduled to premiere in the last week of August, this season introduces a significant format change by adopting a digital-first approach. Episodes will be released initially on the Jio Hotstar platform before airing on Colors TV, with a gap of one and a half hours between the digital debut and the television broadcast, catering to the growing online audience. Salman Khan will continue as the primary host for the first three months, after which a series of celebrity hosts including Farah Khan, Karan Johar, and Anil Kapoor are expected to take over. This rotation aims to keep the season fresh and engaging throughout its extended run. The makers have kept many details about the show's format, house design, and rules under wraps, maintaining high anticipation among fans. While several names from television, reality shows, and films have been rumored as contestants, no official confirmations have been made yet. Viewers can look forward to more updates and surprises as the premiere approaches, promising an exciting and dynamic season of Bigg Boss.

title: Dassault CEO Refutes Pakistan’s Claim on Rafale Jet Loss During Operation Sindoor.
content: Dassault Aviation chairman and CEO Eric Trappier dismissed Pakistan’s claim of shooting down three Indian Rafale jets during Operation Sindoor, clarifying that India lost only one Rafale fighter aircraft due to a technical failure at high altitude, unrelated to any combat engagement. Trappier emphasized that the flight logs and the Spectra electronic warfare systems did not record any hostile encounters during the operation. He described the Pakistani claims as “inaccurate and unfounded” and highlighted Dassault’s transparency regarding any operational losses of its aircraft. The context of Trappier’s remarks follows Pakistan Air Force’s assertion during the Indo-Pakistan clashes in May that it had shot down five Indian fighter jets, including three Rafales, using long-range missiles. India’s Defence Secretary RK Singh refuted these claims, assuring that no multiple Rafale losses occurred. Meanwhile, India acknowledged losing some aircraft during the operation due to political constraints limiting strikes on Pakistani military installations, which defense officials explained as a reason for limited targeting. The controversy sparked a broader disinformation campaign against Dassault’s Rafale jets, reportedly led by defence attaches from Chinese embassies aiming to discourage countries from purchasing the French fighter jets in favor of Chinese alternatives. France’s defence ministry condemned this campaign, stating it sought to undermine not only the aircraft’s credibility but also France’s national image and strategic autonomy. To date, Dassault has sold 533 Rafale jets worldwide, including exports to countries such as India, Egypt, Qatar, and the UAE.

title: South Africa Coach Prevented Wiaan Mulder from Surpassing Brian Lara’s Record: ‘Let the Legends Stand.
content: South Africa’s first-time captain Wiaan Mulder was on the verge of breaking Brian Lara’s iconic world record score of 400 not out when he chose to declare his innings at 367*. Mulder’s masterful knock in the second Test against Zimbabwe saw him reach a triple century off just 297 balls, making it the second-fastest triple century in Test history. Despite being just 33 runs short of Lara’s record, Mulder, following advice from head coach Shukri Conrad, decided to prioritize the team’s position over personal milestones, allowing Lara’s legendary record to stand. Mulder’s innings was a display of exceptional skill and focus, featuring 49 fours and four sixes over nearly seven hours at the crease. To maintain concentration, Mulder revealed he repeatedly sang “Zombie” by The Cranberries, which helped him stay in rhythm. After declaring, Mulder contributed with the ball, taking two quick wickets and helping South Africa enforce the follow-on, putting Zimbabwe under significant pressure in the ongoing series. Reflecting on his decision, Mulder expressed respect for Brian Lara’s legendary status, stating that it was fitting for such a record to remain with a cricket great like Lara. The Proteas currently hold a commanding lead in the series and look set for another dominant victory, with Mulder’s innings marking a memorable chapter in South African cricket history.

title: India Set to Boost US Cooking Gas Imports to 10% by 2026.
content: Indian state-run oil companies began importing liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) from the US in May, following China’s imposition of retaliatory tariffs on American propane. Traditionally reliant on the Middle East for over 90% of its LPG imports about 20.5 million metric tonnes in 2024— ndia is now seeking to diversify its sources. Four industry sources revealed that India plans to source roughly 10% of its LPG imports from the US by 2026 to reduce its trade imbalance with Washington. LPG, a blend of propane and butane used primarily for cooking, is imported by Indian Oil Corp, Bharat Petroleum Corp, and Hindustan Petroleum Corp, and sold at subsidised rates to households. High freight costs had previously deterred India from sourcing US LPG, but the tariff-induced arbitrage window and proposed elimination of import duties on US propane and butane have made American cargoes more attractive. “We would prefer U.S. imports on a delivered basis to minimise freight risks, much like our U.S. crude purchases,” said one industry source. The shift aligns with India’s broader strategy to secure energy supplies at competitive prices while balancing geopolitical interests. India’s LPG demand is projected to grow 5% to 6% annually, with imports expected to rise to 22–23 million tonnes by 2026. The International Energy Agency estimates India's consumption will reach about 1.2 million barrels per day—around 37.7 million tonnes—by 2030, growing at an average rate of 2.5% annually. The final scale of US imports will depend on pricing competitiveness, sources noted, while India’s oil ministry and key fuel retailers have yet to publicly comment on the developments.

title: Former CM Gehlot Expresses Concern Over Lawlessness, Illegal Mining in Rajasthan.
content: Congress leader Ashok Gehlot on Tuesday raised serious concerns about the deteriorating law and order situation in Rajasthan, pointing particularly to illegal sand mining. He urged Chief Minister Bhajanlal Sharma to rely on intelligence reports to assess the ground reality, claiming there is a "powerful nexus from top to bottom" enabling illegal operations. “Even during our tenure, sand mining posed challenges, but we made efforts to curb it,” he said, adding that frequent attacks on police and threats to those opposing the mining mafia are on the rise. He emphasized that sand is a basic need, and its inflated pricing hurts the poor the most. Gehlot also urged the CM to prioritise addressing these issues. Gehlot further criticized the state’s collapsing administrative machinery, saying people no longer know where to file complaints as redressal systems have eroded. He noted that district collectors rarely hold public hearings, police superintendents remain absent, and night visits to villages have stopped. He called on the government to be accountable and verify public grievances through discreet Intelligence Bureau (IB) inquiries. Gehlot reminded Sharma that he has a rare opportunity as a first-time MLA directly made CM, and should rise above personal interests to deliver good governance. Responding to Gehlot’s remarks, BJP spokesperson Laxmikant Bhardwaj accused the Congress of hypocrisy, stating that the sand mafia flourished during Gehlot's tenure. “Those who allowed illegal mining to thrive are now issuing statements after being voted out,” he said. Bhardwaj asserted that the BJP government is committed to eradicating the mafia networks fostered under Congress rule and demanded an apology from Congress leaders for what he described as a reign of terror inflicted on Rajasthan’s people.

title: Arunachal Pradesh CM Warns of 'Ticking Water Bomb' for India Amid China's Construction of World's Largest Dam Project.
content: Arunachal Pradesh Chief Minister Pema Khandu has expressed serious concern over China’s construction of the world’s largest dam project on the Yarlung Tsangpo river, known as the Brahmaputra in India. Speaking to PTI, he described the dam as a potential “ticking water bomb” that could pose an existential threat to the region, especially since China is not a signatory to any international water-sharing agreements that would require adherence to global norms. Khandu emphasized that, beyond the existing military tensions, the water-related risks from the dam project represent a more significant challenge. He warned that China’s control over the dam could enable it to suddenly release water, which would have devastating consequences for the Siang belt, including the displacement and destruction of property belonging to indigenous communities such as the Adi tribe. The Chief Minister further noted that if China were part of international water treaties, the dam could actually be beneficial by helping to regulate summer floods in Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, and Bangladesh. However, since China is not bound by such agreements, the project remains a critical concern, with potentially severe impacts on livelihoods and human life in the region.

title: Tragic Crash Claims Lives of Two IAF Pilots in Rajasthan's Churu.
content: A Jaguar trainer aircraft of the Indian Air Force (IAF) crashed during a routine training mission in Rajasthan's Churu district on Wednesday afternoon, resulting in the tragic death of both pilots on board. The aircraft went down in an agricultural field near Bhanoda village around 1:25 pm, with no reported damage to civilian property, according to the IAF. A court of inquiry has been constituted to determine the cause of the accident, and the IAF expressed deep condolences to the families affected. This incident follows a similar crash in April involving a two-seater Jaguar aircraft, which went down shortly after takeoff from Jamnagar Airfield during a night mission. In that case, the pilots experienced a technical malfunction mid-flight and ejected to avoid damage to the airfield and nearby areas. Unfortunately, one pilot, Flight Lieutenant Siddharth Yadav, succumbed to injuries from the ejection, while the other pilot was injured but survived. Earlier, in March 2025, an IAF fighter jet crashed during a routine training sortie in Haryana’s Panchkula district. These consecutive incidents highlight ongoing challenges faced during training missions, prompting continued investigations and safety assessments by the Indian Air Force.

title: Christian Horner’s Career Earnings Revealed: How Much Did the Former Red Bull Chief Accumulate?.
content: Christian Horner’s two-decade tenure as Red Bull Racing’s team principal came to an unexpected end on July 9, 2025. Having led the team from its inception, Horner was credited with transforming Red Bull into a dominant force in Formula 1, securing multiple world championships under his guidance. Despite his immense contribution and a statement of gratitude from the company, including praise from CEO Oliver Mintzlaff, off-track controversies and recent team performance issues culminated in his dismissal. Laurent Mekies is reported to be stepping in as interim principal as Red Bull seeks to regain its competitive edge. Throughout his career, Horner amassed an estimated net worth of around $50 million, derived from his substantial salary, bonuses, investments, and real estate holdings. Unlike some of his peers, Horner never held an ownership stake in Red Bull Racing, with his wealth stemming solely from earnings rather than equity. His assets include a multimillion-dollar mansion in Oxfordshire, properties in London and France, and an impressive collection of luxury cars, underscoring his success and lifestyle beyond the racetrack. Horner’s journey from driver to one of Formula 1’s most successful young principals highlights his leadership and strategic acumen. Honored with an OBE and later a CBE for his services to motorsport, his legacy is formidable despite recent setbacks. Now entering a new phase, Horner is well-positioned to leverage his reputation through media, consulting, and investments, while maintaining a family life with wife Geri Halliwell and their children.

title: Akash Deep’s Sister’s Heartfelt Tribute After India Pacer’s Historic Edgbaston Performance: “He May Be Youngest, But Still.
content: India pacer Akash Deep delivered a historic performance at Edgbaston, claiming a remarkable 10-wicket haul to help India secure a landmark victory against England. In an emotional revelation, Akash dedicated this outstanding feat to his sister, Akhand Jyoti, who has been courageously battling cancer for the past two months. Despite his youth and the immense pressure, Akash’s commitment both on and off the field has been unwavering, with his sister expressing immense pride in his accomplishment and his constant support during her treatment. Akash’s mother, Laduma Devi, shared heartfelt memories of his early passion for cricket, despite initial discouragement from her husband, a teacher. She praised Akash’s resilience and determination, emphasizing how he pursued his dreams relentlessly to become a key figure in India’s pace attack. “May you keep taking 10 wickets like this,” she said, reflecting her deep pride and hope for his continued success.Nitesh Kumar Singh, Akash’s brother-in-law, echoed the family’s admiration, highlighting Akash’s sharp intellect and dedication to the sport. He noted that Akash’s consistent performances and disciplined approach, particularly his mastery of swing bowling in overseas conditions, have been crucial in earning him a place in the national team. Having played 8 Tests and claimed 25 wickets, Akash Deep’s rise is a testament to his talent and perseverance amid personal and professional challenges.

title: Shanaya Kapoor and Vikrant Massey on Cultivating Trust for Intimate Scenes in Aankhon Ki Gustaakhiyan: “Driven Actors Committed to Excellence.
content: Shanaya Kapoor, best known as the close friend of Ananya Panday and Suhana Khan and cousin to Janhvi and Khushi Kapoor, is making her acting debut with Santosh Singh’s upcoming film Aankhon Ki Gustaakhiyan. Starring opposite Vikrant Massey, the film showcases a unique story where Vikrant plays a visually impaired musician, and Shanaya portrays a blindfolded theatre artist. The trailer has already generated significant buzz, with many praising the palpable chemistry between the two leads, sparking curiosity about how they developed such a strong on-screen connection. In a recent interview with Filmygyan, Shanaya and Vikrant shared insights into the process of building trust and comfort while filming intimate scenes. Vikrant explained that their bond grew over time, fueled by shared experiences both on and off set. He emphasized how discovering their similarities as individuals, beyond their roles as actors, helped foster a deep trust essential for portraying vulnerability, especially given the challenges of performing blindfolded scenes. Shanaya echoed this sentiment, highlighting their shared hunger and commitment to delivering their best performances. with Aankhon Ki Gustaakhiyan set to release on July 11, anticipation is mounting among audiences eager to witness this fresh pairing on the big screen. The film’s compelling narrative and the genuine rapport between Shanaya Kapoor and Vikrant Massey promise a captivating experience, further amplified by the emotional depth and authenticity they bring to their respective roles.

title: Strong earthquake tremors recorded in Delhi-NCR; epicenter identified in Haryana’s Jhajjar.
content: Strong earthquake tremors were felt across Delhi-NCR, prompting residents in Delhi, Noida, and Gurugram to rush out of buildings and homes in alarm. Fortunately, no casualties or property damage have been reported so far. The tremors extended beyond the national capital, affecting areas such as Ghaziabad, Faridabad, parts of Rajasthan, and Uttar Pradesh, with many expressing their fear on social media as the jolts even caused cupboards to shake open. Eyewitnesses described the intensity of the quake as frightening, with one in Delhi sharing that the tremors were so strong his vehicle shook, while another in Ghaziabad likened the experience to someone physically shaking the shop he was inside. This follows a similar incident on February 17, when a 4.0 magnitude earthquake struck with its epicenter in south Delhi’s Dhaula Kuan, underscoring the region's vulnerability to seismic activity. Data from the National Centre for Seismology reveals that between 1993 and 2025, the area around Dhaula Kuan has recorded 446 earthquakes, ranging from magnitudes 1.1 to 4.6, highlighting the high seismic risk. Classified under seismic zone IV (severe) by the Bureau of Indian Standards, Delhi-NCR experiences frequent tremors due to multiple active fault lines, including Sohna, Mathura, and Delhi-Moradabad, along with Haryana’s seven fault lines. The region’s proximity to the seismically active Himalayan belt further contributes to the likelihood of aftershocks, emphasizing the need for preparedness.

title: Shubman Gill Set to Shatter Four of Don Bradman’s Nearly Century-Old Records, Surpassing Kohli and Gavaskar.
content: India captain Shubman Gill has made a remarkable start to the Anderson-Tendulkar Trophy against England, amassing 585 runs in the first two Tests, including a monumental 430 runs at Edgbaston. His innings of 269 and 161 not only helped India level the series but also shattered several records, such as surpassing Virat Kohli’s highest runs by an Indian captain in a Test innings and Sunil Gavaskar’s record for most runs by an Indian in a single Test. Additionally, Gill became the first Asian captain to score a double century in SENA countries and the only player worldwide to register both a double century and a 150 in the same Test match. With three Tests still remaining, Gill is poised to rewrite cricket history by challenging at least four world records held by the legendary Don Bradman that have stood for nearly a century. Among these is the record for the highest number of runs in a single Test series—Bradman’s 974 runs during the 1930 Ashes. Although Gill currently trails by 390 runs, his impressive form and momentum make this seemingly unbreakable record a realistic target. One of the most immediate milestones within Gill’s reach is Bradman’s record of 810 runs scored as captain in the 1936-37 Ashes series, which was Bradman’s first as captain. Gill is only 225 runs short of this tally and is on course to surpass it in his own debut series as Test skipper. Bradman had scored three centuries and averaged 90 in that series, and with Gill already having three centuries, he is demonstrating the kind of consistency and excellence needed to match and potentially exceed the Australian great’s achievements.

title: Pakistani actress Humaira Asghar Ali found dead in her Karachi apartment.
content: Pakistani actress and model Humaira Asghar Ali was found dead in her Karachi apartment in the Defence Housing Authority (DHA) Phase VI on Tuesday, July 8. Her body, discovered by police in a decomposed state, is believed to have been there for nearly two weeks. The discovery followed a complaint from her landlord regarding unpaid rent and unsuccessful attempts to contact her. Upon receiving a court order, police forced entry into the locked apartment, which emitted a strong foul odor. confirmed that the apartment was locked from the inside, with no immediate signs of foul play at the scene. Forensic experts collected evidence, and Humaira’s body was taken to the Jinnah Postgraduate Medical Centre (JPMC) for further examination. Dr. Summaiya Syed, a police surgeon, noted the advanced decomposition and stated that the cause of death remains undetermined pending the postmortem report. The police are actively investigating and attempting to trace her relatives through her mobile phone records. Humaira had been living alone in the rented apartment and was reportedly several months behind on rent payments. She was known for her work in ARY’s reality show Tamasha Ghar and the 2015 film Jalaibee. Beyond acting and modeling, Humaira identified as a theatre artist, painter, sculptor, and fitness enthusiast, with a significant social media presence boasting over 713,000 followers. Her last Instagram post, dated September 30, 2024, featured a series of candid photographs.

title: The Great Indian Kapil Show S3 Sees Viewership Drop After Salman Khan Episode; Ranbir Kapoor Episode Remains Most Watched.
content: Season 3 of The Great Indian Kapil Show premiered on Netflix with much fanfare, featuring Salman Khan as the guest promoting his film Sikandar. The opening episode garnered impressive numbers, ranking 7th in the Global Top 10 Non-English Shows category with 1.6 million views and 1.9 million viewing hours. This surpassed the Season 2 premiere with Alia Bhatt but fell short of Season 1’s debut episode featuring Ranbir Kapoor, which had 2.4 million views. Since the initial episode, however, viewership has seen a steady decline. The second episode, featuring the cast of Metro In Dino, delivered a cumulative 2 million views and 4.5 million viewing hours across the first two episodes. The third episode, which included cricketers Gautam Gambhir, Rishabh Pant, and Yuzvendra Chahal, recorded a further dip with 1.2 million cumulative views and 3.7 million viewing hours. Despite the downward trend in viewership, The Great Indian Kapil Show remains a prominent platform for celebrity promotions and is the only Indian show consistently featured in Netflix’s Top 10. Upcoming episodes are set to include notable guests such as Jaideep Ahlawat, Vijay Varma, Pratik Gandhi, and Jitendra Kumar. Since its debut in 2024, the show has released two seasons with 13 episodes each, maintaining a strong presence in the Indian entertainment space.

title: Priyanka Chopra Becomes First Woman to Feature on Esquire India Cover – A Celebration of a Global Icon’s Influence.
content: Priyanka Chopra Jonas has made history by becoming the first woman to appear on the cover of Esquire India, marking a significant milestone for both the actress and the publication. This achievement highlights her status as a global icon who has consistently pushed boundaries throughout her career. From winning Miss World 2000 to establishing herself as a leading figure in Hollywood, Priyanka’s journey reflects her exceptional talent and unwavering ambition. Beyond her success on screen, Priyanka’s influence extends into various fields. She is a global ambassador for Bvlgari, a regular presence at the MET Gala, and frequently named among TIME’s 100 Most Influential People and Forbes’ Most Powerful Women. Her work as an entrepreneur, philanthropist, and advocate for gender and racial equality further demonstrates her multifaceted impact on both the entertainment industry and society at large. This Esquire India cover is more than just a personal achievement for Priyanka Chopra Jonas—it symbolizes progress in representation within South Asian and global media. The magazine emphasizes that while she is the first woman to grace the cover, the goal is to ensure she will never be the last, cementing her legacy of breaking barriers one historic moment at a time.

title: Is Asim Munir Set to Succeed Asif Ali Zardari as Pakistan President? Government Issues Official Statement.
content: Speculation has been circulating on social media suggesting that Pakistan’s army chief, Field Marshal Asim Munir, might replace President Asif Ali Zardari. However, the Pakistani government strongly denied these rumors on Thursday, describing them as part of a “malicious campaign.” Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi stated that the government is fully aware of those behind this misinformation and emphasized that no discussions or plans exist regarding President Zardari’s resignation or any aspirations from the army chief to assume the presidency. Naqvi further highlighted the strong and respectful relationship between President Zardari and the armed forces’ leadership, quoting the president as acknowledging knowledge about who is spreading these falsehoods and their motives. He underscored that Field Marshal Asim Munir remains focused solely on Pakistan’s strength and stability, dismissing the rumors as baseless and warning those involved that the government will take all necessary measures to safeguard the country’s interests. Asim Munir was appointed army chief in 2022 with a three-year tenure, later extended to five years, and was promoted to the rank of field marshal in recognition of his role during recent hostilities with India—a rare honor in Pakistan’s history. Meanwhile, President Zardari, elected last year for a five-year term as part of a political arrangement supporting Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, continues to maintain good relations with the military establishment. His son, Bilawal Bhutto Zardari, also holds the trust of powerful circles, demonstrated by his leading diplomatic efforts regarding the recent India-Pakistan conflict.

title: Streaming service cancellations like Netflix and Prime Video may soon become more complicated – here’s what you need to know.
content: A recent decision by a US federal appeals court could make it more difficult for consumers to cancel streaming services such as Netflix and Prime Video. The court struck down the Federal Trade Commission’s (FTC) proposed ‘click to cancel’ rule, which aimed to ensure that canceling subscriptions would be as simple as signing up. This rule also sought to require clear consumer consent before converting free trials into paid plans and to mandate transparency about when promotional pricing ends. The FTC had planned to implement the rule as part of broader consumer protection measures on July 14, but the court ruled that the agency failed to conduct a necessary economic impact analysis. As a result, streaming platforms are not currently obligated to maintain easy cancellation processes, leaving open the possibility that companies could introduce more complicated cancellation steps. In fact, some platforms have already made cancellations cumbersome, with investigations revealing that Amazon Prime Video required multiple clicks and decisions just to cancel, leading to ongoing legal action by the FTC. For subscribers, the ability to cancel and resume services easily is crucial for managing rising entertainment expenses. According to Deloitte, the average US household spends about $61 per month on streaming services. If cancellation processes become more difficult, users may lose flexibility and risk paying for services they no longer use, potentially increasing financial burdens.

title: State-level tennis player Radhika Yadav tragically shot dead by her father in Gurugram.
content: Radhika Yadav, a 25-year-old state-level tennis player from Gurugram, Haryana, was tragically shot dead by her father on Thursday. The incident occurred around 10:30 am at their family residence in Sector 57. Preliminary reports suggest the confrontation began over a disagreement related to a social media video reel that Radhika had posted, which reportedly angered her father, leading him to use his licensed revolver to fire three shots at her. Radhika was immediately rushed to a private hospital in critical condition but unfortunately succumbed to her injuries during treatment. Authorities recovered the licensed firearm from the scene. According to Sandeep Kumar, the public relations officer of Gurugram Police, the tension in the household was directly linked to the social media post, which triggered the violent reaction from the father. Police confirmed the details after receiving information from the hospital and statements from family members. Radhika Yadav was a promising athlete with an International Tennis Federation (ITF) doubles ranking of 113. Born on March 23, 2000, she was ranked among the top 200 doubles players globally. In a separate incident reported recently from Gurugram, a 30-year-old man allegedly strangled his wife following a domestic dispute in Rajendra Park, highlighting ongoing concerns around domestic violence in the area.

title: "Gunshots Fired at Kapil Sharma’s New Canada Café; Suspected Khalistani Terrorist Involved.
content: Gunshots were reportedly fired at comedian Kapil Sharma’s newly launched café in Surrey, Canada, creating a wave of concern among fans and locals. The incident occurred at Sharma’s newly opened eatery, where at least nine rounds were discharged, according to media reports. No injuries were reported in the attack, but the incident has raised serious questions about security and the involvement of extremist elements. The gunfire caused panic in the area, though authorities have confirmed that no staff or customers were harmed. Khalistani terrorist Harjeet Singh Laddi has allegedly claimed responsibility for the shooting, as per an NDTV report. Law enforcement agencies in Canada are currently investigating the matter, while security around high-profile Indian establishments has been heightened.

title: "Dubai Welcomes Its First AI-Run Restaurant.
content: A new restaurant in Dubai is preparing to revolutionize the culinary scene with the help of artificial intelligence. Set to open in September near the iconic Burj Khalifa, WOOHOO brands itself as “dining in the future,” where the menu, ambience, and service are crafted by an AI-powered chef named Chef Aiman. While human chefs will handle the actual food preparation, the AI system will drive creative direction based on global food science and culinary traditions. Chef Aiman—an AI large-language model whose name combines "AI" and "man"—has been trained on decades of food research, molecular flavor profiles, and over a thousand international recipes. It generates unique ingredient and flavor combinations by breaking cuisine down into sensory elements like umami, acidity, and texture. These concepts are then refined by human chefs, led by acclaimed Dubai-based chef Reif Othman, whose tasting feedback helps fine-tune the AI's culinary creativity. According to WOOHOO co-founder and Gastronaut CEO Ahmet Oytun Cakir, the aim is not to replace chefs but to enhance their innovation and sustainability practices. Chef Aiman is also designed to reduce kitchen waste by reusing commonly discarded ingredients such as fat and meat trimmings. In the future, the team envisions licensing Aiman to restaurants worldwide to promote eco-conscious dining and elevate global culinary standards.

title: "Priyanka Chopra Reminisces About Fashion and Co-Star Kangana Ranaut; Fans Urge ‘Come Back, PC!.
content: A recent viral video of Priyanka Chopra Jonas reminiscing about her early career has stirred a wave of nostalgia among fans. Long before she became a global icon, Priyanka was known for her remarkable performances in Indian cinema. One such standout role was in Madhur Bhandarkar’s 2008 film Fashion, where she portrayed Meghna Mathur a small-town girl who rises to fame in the modeling industry. The film remains one of her most celebrated performances and showcased her versatility as an actress. In a recent conversation with Vogue, Priyanka reflected warmly on Fashion, calling it a pivotal moment in her career. Recalling her early years in Bollywood, she described the film as one of her first female-led projects. “I had only been in films for about four years, so I was nervous,” she shared. “I worked on it for six months. My co-stars, Mugdha Godse and Kangana Ranaut, are incredibly talented actors. Kangana even won the National Award along with me for this film.” Priyanka also recalled the unique details that made the film iconic—including the staggering number of costume changes. “I had about 110 or 120 outfit changes because it depicted a model’s life, and that became a big talking point at the time,” she noted with a smile. Her heartfelt reflections not only highlight how Fashion shaped her career but also rekindled admiration from fans who now hope for her retur

title: "What You Didn't Know About Plastic Surgery: Doctor Busts 8 Major Myths.
content: Plastic and cosmetic surgery are often confused, but they serve distinct purposes. While cosmetic procedures are typically elective and aim to enhance appearance, plastic surgery encompasses a broader spectrum, including medically necessary reconstructive treatments. Dr. Anmol Chugh, Associate Director at the Plastics and Aesthetics Centre, CK Birla Hospital, explains that plastic surgery plays a crucial role in restoring function and improving quality of life. Procedures like burn reconstruction, cleft lip and palate repair, and post-mastectomy breast reconstruction highlight the medical significance of this specialty. Contrary to popular belief, most patients are everyday individuals—not celebrities—seeking relief from discomfort or restoration of form and function. There are several persistent myths surrounding plastic surgery, many of which are addressed by Dr. Chugh. One misconception is that results always look artificial. In reality, when performed by board-certified surgeons using modern techniques, plastic surgery can yield highly natural-looking outcomes by enhancing a person’s existing features. Like any surgery, it carries risks such as infection, scarring, and anesthesia-related complications. Recovery often involves temporary pain, swelling, and bruising. However, these are manageable with proper care, realistic expectations, and open communication with qualified medical professionals. The field is also becoming more inclusive, with growing numbers of men seeking surgical and non-surgical procedures. Popular treatments include rhinoplasty, liposuction, gynecomastia correction, and hair transplants. Despite the rise of minimally invasive options, Dr. Chugh warns against unqualified practitioners, as even non-surgical treatments can cause serious side effects. He emphasizes that surgery is not a shortcut to health—patients must adopt sustainable habits like regular exercise, balanced nutrition, and skincare to maintain results. Ultimately, plastic surgery should complement, not replace, a healthy lifestyle.

title: Sanjay Dutt Critiques Bollywood’s Lack of Passion for Cinema, Contrasts It with South Indian Film Industry’s Dedication Beyond Money.
content: While promoting his upcoming Kannada film KD The Devil in Mumbai, Sanjay Dutt opened up about his growing involvement in South Indian cinema. At an event in Mumbai alongside co-stars Shilpa Shetty and Dhruva Sarja, he shared why he is now choosing to work more in southern film industries than in Bollywood. Sanjay expressed that Bollywood has lost its passion for filmmaking, emphasizing that “everything is about numbers” there, whereas South Indian cinema still prioritizes the passion to create meaningful films. Sanjay also spoke warmly about his experience working with Prabhas in the upcoming film The Raja Saab, mentioning that he is learning Telugu for the project. He described Prabhas as a wonderful person and a great actor who generously looks after him. Additionally, Sanjay expressed admiration for Chiranjeevi, highlighting their close relationship, and referred to Nagarjuna and Ram Pothineni as close friends and talented colleagues. Addressing the delay in his entry into South Indian films, Sanjay candidly noted that it took time because he was not initially invited to work there. He humorously remarked, “You call me, I’ll come,” indicating his openness to more opportunities in the Southern film industries going forward.

title: R Ashwin Slams England’s Tactics: Urges India to ‘Roll Them Out in First Session’ as Bazball Gives Way to ‘Prankball.
content: Ravichandran Ashwin has urged India to bowl England out as quickly as possible to seize control of the match. While experts view the Day 1 scoreline at the 3rd Test between India and England at Lord’s as evenly poised, Ashwin believes the home team holds a slight advantage. England abandoned their aggressive Bazball approach, opting instead for a more cautious and traditional Test batting style. Despite this shift, the Indian bowlers kept England under pressure, adding a new dimension of excitement to the contest. Ashwin praised England captain Joe Root for his crucial innings, highlighting Root’s consistent performance against India. Root scored a half-century in the second innings at Leeds and continued his strong form in this match, reaching 3,000 runs against India and nearing his eighth Test century at Lord’s. His partnership with captain Ben Stokes, which added 79 runs for the fifth wicket, helped England finish Day 1 at 251/4. Reflecting on England’s change in strategy, Ashwin remarked that the team surprised everyone by abandoning their usual high-scoring Bazball style in favor of a more measured approach he dubbed “Prankball.” England’s run rate slowed to around three runs per over, a notable departure from their typical 4 to 4.5 runs per over. Ashwin emphasized the importance of Root’s innings, calling it a lesson in classical Test batting and affirming that “Root is back.”

title: Gautam Gambhir Responds to Strict BCCI Policy Criticized by Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma: ‘This Is Not a Holiday.
content: Gautam Gambhir recently addressed the controversial BCCI policy that has drawn criticism from prominent Indian players like Virat Kohli and Rohit Sharma. Following India’s 1-3 loss in Australia, the BCCI introduced strict regulations, including limits on family travel, personal staff, and mandatory participation in domestic cricket. This move surprised many, with Kohli and Rohit even returning to play for their state teams after a long hiatus. The restrictions on family presence during tours became a particularly sensitive issue, sparking discontent among players. Gambhir, who faced backlash for his perceived association with the policy, clarified his stance, emphasizing the importance of maintaining focus during tours. Speaking to Cheteshwar Pujara ahead of the 3rd Test against England, he acknowledged that while family support is valuable, players must prioritize their primary responsibility—to represent the country with dedication. He stated, “You are here for a purpose. It’s not a holiday,” underscoring that commitment to the nation’s cause should outweigh other concerns during demanding tours. Virat Kohli also expressed his disappointment with the restrictions, highlighting the emotional grounding that family presence provides amid the pressures of international cricket. Speaking at the IPL’s Indian Sports Summit, Kohli remarked on the lack of understanding about the importance of family support, criticizing the narrative that players should be kept away from their loved ones. Both Gambhir and Kohli’s remarks reflect the ongoing tension between strict team protocols and players’ personal needs.

title: Alia Bhatt’s Former Assistant Allegedly Leaked Confidential Production House Data to Foreign Entity.
content: The investigation into financial fraud involving Alia Bhatt’s former personal assistant, Archana Shetty, has intensified with new allegations. Juhu Police sources revealed that Shetty allegedly leaked confidential information from Bhatt’s production house, Eternal Sunshine Productions, to an unidentified individual in the United States. The leaked data reportedly includes sensitive business documents, financial reports, and unreleased project details. Authorities are currently probing the motive behind the leak, suspecting potential financial gain or misuse of proprietary content. In addition to data leakage, Shetty faces accusations of transferring large sums from Alia Bhatt’s personal and company-linked accounts to multiple individuals, including Satvik Sahu, Simi John, Shashank Pandey, Chandni Jitendra Prasad Dixit, and Manish Sukhij. The pattern of these transactions suggests an attempt to conceal embezzlement through various accounts. Shetty is also alleged to have made unauthorized purchases on behalf of Eternal Sunshine Productions, including high-value electronics like iPhones and iPads, which were reportedly delivered to addresses not connected to the company. The Juhu Police have registered a case under sections related to criminal breach of trust and cheating and are collaborating with cybercrime experts to trace the leaked information and identify the US-based recipient. The involvement of foreign entities has added complexity to the investigation, prompting coordination with international authorities. Alia Bhatt and Eternal Sunshine Productions have not issued any official statements regarding the breach, and the investigation is ongoing.

title: Kapil Sharma’s The Kap’s Cafe Responds to Canada Shooting Incident: “We Remain Unwavering.
content: Comedian-actor Kapil Sharma’s newly launched eatery in Canada, The Kap’s Cafe, faced a distressing incident when multiple gunshots were fired at the café’s exterior around midnight on July 9, just days after its opening. A video capturing the event quickly circulated online, raising concerns among fans and the local community about the safety of the establishment. In response, the official Instagram account of The Kap’s Cafe shared a heartfelt statement expressing both sorrow and determination. They emphasized their original vision of creating a welcoming space filled with warmth, community, and joy through great coffee and conversation, and acknowledged how deeply upsetting it is that violence has disrupted this dream. Despite the shock, the team affirmed their commitment to persevere. The message also conveyed gratitude for the overwhelming support received from followers and patrons. They thanked everyone for their kind words, prayers, and shared memories, highlighting that the café exists because of the community’s belief in their mission. The statement concluded with a call to stand united against violence and a hopeful note to see everyone again soon under safer and better circumstances.

title: Sidharth Malhotra and Janhvi Kapoor’s August Release Confirmed with Param Sundari Teaser Featuring Maalik; Huma Qureshi’s Baby Do Die Do Promo Launches in Cinemas.
content: In early June 2025, Bollywood Hungama first reported that Dinesh Vijan of Maddock Films was considering postponing the release of his upcoming romantic drama, Param Sundari, from July 25 to August 29. As the original release date approached without any promotional activity, it became evident that the Sidharth Malhotra-Janhvi Kapoor starrer would not hit theaters as planned. Yesterday, Maddock Films officially confirmed the delay in a unique manner by attaching the updated Param Sundari teaser with the prints of Maalik, which released on July 11. The revised teaser replaced “This July” with “This August,” removing the specific July 25 date and instead stating “In cinemas worldwide this August. ”This change has sparked speculation about the exact release date of Param Sundari. According to a trade insider, August 29 is the likely date, as it fits the calendar without clashing with major releases like War 2 and Coolie, which have already secured the earlier August slots. The source noted that if the film were set for August 1, promotional and distribution activities would have likely begun by now, which they have not. While waiting for an official announcement, the industry seems to anticipate the film’s release at the end of the month. Alongside Param Sundari, audiences watching Maalik also got a glimpse of the teaser for Baby Do Die Do, produced by Huma Qureshi and Saqib Saleem under the Saleem Siblings banner. The one-minute teaser highlights Huma Qureshi’s character as the “1st desi female assassin” and includes Sikandar Kher’s voiceover. The teaser concludes with the tagline “Badi story, badi screen pe, coming soon, baby!” Recently, Huma Qureshi and Saqib Saleem shared on Instagram that the Baby Do Die Do teaser is currently exclusive to cinema screenings, with the first 5,000 fans joining their broadcast channel gaining early digital access before the wider release.

title: Co-actor reveals: Radhika said her father liked the song and deactivated Instagram following the music video release.
content: Inam-ul-Haq, the actor who worked with tennis player Radhika Yadav on a music video, revealed that Radhika’s mother accompanied her on the day of the shoot. He also stated that Radhika mentioned her father liked the song, indicating that she had his approval for the project. Radhika Yadav was tragically killed after allegedly being shot four times by her father, Deepak Yadav, at their Gurugram residence. The music video featuring Radhika and Inam-ul-Haq gained widespread attention following her death, with some reports suggesting that her father had objections to it. However, no official confirmation has emerged linking the video to tensions within the family. Addressing the speculation, Inam-ul-Haq affirmed that Radhika was involved in the project with her father’s consent. He told news agency ANI, “She (Radhika) came to the shooting with her mother. On the set, she also mentioned that her father liked the song, which means she took permission from her father.”

title: Shabana Azmi shares a heartwarming moment of Farhan Akhtar and Javed Akhtar enjoying ice creams together in London.
content: Actor Shabana Azmi and her husband, lyricist Javed Akhtar, recently visited London. During their trip, Javed’s son, actor Farhan Akhtar, joined them for an outing, creating a special family moment. Shabana Azmi shared a candid photo on Instagram capturing Javed and Farhan seated outdoors at a restaurant. The two were facing each other, enjoying ice creams together in a relaxed setting. In the picture, Javed is seen savoring his ice cream while Farhan smiles as he takes a spoonful from his cup. The image beautifully captures a warm and casual break during their time in London.

title: Actor Sunita Rajwar faces backlash and receives abusive messages on Instagram over her comment about pregnant Khushboo in Panchayat Season 4.
content: Actor Sunita Rajwar has received widespread appreciation for her performance in Panchayat Season 4. However, she has also faced significant backlash for a particular scene in the series. In the show, her character, Kranti Devi, engages in a confrontation with Khushboo, played by Tripti Sahu. This scene, which also involves the deputy pradhan Prahlad Cha, portrayed by Faisal Malik, has sparked controversy among some viewers. Sunita shared that she has been receiving harsh criticism and abusive messages from people upset by her character’s remarks toward the pregnant Khushboo. She expressed surprise at the intensity of the reaction, highlighting the challenges actors face when portraying

title: India on a swift path to becoming the world’s third-largest economy: PM Modi.
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi emphasized that India is swiftly progressing toward becoming the world’s third-largest economy, with significant advancements across various sectors over the past 11 years. Speaking at the 16th Rozgar Mela, he highlighted the manufacturing sector as one of the nation's key strengths, noting the government’s active efforts to enhance employment opportunities, particularly in the private sector. To further boost job creation, the government recently introduced the Employment Linked Incentive scheme, which offers ₹15,000 to youth securing their first private-sector job. With a budget allocation of around ₹1 lakh crore, this initiative aims to generate approximately 3.5 crore new jobs. Additionally, the government has launched Mission Manufacturing and reinforced the Make in India campaign to stimulate growth and employment within the manufacturing industry. The Prime Minister also pointed out the remarkable expansion in electronics, mobile phone production, and defence manufacturing. From just a handful of mobile phone units earlier, the number has surged to 300, employing thousands of young people. The Production Linked Incentive (PLI) scheme alone has created 11 lakh jobs, with the electronics sector now manufacturing goods worth ₹11 lakh crore—reflecting a more than fivefold growth in just over a decade.

title: IIM-Calcutta Student Allegedly Assaulted in Boys’ Hostel; Accused Issued Threats: What We Know So Far.
content: A female student at the Indian Institute of Management-Calcutta (IIM-C) has alleged that she was sexually assaulted by a fellow student inside the boys' hostel on campus. She reported the incident to the Haridevpur Police Station on Friday evening, leading to the registration of a case and the subsequent arrest of the accused. According to her statement, she was invited to the hostel for a counseling session, during which she consumed a drink she believes was spiked, causing her to lose consciousness. Upon waking, she discovered that she had been assaulted. The accused reportedly threatened her against reporting the incident. The investigation is currently ongoing. This incident follows a recent case at a law college in Kolkata, where a 24-year-old first-year student was gang-raped on June 25 by a former student along with two senior students on college premises. The case sparked widespread outrage and calls for a central agency investigation. So far, four individuals, including the prime accused Monojit Mishra, two senior students, and a security guard, have been arrested. The victim alleged that the assault occurred inside the security guard’s room between 7:30 pm and 10:50 pm. The Calcutta High Court has directed the Kolkata Police to submit an updated investigation report within four weeks. Both incidents have intensified concerns about campus safety and the measures institutions must take to protect students. Authorities continue to investigate and provide updates as the cases progress.

title: Sunil Gavaskar Addresses Gill vs Umpire Ball-Change Controversy, Criticizes British Media: “If This Had Happened in India.
content: Indian cricket legend Sunil Gavaskar came to the defense of the Indian team amid criticism from the British media regarding the repeated requests to change the Dukes ball during Day 2 of the ongoing third Test between India and England at Lord’s. The Indian captain, Shubman Gill, was seen approaching the umpires multiple times to have the ball inspected, as concerns arose over its condition. Gavaskar pointed out that the ball appeared to be much older than its stated usage and suggested that if a similar situation occurred in India, the British media would likely have reacted more strongly. Former England captain Nasser Hussain also weighed in on the controversy during a Sky Sports broadcast, acknowledging that there is a genuine issue with the Dukes ball, which had been changed twice during the session. However, he criticized the frequency of ball changes, suggesting that cricket has become too fixated on maintaining a “perfect” ball for extended periods. Hussain emphasized that in cricket’s traditional context, the ball naturally wears out, making batting easier as the match progresses, and praised the early bowling performance of Jasprit Bumrah with the Dukes ball. Despite the interruptions caused by ball changes, only 75 overs were bowled on Day 2, with a total of 22 overs lost over the first two days of the Test. India also lost two wickets in the final session, including a missed opportunity by Karun Nair, who could not build on a promising start. The ongoing debate highlights concerns over the ball’s condition and its impact on the pace and flow of the game.

title: New Financial Misconduct Allegation Surfaces Against HDFC Bank CEO.
content: The Economic Offences Wing (EOW) of Nagpur police has launched an investigation into allegations of financial misconduct involving senior officials of HDFC Bank, including its Managing Director and CEO, Sashidhar Jagdishan. The probe centers on claims that approximately ₹6 crore was siphoned off from the account of Narendra Singru, a trader based in Nagpur. According to a complaint filed by Singru’s lawyer, Ashutosh Ranjan, the Dhantoli branch of HDFC Bank had accepted a ₹6 crore bond from Singru nearly three years ago and invested the funds in overseas entities, including firms based in Bahrain. The complaint asserts that the bank failed to disclose the associated risks of these investments and ultimately depleted the account balance to zero without informing Singru. Ranjan described the incident as a deliberate financial fraud, alleging the bank intentionally drained the funds without warning the account holder about the risks involved. He has called for stringent action against those responsible within the bank to ensure accountability and justice.

title: Pooja Hegde Dazzles in Red in ‘Monica’ Song from Rajinikanth’s Coolie  Watch Now
content: The much-anticipated Rajinikanth starrer Coolie has thrilled fans with the release of its second single, ‘Monica.’ Featuring the stunning Pooja Hegde in a vibrant red outfit, the high-energy dance number has quickly captured attention on social media, praised for its dazzling visuals and catchy choreography. Sharing her excitement on Instagram, Hegde expressed her enthusiasm, which was met with an outpouring of positive reactions and admiration from fans. Directed by Lokesh Kanagaraj and produced by Sun Pictures under Kalanithi Maran’s banner, Coolie promises to be a high-octane Tamil-language action thriller. The film boasts an impressive ensemble cast, including legends such as Rajinikanth, Nagarjuna, Upendra, and Sathyaraj, alongside Shruti Haasan, Reba Monica John, and a special cameo by Aamir Khan. With such a star-studded lineup, Coolie is already one of the most eagerly awaited films of 2025. The soundtrack, composed by the acclaimed Anirudh Ravichander, has received considerable acclaim, with ‘Monica’ standing out for its infectious beats and dynamic arrangement. The track features lyrics by Vishnu Edavan, energetic vocals by Subhlakshmi and Anirudh Ravichander, and a spirited rap segment by Asal Kolaar, complementing Pooja Hegde’s electrifying performance and adding to the song’s overall appeal.

title: Jackson Wang Lights Up The Great Indian Kapil Show with K-Pop Flair, Bhangra Beats, and Festive Garba Energy.
content: In a standout moment from The Great Indian Kapil Show Season 3, global K-pop star Jackson Wang made a surprise appearance, blending musical worlds in an episode that instantly captivated audiences. On his second trip to India, Jackson expressed his love for the show and left fans thrilled with a live rendition of his song ‘GBAD’. The evening featured an engaging cultural exchange: Jackson taught his signature K-pop move to Kapil Sharma and celebrity guests, while they introduced him to Garba and Bhangra which he performed with remarkable ease and enthusiasm. With poetic welcomes, spontaneous dance-offs, and a celebration of global unity, this episode stands out as a historic moment for TGIKS. Streaming this Saturday on Netflix.

title: Shah Rukh Khan and Ranveer Singh Celebrate Anant Ambani and Radhika Merchant’s 1st Wedding Anniversary with Heartfelt Posts – Watch Now.
content: It’s hard to believe that a year has already passed since the grand wedding celebration of Anant Ambani and Radhika Merchant. The lavish three-day event brought together some of Bollywood’s biggest stars, creating unforgettable memories that continue to resonate. To mark this special milestone, actors Shah Rukh Khan and Ranveer Singh took to social media to extend their warm wishes to the couple. Both shared heartfelt posts on Instagram, accompanied by beautiful photos from the wedding festivities. Shah Rukh Khan posted a striking black-and-white image of Anant and Radhika from the celebrations, writing, “Wishing this beautiful couple a very happy anniversary… here’s to many more years of togetherness… Wishing you love and health always. Love you both.”

title: R Madhavan on On-Screen Chemistry: ‘For Me, Falling in Love with My Heroine Is Essential.
content: R Madhavan recently spoke about the significance of chemistry in romantic films, emphasizing how the connection with his co-star begins from their very first meeting. Reflecting on his experience working with Fatima Sana Shaikh for Aap Jaisa Koi, he described a natural and unspoken comfort that developed instantly during their initial interaction, which he believes is essential for authentic on-screen chemistry. Madhavan highlighted that this connection cannot be scripted, making the first encounter a moment of truth in any romantic film. In an interview with Filmfare, Madhavan explained that for him, the foundation of genuine chemistry is respect, which he considers the highest form of love. He recounted how Fatima’s ease and respect during their first meeting created an instinctive bond, allowing their characters’ relationship to resonate with sincerity. According to him, falling in love with his heroine in this respectful, natural way is crucial to delivering believable romantic performances. In Aap Jaisa Koi, Madhavan plays Shrenu Tripathi, a man navigating life and love in his 40s, while Fatima Sana Shaikh portrays Madhu Bose. Together, they bring to life a touching story about companionship and balanced love found unexpectedly. The film, which explores themes of respect and emotional connection, is currently available for streaming on Netflix.

title: PM Modi asked, ‘Should I speak in Marathi?’: Rajya Sabha nominee Ujjwal Nikam recalls conversation with the Prime Minister.
content: Ujjwal Deorao Nikam, renowned for his role as the public prosecutor in the 26/11 Mumbai terror attacks case, has been nominated to the Rajya Sabha by President Droupadi Murmu, as confirmed by a notification from the Ministry of Home Affairs.
