title: Delhi Protest Erupts Over Unnao Rape Bail, Family Demands Justice.
content: Demonstrators Oppose Court’s Bail Order A large crowd gathered outside the Delhi High Court on Friday. Protesters raised slogans and demanded that the court cancel the bail granted to expelled BJP leader Kuldeep Singh Sengar. The court suspended his life sentence earlier this week; consequently, public anger grew rapidly. As a result, the protest intensified near the court premises. Survivor and Family Voice Deep Concerns The Unnao rape survivor said she felt “extremely unsafe” after hearing about the bail. She also expressed disappointment with the order. Meanwhile, her mother strongly opposed the decision and announced that the family would move the Supreme Court. Additionally, security personnel urged protesters to disperse and warned them of possible legal action. Activists Raise Questions About the Decision Women’s rights activist Yogita Bhayana joined the protest and said women across India felt hurt by the suspension of a convicted rapist’s sentence. Furthermore, several protesters questioned why the court granted bail despite Sengar’s 2019 conviction for raping a minor. They argued that such decisions weaken trust in the justice system and, moreover, threaten women’s safety. Family Demands Stronger Protection The survivor recalled earlier threats and mentioned the 2019 accident in which her relatives and lawyer died. Because of these past incidents, she said Sengar’s influence still frightens her. She currently receives CRPF protection; however, her mother stated that earlier security for her children was withdrawn. Therefore, the family wants the judiciary to review the bail order and ensure stronger protection.er women across the country.

title: Max Amini on India Visit: There Is No Place Like India.
content: Max Amini India Visit Starts as a Tour, Becomes a Personal Journey Iranian comedian-actor Max Amini’s India visit turned into an unexpectedly emotional experience that went far beyond his packed shows. Speaking to Zoom Chronicle, Amini said that the heart of India revealed itself through the people he met and the energy he felt throughout his journey. He explained that the most surprising part of his India visit was the calm attitude of people even in chaotic situations. “One of the most powerful things about people here is that you don’t take everything so seriously. Even in chaos, someone says, ‘Don’t worry about it.’ That philosophy is beautiful,” he shared. For him, this spirit captures the uniqueness of the Max Amini India visit experience. Dharavi Experience Becomes the Soul of His India Visit During the Max Amini India visit, the comedian insisted on exploring the realities of Mumbai rather than polished tourist attractions. His deeply emotional experience came during his visit to Dharavi, where he interacted with underprivileged children. “I told my friend I don’t want to see nice things, I want to go to the slums,” he said. The poverty he witnessed shocked him, but the dignity of the children touched him more. Unlike many places he had visited, the children waited calmly, showing patience and peace. “I’ve seen poverty in many parts of the world, but here the children were peaceful. That really moved me,” he added. This moment became one of the defining memories of the Max Amini India visit. Connecting With Anupam Kher Adds Depth to His India Visit Another highlight of the Max Amini India visit was his meeting with veteran actor Anupam Kher. During his performances in Mumbai and Delhi, Amini also explored the artistic culture of India by attending theatre shows and visiting Kher’s acting school. “Anupam sir is like a child on stage—alive and present. When people share honesty and generosity, conversations flow endlessly,” he said. This bond added a creative dimension to the Max Amini India visit, making it a journey of artistry and reflection. Acceptance and Generosity Define Max Amini’s India Visit Takeaway Reflecting on the entire Max Amini India visit, the comedian said he is leaving with lessons in acceptance, optimism and generosity. He admired India’s unity despite its vast cultural and linguistic diversity. “You can be from anywhere and follow different beliefs, and yet there’s acceptance. You’re Indian first,” he said. Concluding his India visit, Amini shared that happiness comes not from material wealth but from openness and compassion. “You’re lucky to come from a land with this spirit,” he said.

title: Japan Attack: 14 Injured in Stabbing and Chemical Spray.
content: Japan Factory Stabbing Attack Starts Inside Mishima Unit The Japan factory stabbing attack began on Friday afternoon when a knife-carrying man entered a rubber plant in Mishima, Shizuoka Prefecture. As soon as he stepped inside, he stabbed several workers and sprayed an unknown liquid. As a result, panic spread through the building, and many employees rushed out. Soon after, emergency teams received alerts about multiple injuries and possible chemical exposure, which forced them to respond immediately. Emergency Teams Move Fast After Mishima Attack Fire officer Tomoharu Sugiyama confirmed that emergency crews transported fourteen injured workers from the scene of the Mishima attack. According to early updates, nearby units reported that several people suffered stab wounds and irritation from a spray-like substance. Therefore, ambulances reached the factory quickly and shifted six injured workers to hospitals. Doctors treated them for cuts and breathing discomfort linked to the factory knife assault. Even so, all victims stayed conscious, which eased initial fears. Police Detain Suspect Behind Factory Stabbing Police arrived soon after the medical teams and arrested the suspect inside the building. NHK and Kyodo News reported that officers stopped him before he could flee the factory. In addition, investigators collected the knife, the spray device, and liquid samples for testing. A forensic team is examining the substance to check if it contains harmful chemicals. Furthermore, officers are questioning the attacker to understand the motive behind the Japan factory stabbing attack. Investigation Expands as Japan Factory Attack Shocks Community Authorities began interviewing workers and reviewing CCTV footage to map the attacker’s movements. At the same time, the Japan factory attack shocked residents of Mishima, since such violence is rare in the region. Because of this, local officials promised tighter workplace security and routine safety checks. Factory management also pledged full cooperation with investigators. Going forward, officials will release more details after confirming victims’ conditions and identifying the liquid used during the factory stabbing. The incident has renewed concerns about industrial safety and emergency readiness.

title: Gaurav Bhagat Advises Youth: ‘India Is the Best Place to Grow.
content: India Offers Growing Opportunities for Youth With shrinking jobs and AI reshaping industries, young Indians are increasingly concerned about their futures. Entrepreneur and educator Gaurav Bhagat said that India career opportunities are expanding and offer more variety than ever. Speaking at RULE 2026, he encouraged students to explore domestic growth before looking abroad. “India provides immense potential for young talent, but success depends on skills, adaptability, and real-world readiness,” he said, noting that understanding emerging sectors is key to tapping into career opportunities in India. How AI Is Changing Job Roles Bhagat highlighted that artificial intelligence is transforming traditional entry-level jobs and creating new roles. Routine positions are declining, but jobs requiring creativity, problem-solving, and tech literacy are growing. He criticised schools that restrict AI use, calling it counterproductive. “Students who integrate AI tools early can access better professional opportunities in India,” he said. By learning to adapt to AI, young professionals can enhance their career prospects across multiple sectors. Importance of Soft Skills and Confidence Soft skills, Bhagat noted, are crucial for taking full advantage of job opportunities in India. Communication, confidence, and persuasion often determine who succeeds. “Soft skills are essential in every sector, from technology to business,” he said. Many students from tier-two and tier-three cities have ambition but lack exposure. By developing interpersonal and technical skills together, they can broaden their career paths and explore career opportunities in India more effectively. Building a Personal Edge Bhagat concluded with a motivational message: India is a land of opportunity for those willing to innovate and work hard. “Don’t let fear or negative commentary push you abroad unnecessarily,” he said. He urged students to build a personal brand, create content, and showcase skills online. Visibility, credibility, and adaptability are essential for success. By following this approach, young Indians can secure meaningful, rewarding careers while contributing to the country’s growth story.

title: What Is Boxing Day? History, Origin and How December 26 Is Celebrated.
content: Boxing Day History and Global Importance Boxing Day history stretches back centuries, and the day remains one of the most recognized December 26 holidays in many Commonwealth nations. Countries such as the UK, Canada, Australia, and New Zealand observe it as a public holiday, with most offices closed. The day also aligns with Saint Stephen’s Day, a Christian observance that honors the first martyr. Together, these celebrations add cultural and spiritual depth to the post-Christmas period. Origins Behind the Boxing Day Meaning Many theories explain the Boxing Day meaning, but the most accepted one connects it to charity. Wealthy families traditionally prepared boxes filled with food or money and gave them to the poor. Servants, who worked on Christmas Day, celebrated their holiday on December 26 and received “Christmas boxes” from employers. Churches also contributed to Boxing Day history through donation boxes that supported the needy. These early practices shaped the identity of the December 26 holiday long before it became official. Victorian Customs That Defined the Day The Victorian era played a major role in shaping Boxing Day traditions. During Queen Victoria’s reign, families began gifting boxes of leftover food, goods, or small tokens to tradespeople such as postmen and milkmen. These gestures strengthened the link between gratitude and charity. Over time, these customs spread across Commonwealth countries, making Boxing Day an important part of the holiday season. Modern Boxing Day Traditions Worldwide Today, Boxing Day traditions blend charity, celebration, and relaxation. Many people donate to charities, share festive leftovers, enjoy family time, or attend sports events. Football and horse racing hold a special place in several countries. December 26 is also celebrated as Saint Stephen’s Day in Germany, Denmark, Slovakia, the Czech Republic, and Romania. These nations observe their own customs, giving the December 26 holiday a diverse and global character rooted in rich Boxing Day history.

title: Udaipur Rape Case: Female Staff Among 3 Accused, Victim Lured with Ride Home.
content: Udaipur Rape Case Female Employee: Survivor Lured Home The Udaipur rape case female employee has shocked the city after a woman manager accused three colleagues of sexually assaulting her following a company party on December 20. The survivor said a female colleague offered to drop her home after a birthday and year-end celebration at a hotel in Shobhagpura. She trusted the offer, only to find the IT firm’s CEO and the female employee’s husband already in the car. This incident immediately drew police attention and became the focus of the ongoing investigation. Details of the Assault During the Car Ride According to the survivor, the accused stopped at a shop and bought items resembling cigarettes, which she was made to consume. Earlier reports suggested she may have been forced to drink alcohol. She claimed she lost consciousness and, upon regaining it, found all three accused assaulting her despite her attempts to resist. The survivor alleged that she was kept inside the vehicle throughout the night before being dropped home the next morning. Medical Report Confirms Sexual Assault Once home, the survivor experienced severe pain and weakness. She underwent a medical examination at a private hospital, which confirmed signs consistent with sexual assault. She filed a complaint at Sukher police station. Police registered a case under Section 70(1) and other provisions of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita. All three accused—the CEO, the female employee, and her husband—were arrested and sent to four-day police custody. Police continue to investigate the claims in the Udaipur rape case female employee report. Workplace Safety Under Scrutiny After the Incident The incident has raised serious concerns about workplace safety, especially since the IT firm rated itself highly for women-friendliness. Public outrage intensified due to the involvement of a female employee in the alleged crime. Experts say this case highlights the urgent need for safer corporate environments, stricter monitoring of staff behavior, and robust complaint mechanisms to protect employees.

title: India Reaffirms Commitment to Return Fugitives After Mallya Video.
content: India Reaffirms CommitmentNew Delhi: India has reaffirmed its determination to bring fugitives to justice, focusing on Vijay Mallya. This follows a video showing the liquor baron celebrating his 70th birthday with fugitive Lalit Modi. Meanwhile, MEA spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal said on Friday that India is coordinating with multiple countries. He emphasized that the government aims to bring Mallya and other fugitives back to India to face trial. Calls for Swift ReturnUnion Minister of State in the MEA, Kirti Vardhan Singh, recently urged the immediate return of Vijay Mallya. In response, Jaiswal confirmed that authorities are pursuing all international legal channels to ensure Mallya’s extradition. “Our commitment remains firm. Those wanted by Indian law must face justice,” he said. Furthermore, legal processes are already underway, and India is closely monitoring progress abroad. Birthday Video Sparks ControversyA video shared by Lalit Modi on Monday shows Mallya celebrating in London while joking about being India’s “biggest fugitives.” Consequently, public and official calls for Vijay Mallya extradition India have intensified. Previously, the Bombay High Court warned Mallya to return or risk dismissal of his plea against the Fugitive Economic Offenders Act. Additionally, the video reignited debates about accountability for economic offenders. Extradition Efforts Extend Beyond MallyaJaiswal noted that India has successfully extradited individuals accused of terrorism, including Tahawwur Rana from the 2008 Mumbai attacks. “This proves that no one can evade the law,” he said. In addition, ongoing discussions and legal procedures aim to bring Mallya and other fugitives back. Therefore, India continues to signal that fugitives cannot escape justice indefinitely. cannot escape justice indefinitely, reinforcing the importance of the Vijay Mallya extradition India initiative.

title: Tripura Student Killed in Dehradun Attack Over Racial Slurs.
content: Tripura Student Attack Leaves Youth Dead in Dehradun The Tripura student attack took a tragic turn when 24-year-old post-graduate student Angel Chakma died from severe stab injuries on Friday. The assault happened on December 9 near a liquor outlet in Dehradun’s Selaqui area. Students in the region say the Dehradun student stabbing has raised serious questions about campus safety. Many groups believe the Tripura student case exposes deeper issues faced by students from the Northeast. Racial Abuse Adds Urgency to Tripura Student Case Angel’s brother, Michael Chakma, survived the attack and filed the police complaint. He claimed the attackers were drunk and allegedly used racial insults during the confrontation. His statement strengthened the racial angle in this Tripura student case, drawing wider attention to discrimination concerns. Student organisations note similarities between this incident and earlier Northeast student assault cases, arguing that the growing trend of racial attack on student incidents cannot be ignored. Police Make Arrests in Northeast Student Assault; Prime Accused Missing Senior Sub-Inspector Jitendra Kumar confirmed that police arrested five men — Avinash Negi, Shaurya Rajput, Suraj Khwas, Ayush Badoni and Sumit — within days of the assault. These arrests mark progress in the ongoing Northeast student assault investigation. However, the main accused in the Tripura student attack, a Nepal-origin resident of Haridwar, remains missing. Police formed a special team to track him and continue searching multiple locations as part of the larger Dehradun assault case. Public Anger Rises After Dehradun Student Stabbing Angel’s death has sparked strong responses from student groups, community organisations and Northeast associations. Many believe the Tripura student attack shows the urgent need for stronger safety measures in university towns. Representatives from Northeast communities point out that repeated Northeast student assault cases highlight a serious social issue requiring long-term solutions. Police have assured the public they will continue pursuing suspects and share updates as the Dehradun student stabbing inquiry progresses.

title: Happy Birthday Salman Khan: Fitness Secrets Behind His Toned Body at 60.
content: Salman Khan Fitness at 60 Inspires Millions Bollywood superstar Salman Khan fitness at 60 continues to amaze fans as he turned 60 on December 27, 2025. Despite entering a new decade of life, he maintains a strong, toned physique that inspires fitness lovers across generations. Moreover, his routine shows that disciplined habits and consistency can overcome age-related limitations. Therefore, Salman remains one of Bollywood’s most followed fitness icons. High-Intensity Training Drives His Transformation Salman’s trainer, Rakesh Udayar, recently shared insights into the routine that shaped the actor for Sikander. According to him, the Salman Khan fitness at 60 plan depends heavily on high-intensity interval training (HIIT). The actor moves quickly from one exercise to the next, taking only a short walk as rest. This keeps his heart rate high and boosts stamina. In addition, he prefers volume training over heavy lifting, which helps him maintain muscle tone. He also completes fasted cardio daily and never skips weight training, even during hectic shooting schedules. A Protein-Rich Diet Fuels His Strength In terms of food, Salman follows a protein-rich diet that matches his intense training. He eats five small meals a day, starting with porridge, eggs, and fruits. Additionally, his lunch includes simple, home-cooked meals with chicken or fish. Vegetables and salads remain a priority. However, he keeps his calorie intake below 2,000 to stay lean. Before action sequences, he reduces his food intake two months in advance. Although he enjoys cheat meals like biryani, he still maintains balance through mindful eating. Why Salman Remains a Fitness Icon at 60 The essence of Salman Khan fitness at 60 lies in discipline, smart workout planning, and consistent nutrition. His dedication proves that fitness has no age limit when training and diet work together. Finally, his lifestyle continues to motivate fans, athletes, and fitness beginners alike.Note: This article is for informational purposes only. It is not a substitute for medical advice. Please consult a doctor for guidance on diet or exercise.

title: Delhi Police Arrest Hundreds, Seize Pistols Ahead of New Year’s Eve Crackdown.
content: Delhi Police New Year Crackdown Begins Ahead of Festivities The Delhi Police New Year crackdown under Operation Aaghat 3.0 has intensified across the capital as the city prepares for large New Year celebrations. Police arrested 285 people under the Excise Act, NDPS Act and Gambling Act. Moreover, the force aims to stop criminal activity during the festive week, when public movement increases sharply in markets, nightlife zones and crowded public spaces. Major Arrests and Seizures During the Crackdown During the Delhi Police New Year crackdown, officers detained 504 people under preventive measures and arrested 116 individuals marked as “bad characters.” They seized 21 country-made pistols, 20 live cartridges, 27 knives, 12,258 quarters of illicit liquor, 6.01 kg of ganja, ₹2,30,990 in cash, 310 mobile phones, 231 two-wheelers and one four-wheeler.Additionally, DCP South East Hemant Tiwari said his teams monitored hotspots to stop drug peddlers, bootleggers and repeat offenders. He noted that criminal activities often rise before major holidays; therefore, the operation must remain continuous and intense. Enhanced Policing Measures Under the New Year Crackdown Police rounded up 1,306 individuals through night patrols, vehicle checks and targeted raids. Meanwhile, Tiwari stated that the Delhi Police New Year crackdown strengthens community policing and improves ground-level response. Officers blocked high-risk routes, tracked suspicious vehicles and increased their presence in crowded markets and nightlife hubs. Consequently, police believe these steps will deter organised criminal groups active during the New Year period. Operation Aaghat’s Expansion and Ongoing Crackdown Earlier phases of Operation Aaghat also produced major results. In September, officers arrested 70 people and recovered firearms, narcotics and stolen property. Later, Aaghat 2.0 in October added around 500 apprehensions, showing a sustained push against habitual offenders.Finally, with Aaghat 3.0 delivering the highest arrests and recoveries so far, the Delhi Police New Year crackdown reaffirms the force’s commitment to maintaining public safety. Officials said this security efforts will continue through the holiday week to ensure peaceful celebrations across the capital, Zoom Chronicle News reported.

title: New York Lawyer Sues IRS to Recognize Her Dog as a Dependent: Legal Battle Over Pet Tax Claims.
content: Lawyer Sues IRS Dog Over Tax ClaimA New York City attorney, Amanda Reynolds, has filed a lawsuit seeking to claim her dog as a dependent on her federal taxes. In this case, the lawyer sues IRS dog to gain official recognition for her 8-year-old golden retriever, Finnegan Mary Reynolds. She argues that Finnegan relies entirely on her and meets the support requirements under Section 152 of the Internal Revenue Code. Moreover, Reynolds emphasizes that her dog is like a daughter and deserves similar recognition under tax law. Pet Care Expenses Support DependencyReynolds spends over $5,000 each year on Finnegan. The expenses include food, housing, veterinary care, grooming, transportation, daycare, and boarding. She stresses that these costs show her dog is fully integrated into her household. Furthermore, the lawsuit highlights many pet owners who spend heavily on animals but receive no tax relief. Reynolds states, “For all intents and purposes, Finnegan is like a daughter, and is definitely a ‘dependent.’” By pursuing this case, she demonstrates how pets could be considered dependents. IRS Rules Limit Non-Human DependentsThe IRS currently classifies animals as property, so pets cannot qualify as dependents. Dependency applies only to children, relatives, or other qualifying individuals who meet income, residency, and support requirements. While the IRS allows deductions for certain service animals, companion pets receive no similar benefits. Reynolds argues this distinction is unfair. She claims it may violate the Equal Protection Clause of the 14th Amendment. Legal experts note that although the lawsuit is unusual, it challenges long-standing tax interpretations. This case marks one of the first where a lawyer sues IRS dog for dependent recognition. Relief Sought and Wider ImplicationsReynolds asks the court to amend Section 152 to allow dogs as non-human dependents. Alternatively, she requests the IRS create criteria for evaluating individual cases. She also aims to represent other dog owners whose pet care spending exceeds thresholds but receives no tax recognition. So far, the IRS has not responded publicly. If successful, the case could reshape household recognition of pets. Moreover, it may spark nationwide debate about whether pets can qualify as legal dependents, making the issue of lawyer sues IRS dog widely discussed.

title: Israel Recognizes Somaliland as Independent State: Historic First.
content: Historic Recognition by Israel Zoom Chronicle – December 27, 2025: In a historic move, Israel recognizes Somaliland as an “independent and sovereign state.” The Israeli government announced it will open embassies and appoint ambassadors. Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu said the decision marks a milestone in Israel’s foreign policy. President Abdirahman Mohamed Abdullahi of Somaliland welcomed the recognition, calling it the start of a “strategic partnership” and a major step toward global legitimacy. With this move, Israel’s recognition of Somaliland makes it the first country in the world to formally acknowledge the republic’s independence. About Somaliland Somaliland, located in the Horn of Africa along the Gulf of Aden, declared independence from Somalia in 1991. It has its own currency, passports, armed forces, and government institutions. Despite functioning autonomously for decades, Somaliland had remained largely unrecognized internationally. The announcement that Israel recognizes Somaliland has boosted its international profile. Several countries, including the UK, Ethiopia, Turkey, UAE, Denmark, Kenya, and Taiwan, maintain liaison offices in Somaliland but had not officially recognized it before Israel’s historic move. Global Reactions The declaration that Israel recognizes Somaliland triggered strong reactions across the globe. Somalia and the African Union (AU) condemned the recognition, insisting Somaliland remains part of Somalia. Egypt, Turkey, and the Palestinian Authority also opposed Israel’s recognition of Somaliland, citing risks to regional stability. The AU warned that this recognition could “set a dangerous precedent” affecting peace across Africa. Analysts noted that Israel’s recognition of Somaliland may encourage other countries to consider similar diplomatic moves. Diplomatic and Strategic Implications Israel’s recognition of Somaliland aligns with its Abraham Accords strategy, which previously formalized ties with the UAE, Bahrain, and Morocco. Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa’ar confirmed full diplomatic relations, including embassies and ambassadors. Netanyahu expressed pride and said he would convey Abdullahi’s interest in joining the Abraham Accords. With this decision, Israel’s recognition of Somaliland strengthens its strategic influence in the Horn of Africa. Other global powers, including the United States, have not yet recognized Somaliland, leaving its international status largely contested.n.

title: Dhaka Capitals Coach Dies After Sudden Collapse at Sylhet Stadium Before BPL Match.
content: Dhaka Capitals Coach Death Shocks BPL Fans The Dhaka Capitals coach death stunned players and fans on Saturday evening. Assistant coach Mahbub Ali Zaki, 59, collapsed during the warm-up at Sylhet International Cricket Stadium. The collapse took place only minutes before the team’s BPL match against the Rajshahi Warriors. Team doctors reacted immediately and began CPR on the field. They moved him to Al Haramain Hospital soon after. However, doctors declared him dead on arrival. BCB chief physician Debashish Chowdhury later confirmed the tragic news and said Zaki had shown no earlier health issues. League Reacts to the Sudden Loss The sudden loss shook the BPL community. Players from Sylhet Titans, Noakhali Express, and Chattogram Royals reached the hospital within minutes. Meanwhile, both teams at the venue observed a minute of silence during the innings break. The Bangladesh Cricket Board posted a message of grief on X. The board praised Zaki’s service and called him a key figure in fast-bowling development. Dhaka Capitals also shared a tribute on Instagram. Many players expressed sadness and described the Dhaka Capitals coach death as a huge loss to Bangladesh cricket. Zaki’s Journey and Coaching Impact Before the tragic incident, Zaki enjoyed a long career in domestic cricket. He played for Comilla District in the National Cricket Championship and also represented Abahani and Dhanmondi in the Dhaka Premier League. Later, he turned to coaching and joined the BCB High Performance Unit in 2008. Over the years, he trained many upcoming fast bowlers. He also guided Taskin Ahmed during the 2016 T20 World Cup when the bowler faced action-related scrutiny. His calm nature, technical skill, and focus on discipline earned respect across generations. His students said the Dhaka Capitals coach death has left a deep personal void. A Lasting Legacy in Bangladesh Cricket The tragedy continues to cast a shadow over the BPL. Players, coaches, and fans have shared messages remembering Zaki’s guidance and leadership. His commitment to developing fast bowlers shaped Bangladesh’s pace attack over the last decade. Teams are expected to honour him in upcoming matches. Supporters say his teachings will continue to inspire future players. As the league moves forward, the Dhaka Capitals coach death will remain a painful moment in the season and a major loss for Bangladesh cricket.

title: Allu Arjun and Security Team Named Among 23 Accused in Pushpa 2 Stampede Case Charge Sheet.
content: Actor and Security Team Listed in Charge Sheet The Hyderabad Police filed a charge sheet in the Pushpa 2 stampede case, naming 23 accused, including Allu Arjun and his security team. The police listed the theatre management as the prime accused, while Allu Arjun appears as Accused No. 11. The incident took place at Sandhya Theatre, Chikkadpally, during the film’s premiere on December 4, 2024. A 35-year-old woman died, and her eight-year-old son suffered injuries after a sudden crowd rush to see the actor. Police Findings and Legal Action Investigators found several errors in the theatre’s crowd management plan. They said the staff failed to control the heavy rush of fans and did not place enough security personnel at the venue. The police arrested Allu Arjun on December 13, 2024, after initial inquiries. The Telangana High Court granted him interim bail the next day and later approved his regular bail. Based on a complaint filed by the victim’s family, the police also booked his security staff under multiple sections of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS). How the Stampede Occurred The stampede began when fans pushed toward the entrance as Allu Arjun reached the theatre for the premiere. Many people lost balance in the rush. The victim and her child were caught in the crowd movement. Her family blamed the theatre staff and the actor’s private security team for poor planning and limited safety arrangements. The police supported parts of this claim and pointed to missing barricades, poor coordination, and a lack of controlled entry points. Support for Victim’s Family and Next Steps After the tragedy, Allu Arjun and the Pushpa 2 production team offered financial help to the family. The Telangana government also announced compensation. Even with this support, the legal case continues, and the court will now examine evidence from the charge sheet. The next phase of the trial will focus on responsibility, planning failures, and accountability for the woman’s death. The filing of the charge sheet marks an important step in the ongoing case and sets the stage for further hearings.

title: Guatemala Bus Accident: At Least 15 Killed After Vehicle Plunges into Deep Gorge.
content: Bus Falls into Gorge Amid Heavy Fogs A major road tragedy struck western Guatemala on Saturday, killing 15 passengers and injuring 19 others. The crash occurred on the Inter-American Highway in Sololá, between kilometres 172 and 174. The area often experiences dense fog, and as a result, visibility drops sharply for drivers. Soon after the accident, rescue teams arrived at the remote location and began climbing down the steep ravine where the bus had fallen. Firefighters Race to Save Survivors Local firefighters reached the crash site quickly; moreover, they faced extremely challenging terrain. “Fifteen people have died in this traffic accident — 11 men, three women and a minor,” spokesperson Leandro Amado said. He added that the bus appeared to lose control before plunging into the gorge. Although the slope was dangerous, first responders continued their efforts without pause. Consequently, they managed to bring several injured passengers out of the ravine faster than expected. Nineteen People Sustain Serious Injuries Hospitals in the region treated 19 injured passengers soon after they arrived. Many suffered fractures and trauma; however, doctors said most of them remain stable. Amado also noted that around 19 firefighters took part in the operation. They relied on ropes, stretchers, and climbing gear to reach the victims safely. Additionally, photographs shared by the fire department showed the bus crushed at the bottom of the gorge. These images further demonstrated the intensity of the rescue mission and the dangerous conditions firefighters faced. Investigators Examine Safety Issues Authorities have now opened an investigation into the cause of the accident. Early reports suggest that fog, sharp curves, and reduced visibility may have contributed to the tragedy. Moreover, the Sololá region has a history of similar incidents due to its narrow and winding mountain roads. Therefore, officials are likely to consider stronger safety measures, including better warning signs and speed controls. Families have begun identifying victims, and meanwhile, the government is preparing detailed reports on the crash. This devastating incident has reignited concerns about road safety in Guatemala’s highland regions. As the investigation continues, authorities hope to introduce measures that will prevent similar tragedies on the country’s most dangerous routes.

title: EC Releases Assam Draft Electoral Rolls After SIR; 10.5 Lakh Voters Removed in Major Cleanup.
content: EC Publishes Assam Draft Rolls After Special Revision The Election Commission of India released Assam’s draft electoral rolls after a Special Revision exercise. The state now has 2,51,09,754 registered voters. The rolls exclude 93,021 D-voters, whose citizenship status is pending verification. The revision comes ahead of the Assembly polls, which are less than six months away. Officials carried out the verification from November 22 to December 20. Over 10.56 Lakh Names Removed for Death, Migration, or Duplication EC officials removed 10,56,291 names from the voter list. They deleted 4,78,992 names of deceased voters. Another 5,23,680 voters had shifted to new locations. Officials also identified 53,619 duplicate entries during the door-to-door checks. These deletions aim to produce a clean and accurate electoral roll. The draft rolls now reflect updated household data from more than 61 lakh homes across the state. Who Are D-Voters in Assam? D-voters remain a sensitive category in the state. These voters face doubts about their citizenship under the Foreigners Act, 1946. Special tribunals mark these individuals as “D”, and they cannot receive voter ID cards until they clear their cases. The draft rolls carry their details forward without any changes. This measure ensures transparency and avoids errors during legal scrutiny. Assam Prepares for Error-Free Rolls Before February A large team managed the revision exercise. It included 35 District Election Officers, 126 Electoral Registration Officers, 1,260 Assistant EROs, 29,656 Booth Level Officers, and 2,578 supervisors. Political parties also joined the process through 61,533 Booth Level Agents. Citizens can file claims and objections until January 22. The EC will publish the final rolls on February 10. The exercise aims to include all eligible voters, correct clerical mistakes, and remove invalid entries. After rationalisation, Assam now has 31,486 polling stations, setting the stage for a smooth electoral process in 2025.

title: Pakistan Loses 5,000 Doctors & 11,000 Engineers as Netizens Mock Asim Munir’s ‘Brain Gain’ Claim.
content: Mass Exodus of Doctors and EngineersPakistan faces a major outflow of skilled professionals due to economic instability and political uncertainty. Over 5,000 doctors, 11,000 engineers, and 13,000 accountants have left the country in the past two years. By November 2025, 687,246 Pakistanis had already gone abroad, according to The Express Tribune. Experts warn this migration could harm the healthcare, technology, and financial sectors. Public Backlash Over ‘Brain Gain’ RemarksThe departures drew sharp criticism online, especially toward Pakistan Army Chief General Asim Munir. He called the migration a “brain gain,” but social media users ridiculed this view. Many argue that losing trained doctors and engineers contradicts the claim. Migration now includes tech professionals, accountants, and other specialists, not just low-skilled laborers. Digital Barriers Drive Tech Professionals AbroadConnectivity problems worsen the migration trend. The rollout of a national internet firewall and frequent disruptions in 2024–25 created obstacles for tech workers. “Economic instability, low wages, and limited career opportunities push skilled workers abroad,” said Dr. Noman Ahmed, CEO of Sai Global. Overseas jobs offer better pay, structured careers, and improved living standards. Healthcare Sector Suffers MostThe healthcare sector is hit hardest. Nurse migration surged 2,144% from 2011 to 2024, and the trend continues. Experts warn that without strategies to retain talent or attract professionals from abroad, Pakistan risks losing not just workers but also innovation and patents. The latest numbers highlight an urgent need for reforms to reverse the brain drain.

title: Delhi Chokes as Dense Fog and Low Winds Push AQI Near ‘Severe’ Mark; GRAP Curbs Stay Unchanged.
content: Delhi AQI Near Severe as Fog and Low Winds Trap Pollution Dense fog and slow wind movement pushed the Delhi AQI near severe levels on Sunday morning, worsening visibility and trapping pollutants across the capital. According to CPCB’s Sameer app, Delhi’s air quality stood at 391 at 6:05 am, placing the region close to the AQI severe level. The IMD also issued a yellow alert as fog combined with cold wave–like conditions intensified discomfort for residents and hindered dispersion of pollutants. Delhi Air Quality Worsens Across Major Stations Several pollution hotspots showed sharp deterioration, keeping the Delhi AQI near severe territory in many areas. Out of 39 active monitoring stations, 20 registered “severe” air quality, including Anand Vihar, Jahangirpuri, Chandni Chowk, Shadipur and Wazirpur. Other regions remained in the “very poor” category, while only NSIT Dwarka reported a “poor” AQI of 214. These readings highlight how sensitive air quality in Delhi becomes during winter when emissions combine with stagnant weather. Weather Conditions Keep AQI Near Severe Levels Experts say weak wind speeds were the main reason behind rising pollution and the Delhi AQI near severe threshold. Winds hovered around 4–5 kmph for most of Saturday, preventing pollutant dispersal. Brief afternoon improvement faded quickly as winds dropped again by evening. AQEWS forecasts suggest that Delhi air quality will stay in the “very poor” category for several days, with fog and low temperatures continuing to trap particulate matter close to the ground. GRAP Restrictions Unchanged Despite Rising Pollution Despite the Delhi AQI near severe mark in several locations, authorities have not reinstated Stage IV restrictions under the Graded Response Action Plan. Stages I to III remain in place, and officials will reassess air quality trends in the coming days. Experts stress the need for long-term solutions, including cleaner transport, industrial regulation and consistent monitoring. Without sustained action, Delhi pollution episodes may continue to intensify each winter.

title: American Man Stunned by Blinkit’s Lightning-Fast 6-Minute Delivery in Delhi.
content: Blinkit 6-Minute Delivery in Delhi Goes Viral An American man living in South Delhi went viral after sharing a video of Blinkit 6-minute delivery in Delhi. Charlie Evans posted the clip on Instagram to show friends in the U.S. how fast India’s quick-commerce services operate. He began recording at 5:43 pm while ordering essentials. Moreover, Evans described Blinkit as a “one-stop shop” for last-minute needs, emphasizing its lightning-fast delivery. Consequently, the video quickly grabbed attention online and sparked discussions about India’s rapid delivery culture. Delivery Partners Navigate Delhi’s Lanes During Blinkit 6-Minute Delivery While waiting, Evans spoke about the challenges delivery partners face. Riders often reach their destinations quickly; however, finding the right building in crowded areas can be difficult. He expressed sympathy, noting how tricky it is to navigate narrow lanes and apartment layouts. Additionally, he highlighted the effort behind Blinkit 6-minute delivery in Delhi. This insight made viewers appreciate not just the speed but also the skill of delivery personnel managing urban logistics efficiently. Six-Minute Blinkit Delivery Amazes American Customer The order arrived at 5:49 pm—just six minutes after being placed. Evans looked surprised, especially since he had ordered water and a screwdriver. He added overlay text saying “Blinkit delivery supreme,” while the caption read “Blinkit is god.” Therefore, viewers worldwide praised Blinkit 6-minute delivery in Delhi and called India’s quick-commerce services “next level.” Meanwhile, others compared it to slower apps abroad. Many noted that this speed demonstrates how lightning-fast Blinkit delivery is changing urban shopping in major cities. Social Media Reacts to Blinkit 6-Minute Delivery in Delhi After Evans shared the video, social media users reacted with excitement and concern. Several praised the fast delivery, while others emphasized the importance of fair pay and rider safety. Nevertheless, most agreed that the clip highlighted India’s innovative quick-commerce sector. Consequently, the viral video reinforced India’s global reputation for Blinkit 6-minute delivery in Delhi and encouraged discussions about the future of instant urban deliveries.

title: Odisha Identifies Three New Gold Mines With 1,586 Kg Estimated Reserves | Major Boost for India’s Mineral Sector.
content: Odisha Gold Mines Discovery Confirmed in Three Districts The Odisha gold mines discovery has strengthened the state’s position as a major mineral hub. Officials have identified new gold-bearing blocks in Deogarh, Keonjhar and Gajipur districts. According to steel and mines minister Bibhuti Bhushan Jena, these locations together hold an estimated 1,586 kilograms of gold. Moreover, the government will begin the next stage of exploration soon. A meeting on January 3 will decide the plan for auctioning the blocks, ensuring a clear and transparent process. This early assessment supports Odisha’s long-term mining strategy and increases interest among potential investors. Odisha Gold Mines Exploration and Auction Plans Jena said the state aims to speed up surveys and streamline decisions. As a result, the Odisha gold mines discovery is expected to receive priority during upcoming auctions. Odisha already plays a major role in India’s mineral economy with iron ore, chromite, manganese and bauxite production. Therefore, the newly identified gold reserves add a fresh layer of strategic value. Officials believe the discovery, though moderate in size, can attract new industries and strengthen the state’s mineral identity. The government also plans to ensure transparency, faster approvals and strict environmental compliance. Odisha Mineral Discovery Expands Critical Resource Base In addition to the Odisha gold mines discovery, the state holds several minerals essential for clean energy and modern technologies. These include graphite, copper, nickel, titanium, vanadium, silver and rare earth elements. Graphite deposits appear in Kalahandi, Rayagada, Bolangir, Nayagarh and Deogarh. Furthermore, key deposits such as Lamer-Panga, Naringpanga, Rengali and Tamiya fall under G2 and G3 exploration stages. These levels show moderate geological confidence, yet they signal strong opportunities for expansion. As demand rises for battery materials and renewable-energy minerals, Odisha is gradually becoming an important centre for future industrial development. Growth Expected From Odisha Gold Mines Development Officials emphasize that systematic exploration, efficient auctions and sustainable mining will support Odisha’s economic growth. Additionally, the government aims to balance mineral extraction with environmental protection and local employment. The Odisha gold mines discovery further diversifies the state’s mineral base and creates space for long-term investments. Consequently, mining activities may boost revenue, improve infrastructure and generate widespread economic benefits. Although the gold reserve is not large by global standards, it holds strategic importance for India. Overall, Odisha expects the new

title: Tej Pratap Yadav Says, ‘I Am in Danger’, Seeks Security in Letter to Bihar Home Minister.
content: JJD Chief Seeks Protection After Threats The Tej Pratap security threat has prompted the JJD chief to write to Bihar Home Minister Samrat Chaudhary. He stated, “I am in danger, that’s why I have requested protection.” Additionally, he filed a complaint at the Secretariat police station in Patna. As a result, authorities are reviewing the matter to ensure his safety. Observers noted that rising tensions within the JJD may have escalated the security threat. Furthermore, Tej Pratap informed reporters about the urgency of the issue and requested immediate government action. Accusations Against Former Party Spokesperson The JJD leader accused Santosh Renu Yadav, the former national spokesperson, of threatening him. Consequently, the Tej Pratap security threat became a major concern. The letter alleged that Santosh engaged in extortion and intimidated citizens. Following this, the JJD Central Disciplinary Committee expelled him on December 14, 2025 (Expulsion Letter No. 37/JJD/2025). Officials said the expulsion reinforced the need to provide adequate protection to Tej Pratap. In addition, the threats reportedly spread fear among party members and supporters. Social Media Escalates Concerns Even after suspension, Santosh continued issuing death threats via live videos on Facebook and YouTube. Therefore, the security threat against Tej Pratap remained significant. He urged authorities to act promptly to prevent harm. Moreover, the complaint highlighted the growing risk of online harassment for political leaders. In the meantime, Tej Pratap requested that social media threats be monitored closely to reduce future risks. Bihar Government Prepares Response Officials confirmed that the Home Minister is reviewing the Tej Pratap security threat complaint. Likewise, security arrangements are expected soon. Observers said the case underscores the importance of timely action in political security threats. Meanwhile, Tej Pratap’s request highlights the need to protect leaders from ongoing online intimidation. Ultimately, the government is expected to provide proper security measures to prevent escalation. Additionally, authorities noted that ensuring political safety will maintain public confidence in Bihar’s administration.

title: Osman Hadi Death: 2 Main Suspects Flee to India via Meghalaya, Dhaka Police Investigate.
content: Osman Hadi Murder Suspects Flee Abroad Two Osman Hadi murder suspects, Faisal Karim Masud and Alamgir Sheikh, fled to India through the Haluaghat border in Mymensingh. Osman Hadi, a prominent student leader and independent candidate from Dhaka-8, was shot in the head on December 12 during his election campaign in Bijoynagar, central Dhaka. Authorities flew him to Singapore for treatment, but he succumbed to his injuries on December 18. The attack sparked nationwide protests and political unrest across Bangladesh. Flight of Osman Hadi Murder Suspects to Meghalaya Dhaka Metropolitan Police (DMP) confirmed that the Osman Hadi murder suspects reached Meghalaya with help from local associates. DMP Additional Commissioner SN Nazrul Islam said a local named Purti received them, and a taxi driver named Sami transported them to Tura city. Meanwhile, Indian authorities have detained the two individuals who assisted the Osman Hadi murder suspects. Police continue to coordinate with Indian officials to ensure their capture and extradition. Osman Hadi’s Political Role Hadi played a key role in Inqilab Manch, which gained prominence during last year’s July uprising in Bangladesh. The party opposes Sheikh Hasina’s ruling government. At the time of the attack, Hadi campaigned as an independent candidate for the February elections. His murder intensified political tensions, and citizens demanded swift justice. The flight of the Osman Hadi murder suspects further fueled public anger and media attention. In addition, political analysts warned that unresolved cases like this could worsen unrest. Ongoing Investigation and Cross-Border Efforts Dhaka Police are actively working with Indian authorities to apprehend the Osman Hadi murder suspects. Officials confirmed ongoing communication through formal and informal channels to ensure quick action. Hadi’s death remains a critical issue, highlighting political unrest and the need for strong cross-border cooperation in high-profile criminal cases. Authorities are closely monitoring developments and continue updating the public on the investigation.

title: War Has Started, go to the Bunkers’: Pakistan President Zardari Recalls High-Level Alert During Operation Sindoor.
content: Zardari Refused Bunker Advice Pakistan President Asif Ali Zardari revealed that during Operation Sindoor, his Military Secretary urgently advised him to move into a bunker for safety as Indian precision strikes began. He said the officer warned him, “Sir, the war has started,” but he refused, stating that leaders must stand firm during national crises. His remarks have added momentum to the growing Operation Sindoor Pakistan reaction, especially as Pakistan had initially downplayed the impact of India’s strikes. India’s Precision Strikes Sparked Strong Reaction Operation Sindoor, conducted by India from May 7 to May 10, targeted terror infrastructure and strategic military sites across Pakistan and Pakistan-occupied Jammu & Kashmir (PoJK). Zardari said he had anticipated rising tensions even before the operation began, yet chose not to enter the bunker despite the warning. His disclosure has intensified the Operation Sindoor Pakistan reaction, revealing that Pakistan’s top leadership expected significant escalation but chose to keep it contained publicly. Pakistan Confirms Damage to Air Base Pakistan’s Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Ishaq Dar added further weight to the Operation Sindoor Pakistan reaction by admitting that Indian drone strikes caused notable damage. He confirmed that India sent around 80 drones in just 36 hours, and one drone struck the Nur Khan Air Base in Rawalpindi. The attack injured military personnel and damaged infrastructure, contradicting Pakistan’s earlier claims of minimal or no impact from Operation Sindoor. India Claims Major Aerial Success India’s Air Chief Marshal AP Singh said the Indian Air Force downed six Pakistani aircraft during the operation. The downed aircraft reportedly included five fighter jets and one AEW&C surveillance aircraft. These claims, combined with statements from Zardari and Dar, show that Pakistan suffered significant military setbacks. As the Operation Sindoor Pakistan reaction continues to dominate discussions, Zardari’s statement — “Leaders don’t die in bunkers” — has become one of the defining quotes of the four-day confrontation.

title: Nagin 7 Twitter Review: Priyanka & Eisha Shine, VFX Impress Fans.
content: Naagin 7 Premiere Receives Strong Fan Response Ektaa Kapoor’s much-awaited supernatural drama Naagin 7 premiered on December 27 and immediately captured the attention of viewers across social media. Fans, who eagerly awaited the new season, quickly shared their reactions and praised the show for its fresh energy. The premiere episode aired on Colors TV and JioHotstar, and it introduced the impressive cast, which includes Priyanka Chahar Choudhary, Eisha Singh, Namik Paul, Karan Kundrra, Alice Kaushik, Ruhi Chaturvedi, and Beena Banerjee. As a result, the opening episode set a strong tone for a gripping storyline and a visually richer season. Fans Highlight the ‘Film-Like VFX’ and Technical Excellence Viewers immediately noticed the upgraded visual effects, and many admired the show’s new cinematic quality. They wrote that the VFX team delivered “movie-level visuals” and raised the overall standard of the franchise. Moreover, fans appreciated the powerful background score, sharper editing, and better color grading, all of which strengthened the storytelling. Ektaa Kapoor’s earlier hint about a Naagin-versus-dragons conflict added even more excitement, and fans responded positively to the world-building shown in the premiere. Consequently, the technical team received widespread appreciation. Priyanka Chahar Choudhary and Eisha Singh Impress Viewers The performances of the lead actresses dominated social media discussions. Priyanka Chahar Choudhary delivered an expressive and emotionally rich portrayal of Purvi, and viewers praised her for creating a believable and heartfelt character. Similarly, Eisha Singh stunned audiences with her glamorous and fierce entry as Ananta. Many fans described her introduction as “one of the most memorable in the Naagin series.” Additionally, viewers complimented the entire cast for contributing meaningfully to the episode’s pace and clarity, and they expressed that the premiere exceeded expectations. Tejaswi Prakash’s Cameo Adds Nostalgia and Excitement Tejaswi Prakash’s surprise cameo created an enthusiastic wave of nostalgia among dedicated fans. Her brief return as Pratha felt powerful and beautifully nostalgic, and many viewers said her presence still carries unmatched charm. Furthermore, several fans referred to her as the “forever Naagin,” noting that her appearance elevated the emotional impact of the first episode. With strong performances, richer VFX, and an engaging storyline, Naagin 7 has started its journey with remarkable momentum. If this response continues, the season will likely remain one of the most talked-about chapters in the franchise.

title: Ex-Googlers’ New AI Startup Soars to $100 Million After Closing $2M Business.
content: Ex-Googlers AI Startup Takes a Bold Turn The Ex-Googlers AI startup began with a major decision by former Google engineers Dhruv Amin and Marcus Lowe. They shut down Create, a profitable platform earning more than $2 million a year. After ChatGPT launched in late 2022, the founders noticed a sharp rise in AI capability. They realised that artificial intelligence might soon automate large parts of coding. This shift led them to rethink their future and rebuild an entirely new AI-driven venture. Why the Former Google AI Venture Closed Its Profitable Model The rise of generative AI made the founders question the long-term sustainability of Create. Large-scale automation meant developer marketplaces could lose relevance. After months of evaluation, they decided to shut down the business in October 2023. Half of their small team was laid off, and partnerships with freelance developers ended. This difficult move allowed the Google-engineers’ AI platform to prepare for the next era of software creation rather than remain tied to an outdated model. How the Google-Engineers’ AI Platform Was Rebuilt After closing Create, the founders worked on new AI tools that could automatically generate app components. Their successful early tests encouraged them to expand further. In April 2025, they launched a platform able to build full online businesses, including backend systems and payments, without coding. The company rebranded as Anything and gained strong traction immediately. Within two weeks, the AI startup by ex-Googlers reached a $2 million annualised revenue run rate, proving that their shift toward AI automation was timely and strategic. A Rapidly Growing Future for the Ex-Googlers AI Startup Today, the platform helps non-technical users build practical apps, including AI hairstylist tools and oral health trackers. The founders believe the AI development space is still in its early stages, offering many opportunities. With an impressive valuation of around $100 million after an $11 million funding round, the Ex-Googlers AI startup continues to grow steadily. Their journey reflects the value of adaptation, courage and long-term thinking. As they scale their AI platform, they aim to lead the next generation of software creation — Zoom Chronicle News.

title: Elon Musk Slams Canadian Healthcare After Indian-Origin Man’s Death, Calls It ‘As Good as DMV.
content: Musk Slams Canadian Healthcare Over Tragic Death Billionaire Elon Musk slammed the Canadian healthcare system after Indian-origin man Prashant Sreekumar died waiting for emergency care. Sreekumar, 44, suffered severe chest pain at work and was rushed to Grey Nuns Community Hospital in Edmonton. Staff reportedly asked him to wait for hours despite repeated complaints. His father recalled that Sreekumar told him, “Papa, I cannot bear the pain.” Musk’s criticism has sparked global outrage and highlighted inefficiencies in Canada’s government-run healthcare system. Key Criticism: Musk Slams Canadian Healthcare Musk reacted to reports that Sreekumar’s wife was told she was “being rude” while pleading for help. On X (formerly Twitter), Musk wrote, “When the government does medical care, it is about as good as the DMV.” His statement compared Canada’s healthcare delays to the notoriously slow Department of Motor Vehicles in the U.S. Social media users widely shared Musk’s critique, calling it a reflection of long-standing ER delays and overcrowding in Canadian hospitals. Family and Community Demand Accountability Sreekumar, a father of three, continued to experience worsening chest pain while waiting to see a doctor. His death shocked the local Indian-origin community and raised urgent questions about Canada’s public healthcare services. Health experts said such delays are avoidable with proper triage, staffing, and management. Musk’s comments have brought renewed focus to the need for reforms in Canada’s emergency healthcare system. MEA Seeks Answers From Canadian Authorities India’s Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) confirmed Sreekumar was a Canadian citizen of Indian origin and said Canada must take responsibility. MEA spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal called the incident “unfortunate” and confirmed that the Indian consulate is providing assistance to the family. Authorities are coordinating with local hospitals to investigate the delays. Musk’s criticism has amplified global attention, adding pressure on Canadian authorities to improve emergency care and prevent similar tragedies.

title: Arshad Warsi Reveals Differences Between Shah Rukh Khan and Salman Khan: Gentleman vs Bad Boy.
content: Bollywood’s Iconic SuperstarsFew friendships and rivalries in Bollywood are as legendary as that of Shah Rukh Khan and Salman Khan. Both have ruled the silver screen for decades, but their off-screen personalities often leave fans intrigued. Actor Arshad Warsi, who has worked with both in films like Maine Pyaar Kyun Kiya and Kuchh Meetha Ho Jaye, recently shared his thoughts on the Shah Rukh Salman differences in an exclusive interview. Shah Rukh Khan: The Polite GentlemanWarsi praised Shah Rukh Khan for his professionalism and humility. “Shah Rukh knows his work and has that old-school theatre vibe. He memorizes all his lines and always delivers with dedication. I have never seen him raise his voice. I agreed to be part of King within seconds because of him. Shah Rukh has said he is the last of the stars, and I completely believe him. I love him; big fan. Even Suhana and Aaryan have been raised wonderfully,” he said. Salman Khan: The Fun-Loving Bad BoyIn contrast, Warsi described Salman Khan as a good-looking, fun-loving “bad boy.” “Salman is different personally. Publicly, he has a strong aura, but at home, he cracks jokes and keeps everyone laughing. His family also has a great sense of humor—they clearly know how to enjoy life. Observing the Shah Rukh Salman differences, it’s clear both have unique qualities that fans admire,” Warsi explained. Upcoming Projects for the SuperstarsLooking ahead, Arshad Warsi will reunite with Shah Rukh Khan in King, directed by Siddharth Anand and starring Deepika Padukone, Abhishek Bachchan, Suhana Khan, and Jaideep Ahlawat. The film is expected to release in 2026. Meanwhile, Salman Khan is preparing for Battle of Galwan, directed by Apoorva Lakhia, based on the 2020 India-China clash in Ladakh. These Shah Rukh Salman differences highlight why both stars continue to captivate audiences and remain Bollywood icons.

title: Donald Trump Claims Russia-Ukraine Peace Deal ‘Much Closer’ as Zelensky Praises Mar-a-Lago Talks.
content: Trump Ukraine Peace Talks Gain Momentum The Trump Ukraine peace talks advanced significantly after a major Mar-a-Lago meeting. To begin with, US President Donald Trump described discussions with Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky as “terrific.” In addition, he said security guarantees were nearly resolved. Trump also mentioned his recent call with Russian President Vladimir Putin, which he called “excellent.” Furthermore, he stated that both sides were moving closer to an agreement. Analysts said this momentum could signal progress in the Russia-Ukraine peace negotiations. Key Territorial Issues Challenge Peace Talks However, the Trump Ukraine peace talks face hurdles. Land and territorial disputes remain the toughest challenges. Specifically, the fate of eastern Donbas continues to block full agreement. Russia demands Ukraine surrender the region. Even so, Trump said the issue was “getting a lot closer” to resolution. He praised Ukraine’s “bravery” in the conflict. At the same time, he emphasised that “it is time to end the war.” Although no firm timeline was given, clarity could come “within weeks,” reflecting the complexity of the Ukraine peace talks. Zelensky Supports Continued Trump-Ukraine Negotiations Ukrainian President Zelensky welcomed progress during the Trump Ukraine peace talks. Moreover, he thanked Trump for hosting the Mar-a-Lago discussions. Zelensky confirmed European and Ukrainian teams would continue to work on unresolved points. Looking ahead, another round of talks will take place in the US in January. These sessions aim to finalise issues discussed earlier. In addition, Zelensky stressed the importance of security guarantees for lasting peace. Experts noted that ongoing cooperation strengthens the Trump-Zelensky meeting process. European Leaders Boost Russia-Ukraine Peace Negotiations Meanwhile, European leaders played a critical role in the Trump Ukraine peace talks. Trump and Zelensky held a joint call with Emmanuel Macron, Keir Starmer, and Friedrich Merz. Together, they agreed that strong security guarantees are essential for stability. As a result, cooperation between all sides improved significantly. Trump highlighted Europe’s major share in Ukraine’s security commitments. Ultimately, this broader support increased hope that the Russia-Ukraine peace negotiations may soon reach a settlement.

title: One Dead as Tata Nagar-Ernakulam Express Train Bogies Catch Fire in Andhra Pradesh.
content: Fire Breaks Out in AC Coaches Early MorningEarly Monday, a Tata-Ernakulam Express fire erupted in two air-conditioned bogies in Andhra Pradesh’s Anakapalli district, leaving one passenger dead. The train, traveling from Tatanagar to Ernakulam via Visakhapatnam, had just crossed Duvvada around 1:30 am when flames appeared in the B1 and M2 AC coaches near the pantry car. Loco pilots spotted the blaze near Yelamanchili railway point and immediately halted the train. Consequently, passengers evacuated quickly, although thick smoke reduced visibility and caused panic. The Tata-Ernakulam Express fire raised concerns about safety measures on long-distance trains. Casualty and Passenger EvacuationAuthorities confirmed that 70-year-old Chandrasekhar Sundar from Vijayawada died after getting trapped in the B1 AC coach. Fortunately, most passengers escaped safely. Eyewitnesses described chaotic scenes as travelers rushed onto platforms. Meanwhile, firefighters from Anakapalli, Elamanchili, and Nakkapalli worked for several hours to control the Tata-Ernakulam Express fire. Despite their efforts, the blaze destroyed all belongings in the two affected coaches, causing significant losses for passengers. Train Delays and Relocation of PassengersThe Tata-Ernakulam Express fire delayed the train by nearly four hours. Railway officials removed the burnt coaches and relocated passengers to remaining compartments. Additionally, APSRTC buses transported affected travelers to Samarlakota, where railway staff attached replacement AC coaches. As a result, the train resumed its journey to Ernakulam. However, rail traffic on the Visakhapatnam–Vijayawada route temporarily stopped, delaying several other trains. Authorities advised passengers to check train schedules due to the disruption caused by the Tata-Ernakulam Express blaze. Investigation and Safety MeasuresRailway officials suspect that overheating brakes in the B1 AC coach triggered the Tata-Ernakulam Express fire. Therefore, senior authorities launched a detailed inquiry to confirm the cause and identify safety lapses. Ambulances remained on standby, and officials assured passengers that all necessary safety measures were in place. Finally, the railway emphasized that it will take proactive steps to restore normal operations and prevent similar incidents in the future. Investigators will also review emergency response procedures following the Tata-Ernakulam Express blaze.

title: Abhishek Sharma Strengthens ODI Selection Case with Explosive 45 Sixes, Intense Net Session.
content: Abhishek Sharma Targets ODI DebutIndia’s T20I star, Abhishek Sharma, is now aiming to make an impact in ODIs. His rise to the top of the ICC T20I batting rankings shows his dominance in the shortest format. With an ODI debut still pending, the Vijay Hazare Trophy becomes a key platform. Abhishek can use this domestic tournament to demonstrate his adaptability and stake his claim for the national ODI team. Explosive Net Session Highlights IntentAbhishek’s determination was visible during Punjab’s training on Sunday. He asked teammate Gaurav Chaudhary about an imaginary field: “Field kya hai?” Chaudhary replied, “Mid-off single saving ke liye rakkha hai.” After that, Abhishek batted for almost an hour. He smashed around 45 sixes, taking on off-spinners, leg-spinners, and left-arm orthodox bowlers. The session showed his fearless and creative approach at the crease. Focus on All-Round SkillsAbhishek also bowled left-arm spin for nearly 40 minutes. This disciplined practice demonstrates his all-round ability. By focusing on both batting and bowling, he is preparing for the challenges of the 50-over format. His commitment to improving every aspect of his game could prove crucial for his ODI aspirations. Narrow Window for ODI SelectionThe BCCI has included Abhishek in India’s T20I squad for the New Zealand series and T20 World Cup. However, the ODI squad is yet to be announced. He faces competition from Shubman Gill, Rohit Sharma, and Yashasvi Jaiswal. Strong performances in the Vijay Hazare Trophy will be vital for him to grab the selectors’ attention. His ability to handle spin and hit big makes him a strong candidate for India’s ODI lineup.

title: Supreme Court Halts Delhi HC Bail Order for Unnao Rape Convict Kuldeep Sengar.
content: Supreme Court Blocks Delhi HC’s Relief The Supreme Court on Monday stopped the Delhi High Court’s bail order for former BJP MLA Kuldeep Singh Sengar. Therefore, the bench led by Chief Justice Surya Kant stressed the need for caution due to the “peculiar facts” of the case. Consequently, the court paused the High Court’s December 23 order and confirmed that Sengar would remain in prison. This decision immediately reassured the survivor, who had repeatedly raised concerns about his release. 2. Delhi HC Bail Order Triggered Public Anger Earlier, the Delhi High Court had paused Sengar’s life sentence and granted him conditional bail. It argued that he had already spent seven years and five months in jail. However, the order quickly triggered public anger across Delhi. Many women’s groups launched protests and demanded that the bail be withdrawn. Moreover, the survivor joined the demonstrations and stated that the order weakened her fight for justice. Sengar received a life sentence in 2019 for raping a minor and also faced a fine of ₹25 lakh. Additionally, his conviction followed intense public pressure and a detailed investigation. 3. Survivor Raises Serious Allegations A day before the Supreme Court’s intervention, the survivor addressed a protest organised by the All India Progressive Women’s Association (AIPWA). She said she trusted the Supreme Court to protect justice. However, she also alleged that Sengar had bribed officials, including a CBI officer and even a Delhi High Court judge. Furthermore, she said her family had suffered severe hardship since the bail order. Her claims added a new layer of concern and pushed the case back into the national spotlight. 4. Next Steps as Supreme Court Resumes Control With the stay in place, the Supreme Court will now examine the case more closely. Therefore, the order keeps Sengar in custody and restores the earlier legal position. Many activists and legal experts welcomed the move, saying it strengthens public trust. Meanwhile, the appeal will continue in the coming weeks, and the court is expected to take a firm view. Finally, the Unnao case remains under strong public and judicial attention as the legal process moves forward.

title: Karan Johar Says Aditya Dhar’s ‘Dhurandhar’ Made Him Question His Filmmaking: “I Was Completely Blown Away.
content: Karan Johar Praises Dhurandhar, Calls It Outstanding Zoom Chronicle News: Filmmaker Karan Johar praises Dhurandhar, revealing that the film left him “blown away” and made him rethink his own craft. Since its release, Dhurandhar has captured national attention, earning accolades from audiences, critics, and industry insiders alike. Many have highlighted Aditya Dhar’s direction, the story’s depth, and the cast’s performances. Therefore, it’s no surprise that Karan Johar continues to laud the film as one of Bollywood’s most impactful releases of the year. Why Karan Johar Praises Dhurandhar’s Direction During the book launch of Dining With Stars by Anupama Chopra, Karan explained why he was so impressed. He said, “I was blown away. Moreover, the background score, visuals, and pacing felt seamless.” He emphasized that Aditya Dhar’s direction allowed the story to unfold naturally, without unnecessary flair. In addition, Karan Johar praised the film’s storytelling, noting that it sets a new benchmark for contemporary Bollywood cinema. Consequently, Karan Johar praises Dhurandhar for combining technical mastery with authentic storytelling. How Dhurandhar Inspired Karan Johar The film also had a strong impact on Karan Johar’s perspective as a filmmaker. “I never felt the director tried to impress with wide shots or dramatic frames. Instead, every moment felt organic,” he said. Furthermore, watching Dhurandhar made him reflect on how craft and storytelling come together. He also praised other notable films like Lokah and Saiyaara, showing that he values innovative direction. Thus, Karan Johar praises Dhurandhar not just as a movie, but as a guidepost for excellence in filmmaking. Earlier Praise and Social Media Reactions Shortly after the film’s release, Karan shared his thoughts on Instagram, calling it “outstanding.” He also applauded Aditya Dhar and Ranveer Singh for their remarkable performances. Additionally, he congratulated the cast and crew for delivering a film that resonates with audiences. With recognition from top filmmakers like Karan Johar, Dhurandhar continues to dominate conversations, cementing its status as a must-watch film of the year.

title: Delhi Weather Update: Airport Operations Running Smooth, Visibility Improves, Minor Delays Continue.
content: Delhi Flight Status Updates: 130 Flights Cancelled Amid Dense Fog Delhi flight status updates show major disruptions at Indira Gandhi International (IGI) Airport on Monday morning. Dense fog blanketed Delhi-NCR, forcing authorities to cancel nearly 130 flights, delay over 200, and divert eight. Airport teams operated under CAT III procedures, allowing aircraft to land safely despite poor visibility. By 10:30 am, 178 departures and 69 arrivals were delayed, according to Flightradar24. Officials assured passengers that ground staff actively guided travelers to maintain smooth operations. Rail Travel Disrupted: Delhi Flight Status Updates Extend to Commuters Rail commuters faced difficulties as heavy fog delayed train services at New Delhi Railway Station. Morning schedules suffered major disruptions, leaving many passengers stranded. Airlines such as IndiGo, Air India, and SpiceJet advised travelers to confirm their flight status before leaving for the airport. The dense fog slowed both air and rail traffic, affecting thousands of daily travelers across Delhi, highlighting the broader impact captured in Delhi flight status updates. IGI Airport Visibility and Delhi Flight Status Updates The India Meteorological Department (IMD) reported visibility at IGI Airport dropped to 50 meters by 10:30 am IST. Flight operations continued under CAT III guidelines, but delays and cancellations occurred. Early-morning flights faced the worst disruption, prompting travelers to contact airlines for updates. Ground teams actively guided passengers on-site, ensuring operations continued safely despite challenging weather, as reflected in the latest Delhi flight status updates. Delhi Air Quality Hazardous, Impacting Travelers Adding to commuters’ woes, Delhi’s air quality worsened, reaching an AQI of 402, categorized as ‘severe’ by the Central Pollution Control Board (CPCB). Anand Vihar recorded 455, Wazirpur 443, and Rohini 442. The hazardous conditions posed health risks, especially for children and the elderly. Authorities advised residents to stay indoors and take precautions while traveling, reinforcing warnings in the Delhi flight status updates.

title: Two Telangana Girls Die After Car Plunges into Deep Gorge During California Trip: Report.
content: Telangana Students California Accident Leaves Two Young Women Dead The Telangana students California accident has shocked families in Mahabubabad district after two young women, Pullakhandu Meghana (24) and Kadiyala Bhavana (24), lost their lives. The group of ten friends was travelling in two cars during a weekend trip in California. As they drove along the winding Alabama Hills Road, the car carrying Meghana and Bhavana slipped off a sharp curve and fell into a deep gorge. Emergency teams reached the spot quickly; however, the two women died before any help could save them. Their friends immediately informed their families, who were left devastated by the sudden tragedy. Students From Telangana Were Planning Their Careers After Graduation Meghana and Bhavana came from Garla mandal in Mahabubabad district. They moved to the United States for higher education and recently completed their Master’s degrees. Moreover, they had started preparing for job opportunities in the US. Their short trip with friends served as a break after months of academic pressure. Additionally, Meghana’s father, Nageshwara Rao, runs a Mee-Seva centre in Garla, while Bhavana’s father serves as the deputy sarpanch of Mulkanoor village. Their families now plead for quick repatriation so they can perform the last rites at home. Police Probe the California Accident Involving Telangana Students Authorities in the US have opened a case to determine what caused the crash. They are checking the road conditions, the vehicle’s speed, and any mechanical issues. Meanwhile, Indian community groups in California are coordinating with officials to help the families track the repatriation process. Furthermore, the Indian consulate is monitoring the situation closely. The families remain heartbroken by the sudden loss; therefore, they want the process completed without delays. The Telangana students California accident has also revived discussions about safety for international students. Another Student Death in the US Deepens Worries Among Indian Families This tragedy follows another recent loss involving an Indian student in the United States. RajyaLakshmi (Raji) Yarlagadda, a 23-year-old from Andhra Pradesh, died in her Texas apartment last month. She had been suffering from a severe cold and chest pain for a few days. Raji recently completed her Master’s degree at Texas A&M University–Corpus Christi and was preparing to begin her career. Her cousin, Chaitanya YVK, later launched a GoFundMe campaign to support her family. Consequently, the back-to-back incidents have increased concerns among Indian families and highlighted the need for stronger support systems abroad.

title: Two Arrested in ‘Digital Arrest’ Scam Involving ₹1.95 Crore Fraud.
content: Accused Arrested in Digital Arrest Scam Hyderabad Hyderabad: In a major crackdown, Hyderabad Police arrested two men in connection with a Digital Arrest Scam Hyderabad, in which a woman lost ₹1.95 crore. Officials said the suspects used multiple mule bank accounts to receive and withdraw money. The stolen funds were later transferred to Dubai-based fraudsters through Hawala networks. Both accused have a history of cybercrime, with their accounts linked to 22 previous cases. Authorities believe the arrested duo are part of a larger, organized network targeting victims across India. Victim Tricked in Digital Arrest Scam Hyderabad The victim lodged a complaint on December 13, explaining how scammers impersonated government and law-enforcement officials. They falsely accused her husband of serious offenses and threatened immediate arrest. The fraudsters forced her to transfer ₹1.95 crore under the pretext of verification and case clearance. Through repeated calls, the scammers created panic and confusion, making the victim comply with their demands. Experts say this case is a classic example of Digital Arrest Scam Hyderabad, which continues to grow in sophistication and reach. Police Uncover Mule Accounts Network Cybercrime officials traced the suspects’ activities and identified them as the third and fourth accused in the operation.
