The third accused managed mule accounts and withdrawals, earning a 15% commission on deposits. The fourth followed instructions from higher-level operators, transferring money overseas. Police also seized two mobile phones used in coordinating the fraud. Investigators suspect that these operatives have connections to international cybercriminals, indicating that the network could be wider than initially thought. This arrest sends a strong message to cyber fraudsters operating across the country. Nationwide Alert on Digital Arrest Scams Digital-arrest scams have surged across India in recent months. Fraudsters pose as officials, keep victims on long calls, and demand money to avoid arrest. They often target elderly individuals and women, exploiting fear and urgency. The Supreme Court recently ordered a unified CBI probe into such scams. Hyderabad Police urged citizens to stay alert, verify unknown callers, and report suspicious activity immediately. This case highlights law enforcement’s ongoing efforts to dismantle Digital Arrest Scam Hyderabad operations while educating the public about this growing cybercrime.

title: India Open 2026 to Take Place at Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium from Jan 13-18.
content: Zoom Chronicle, New Delhi – The India Open 2026 badminton tournament, part of the BWF Super 750 series, will take place at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium in New Delhi from January 13 to 18, 2026. The tournament has moved from KD Jadhav Indoor Hall to provide a larger venue and improved facilities. Moreover, with India set to host the BWF World Championships in August, the event will act as a test run for players, officials, and fans. India Open 2026 Badminton: Larger Venue for Fans The stadium can accommodate over 8,000 spectators, more than double the previous venue’s capacity. Tickets for the India Open 2026 badminton event are available online through Ticmint, starting at ₹400, with premium seating capped at ₹1,750. This upgrade ensures fans enjoy live action comfortably while players benefit from world-class facilities, including improved lighting, seating, and practice courts. Top Players to Watch in India Open 2026 Badminton Top international stars, including An Se-young, PV Sindhu, Kunlavut Vitidsarn, Satwiksairaj Rankireddy, Chirag Shetty, and Lakshya Sen, will compete. Rising Indian talents like Unnati Hooda and Ayush Shetty will also showcase their skills. With six days of high-intensity matches, fans can expect thrilling rallies, intense competition, and unforgettable moments at the India Open 2026 badminton tournament. BAI Focuses on Quality and Safety The Badminton Association of India (BAI) organizes the event under the BWF. BAI General Secretary Sanjay Mishra said, “Moving the India Open 2026 badminton tournament to the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium marks a major step forward. The larger venue allows more fans and provides a better overall experience for players and spectators.” Following past concerns over venue conditions, including criticism by Denmark’s Mia Blichfeldt, the stadium has been upgraded to meet international standards. As a result, the India Open 2026 badminton event now guarantees a safe and enjoyable environment, highlighting India’s growing prominence in global badminton.

title: Rashmika Mandana and Vijay DeveraKonda’s Wedding Date and Venue Revealed; Couple to Have Intimate Ceremony.
content: Rashmika Vijay Wedding News: Date and Venue Confirmed Fans have eagerly awaited the latest Rashmika Vijay wedding news, and details are finally out. Rashmika Mandanna and Vijay Deverakonda, who got engaged in a private ceremony in October 2025, will tie the knot on February 26, 2026, at a heritage palace in Udaipur. The couple plans an intimate ceremony with only family and close friends, ensuring a personal and elegant celebration. This update adds to the excitement surrounding their long-awaited union. Rashmika Vijay Engagement News from Hyderabad The couple exchanged rings on October 3, 2025, a day after Dasara, in Hyderabad. While they kept the engagement private, Vijay’s team confirmed it to HT. Fans noticed matching rings at public events, fueling interest in their upcoming Rashmika Vijay wedding news. This engagement was the perfect start to a wedding journey that fans have been eagerly following. Rashmika Vijay On-Screen Chemistry and Public Appearances Rashmika and Vijay first acted together in Geetha Govindam (2018) and later in Dear Comrade (2019). They have made notable public appearances, including the 43rd India Day Parade in New York and Bharat Beyond Borders. Their real-life bond and on-screen chemistry make this Rashmika Vijay wedding news one of the most anticipated celebrity weddings of the year. Rashmika Vijay Wedding Reception and Plans It remains unclear if the couple will host a larger reception for friends from the film industry after returning to Hyderabad. The main Udaipur ceremony will focus on family and loved ones. Fans following the Rashmika Vijay wedding news can expect a private, meaningful celebration, highlighting the couple’s preference for elegance over extravagance. Fans Excited for Rashmika Vijay Wedding Updates With both stars at the peak of their careers, fans are eagerly awaiting photos and updates from the wedding. This intimate affair is expected to be one of the most talked-about celebrity weddings of 2026, creating excitement across the South cinema industry.

title: 4 Dead, Several Injured After Mumbai BEST Bus Crashes Near Bhandup Station: Key Highlights.
content: The Mumbai BEST bus accident near Bhandup station claimed four lives and injured nine others late Monday night. The bus reversed unexpectedly at around 10:03 pm, striking passengers waiting near the station exit. Panic spread among commuters, causing further injuries. Emergency teams, including police, fire brigade, and ambulances, quickly reached the scene and transported the injured to nearby hospitals. This tragic incident has renewed concerns about Mumbai BEST bus safety and commuter protection. Police Investigate Bhandup Bus Crash Police detained 52-year-old driver Santosh Ramesh Sawant for questioning following the Mumbai BEST bus accident. He was driving a Wetlease Olectra midi bus on route A-606 from the Vikhroli depot. Officials noted the bus has a limited turning radius, increasing the risk of reversing accidents in crowded lanes. Investigators are reviewing the vehicle’s mechanical condition, road layout, and the driver’s actions. Conductor Bhagwan Bhau Ghare was also inside the bus during the incident. Government Response and Political Reactions Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis announced ₹5 lakh compensation for each family affected by the Mumbai bus accident and promised strict action once the probe concludes. Congress leader Varsha Gaikwad demanded a full inquiry, criticizing BEST’s wet-leasing model. She argued that policy decisions weakened Mumbai’s public transport system, putting commuters at higher risk and reigniting debates about fleet safety. Safety Measures and Lessons for Mumbai Commuters Following the Mumbai BEST bus accident, authorities examined CCTV footage to reconstruct the events. Traffic slowed for hours while rescue teams cleared the area. Commuters raised concerns about driver training, reversing practices, and wet-leased bus deployment in narrow lanes. Experts recommend better route planning, regular inspections, and stricter oversight of Mumbai’s bus network. The incident highlights the urgent need for long-term safety reforms in public transport.

title: Bangladesh Mourns as First Female Prime Minister Khaleda Zia Passes Away at 80.
content: Khaleda Zia Bangladesh PM Passes Away Khaleda Zia Bangladesh PM, the country’s first female prime minister, passed away on Tuesday at 80, confirmed her Bangladesh Nationalist Party (BNP). Doctors said she had advanced cirrhosis of the liver, arthritis, diabetes, and heart and chest problems. She died around 6:00 am, shortly after Fajr prayer. The BNP requested prayers for her departed soul on Facebook. As a result, her passing ends a major chapter in Bangladesh’s political history and marks a moment of national mourning. Political Career of Khaleda Zia Bangladesh PM Khaleda Zia served as Prime Minister of Bangladesh from 1991 to 1996 and again from 2001 to 2006. She was the first woman to hold the office and the widow of former president Ziaur Rahman. During her tenure, she shaped the nation’s political and economic policies. She faced strong opposition but remained a determined and influential leader. Additionally, her leadership inspired women to actively participate in Bangladesh’s political landscape. Health and Legal Challenges of Khaleda Zia Khaleda Zia faced severe health problems for years. In 2018, she was convicted in a 2008 corruption case involving orphan funds. Authorities placed her under house arrest but later released her due to health concerns. In 2020, the Awami League suspended her prison sentence with restrictions. She could not travel abroad or engage in political activities. Despite these limitations, Khaleda Zia Bangladesh PM continued to influence her party and supporters. Nation Mourns Khaleda Zia Bangladesh PM Her death shocked Bangladesh and the international community. Leaders, citizens, and political figures paid tribute to her contributions. Her political rivalry with Awami League leader Sheikh Hasina remains part of her legacy. Moreover, she will be remembered as a pioneer for women in leadership and a key figure in Bangladesh’s democratic evolution. Her life reflects resilience, determination, and a lasting impact on the nation.

title: Amazon Techie Hits Back at Trolls Over Santa Photo, Calls Out ‘90s Mindset’.
content: Amazon Techie Santa Trolling Sparks Social Media Debate The Amazon techie Santa trolling incident went viral after Amazon software engineer Charvi shared a festive photo on December 27. The image showed her with a friend and a man dressed as Santa Claus. Her caption, “Google, Amazon and Santa all in one frame,” was intended as playful holiday fun. However, the post quickly attracted thousands of critical comments. Many labeled her a “diversity hire” or accused her of showing off, turning a simple post into a heated online debate. Santa Trolling Targets Gender and Nationality The backlash from this Santa trolling incident intensified as users attacked Charvi’s gender and nationality. Some implied she earned her role because she is Indian. Others repeated the “diversity hire” insult. Several mocked her caption, questioning why she referenced Amazon and Google. Despite the harmless intent, the online discussion revealed biases and stereotypes women and minorities face in the tech industry. Charvi Responds to Amazon Techie Santa Trolling In response to the trolling, Charvi addressed critics confidently. She wrote that 99% of the comments were aimed at her because she is Indian or a woman. “This post taught me that society is still so disgusting. People need to upgrade their mindset to 2025. They’re still living with a 90s mindset,” she said. Her reply received widespread support from users who encouraged her to continue posting freely. This Amazon techie Santa trolling incident emphasizes the importance of standing up against online harassment. Support Grows Amid Santa Trolling Even with harsh criticism, Charvi received support from many users. They highlighted that her post was innocent and did not deserve criticism. Several pointed out that online jealousy often fuels negativity. Others praised her courage in responding. The Santa photo trolling incident sheds light on online bullying, gender bias, and stereotyping of Indian tech professionals, highlighting the need for respectful digital spaces.

title: Prabhas Donates Monthly to Khammam Old Age Home He Helped Build, Reveals Suma Kanakala.
content: Prabhas’ Ongoing PhilanthropyTollywood superstar Prabhas Khammam old age home donations have recently grabbed attention. Anchor Suma Kanakala revealed that Prabhas continues to support the home he helped establish in Khammam. When a fan asked her about the actor, she praised his “kind heart” and highlighted that consistent contributions from celebrities are rare. Moreover, this gesture shows Prabhas’ dedication beyond films and emphasizes his commitment to social welfare. Fans admire him not only for his acting but also for his long-term philanthropic efforts. Tollywood Stars Support the HomeSuma shared that several Tollywood stars, including Pawan Kalyan and Prabhas, contributed to building the old age home. She wrote, “A few years ago, I helped in constructing the Khammam old age home. Pawan Kalyan Garu, Prabhas Garu, and many other celebrities generously assisted.” Additionally, Lakshmi Manchu supported the initiative through her Meemu Saitham show. This encouraged more fans and actors to contribute. Their collective effort ensured the home was completed successfully, providing a safe and caring environment for elderly residents. Monthly Donations Ensure Elderly CarePrabhas’ support did not end after construction. According to Suma, he donates every month for the home’s upkeep. She added, “Ever since then, Prabhas Garu has been consistently supporting the old age home by sending a monthly amount. I truly acknowledge his kind heart; it is rare to see such long-term commitment.” As a result, elderly residents continue to receive proper care, meals, medical support, and essential daily services. This regular support significantly improves their quality of life. Recognition and Upcoming ProjectsSuma’s husband, actor Rajeev Kanakala, praised Prabhas on the Mahaa Max podcast, mentioning that SS Rajamouli also contributed. He said, “The great thing about Prabhas is that he still donates money for running the home. Hats off to him.” On the professional front, Prabhas starred in Adipurush, Salaar, Kalki 2898 AD, and will release The Raja Saab on January 9, 2026, along with Fauzi and Spirit, proving his dedication to both films and social causes.

title: Amit Shah, Mamata Banerjee Trade Sharp Barbs in Bengal Ahead of 2026 Polls.
content: Political Tensions Rise Ahead of the State Elections The political clash of Shah vs Mamata in Bengal intensified on Tuesday as both leaders exchanged sharp accusations ahead of the 2026 assembly polls. The atmosphere became charged as issues such as corruption, infiltration and governance dominated their speeches. Their confrontation set the tone for a heated election season and pushed the political discourse into a more aggressive phase. Amit Shah Targets TMC on Corruption and Infiltration Amit Shah accused the Trinamool Congress government of creating an environment of fear and misgovernance. He said that development had slowed because of the alleged syndicate system. Shah also claimed that illegal infiltration had changed the demographic structure of the state. According to him, several welfare schemes launched by the central government were blocked at the state level. He added that a change in government would revive Bengal’s cultural identity and administrative efficiency. Mamata Banerjee Hits Back at BJP’s Allegations Mamata Banerjee strongly rejected Shah’s accusations and said the BJP had turned the Special Intensive Revision exercise into a scam. She argued that many officers involved in the process were under immense pressure. Mamata denied claims regarding border fencing and reminded the public that her administration had provided land for projects in areas like Petrapol and Andal. She also used mythological references to criticize the BJP and accused the party of spreading panic before the elections. Shah vs Mamata in Bengal Shapes Campaign Strategy The ongoing Shah vs Mamata in Bengal narrative deepened as both leaders sharpened their attacks. Shah alleged that political violence under TMC rule had increased and claimed that many BJP workers were killed or displaced. He urged voters to give the BJP a chance to bring stability in 2026. However, TMC minister Bratya Basu dismissed his statements and predicted a poor performance for the BJP. As the campaign builds momentum, the Shah vs Mamata in Bengal conflict continues to shape the state’s political direction.

title: Smriti Mandhana Rested for 5th T20I vs Sri Lanka in Thiruvananthapuram — India Make Strategic Change Ahead of T20 World Cup.
content: Smriti Mandhana Rested as India Rotate Players India confirmed early that Smriti Mandhana rested for the fifth and final T20I against Sri Lanka in Thiruvananthapuram. Since the team had already secured the series, the management used this match to rotate key players and test bench strength. Captain Harmanpreet Kaur also brought in G. Kamalini for her debut and reintroduced Sneh Rana. By resting Mandhana, India gave younger players valuable international experience while keeping senior players fresh. This approach also ensures India can manage workloads ahead of major tournaments. Why Smriti Mandhana Rested Ahead of Big Events The decision to rest Mandhana came after her 80-run performance in the fourth T20I, which helped India cross 200 runs. Earlier in the series, her scores had been inconsistent, but she regained form at the right time. Additionally, she recently became the fastest woman to reach 10,000 international runs. Therefore, Mandhana’s rest helps India manage her workload ahead of the Women’s Premier League and the Women’s T20 World Cup in England. Resting her now also allows the team to focus on long-term planning while keeping Mandhana in peak condition. Impact of Mandhana Not Playing on Team Strategy With Mandhana not playing, India made tactical adjustments to the batting lineup and explored different combinations. Harmanpreet Kaur highlighted that the match allowed the team to give responsibility to emerging players. Moreover, India aimed to maintain momentum after winning the 2025 Women’s ODI World Cup. Resting Mandhana also provided a safe opportunity to review squad balance without risking performance in a dead rubber. This strategy ensures younger players gain experience while India remains competitive. India Benefits from Mandhana’s Rest Ahead of World Cup The final T20I gave India a platform to assess depth in both batting and bowling. By resting Mandhana, the management observed how the middle order adapted and how bowlers handled pressure situations. Furthermore, this match allows India to finalize its playing combinations ahead of the upcoming Women’s T20 World Cup. This approach ensures India enters the tournament with clarity, confidence, and a strong, well-rested squad capable of competing at the highest level.

title: Hindu Man Bajendra Biswas Shot Dead in Bangladesh’s Mymensingh Days After Lynching of Dipu Chandra Das — Third Minority Killing in Two Weeks.
content: Tragic Killing in Mymensingh In a shocking incident, 40-year-old Hindu Ansar member Bajendra Biswas was shot dead by his colleague at a garment factory in Bhaluka Upazila, Mymensingh district on Monday, December 29, around 6:30 pm. This attack follows the brutal lynching of 27-year-old Dipu Chandra Das, raising serious concerns about minority safety in Bangladesh. Both Victim and Accused Are Ansar Members Both Biswas and the accused, Noman Mia, worked in the Bangladesh Ansar, a paramilitary force responsible for factory security. The shooting happened inside the Sultana Sweaters Limited factory in the Mehrabari area. Eyewitnesses reported that Biswas and Mia were sitting together when Mia suddenly pointed a government-issued shotgun at Biswas’s thigh. Mia asked, “Shall I shoot?” and then fired. Biswas suffered critical injuries and died on the way to the hospital. Mia fled the scene but authorities arrested him later. Confirmation and Background Monindra Nath, acting secretary general of the Bangladesh Hindu Buddha Christian Unity Council, confirmed the killing and demanded strict action. Biswas was the son of Probitra Biswas from Kadirpur village under Sylhet Sadar Upazila. Mia is the son of Lutfar Rahman from Baluturi Bazar under Taherpur Police Station, Sunamganj district. Eyewitness APC Md Azahar Ali stated that there were no visible disputes before the shooting. Context of Minority Violence This killing occurs days after Dipu Chandra Das was lynched, sparking protests across India in New Delhi, Kolkata, Mumbai, Hyderabad, Agartala, and parts of Madhya Pradesh. Several Hindu organizations also demonstrated near Bangladeshi missions, demanding stronger protection for minorities. Civil society groups condemned Biswas’s killing and urged the Bangladesh government to enhance security measures for Hindu and other minority communities. Authorities have launched a detailed investigation, reviewing eyewitness accounts and factory CCTV footage. International Concern and Call for Action The back-to-back deaths of Hindu men in Mymensingh have renewed international concerns about minority safety. Community leaders warn that failure to act could cause further unrest and instability in the region.

title: UAE to Withdraw Forces from Saudi Arabia After Yemen’s Mukalla Bombing: All You Need to Know.
content: UAE Troop Withdrawal Begins After Mukalla Strike The UAE troop withdrawal officially began after Saudi Arabia carried out airstrikes in Yemen’s Mukalla port. Saudi authorities claimed a shipment from Fujairah contained weapons for the Southern Transitional Council (STC). However, the UAE denied the claim, stating the shipment included only vehicles for UAE forces. The Ministry of Defense confirmed the UAE exit to protect personnel and maintain effective counterterrorism operations. Analysts say this UAE pullout reflects both safety concerns and a strategic shift in the UAE’s regional policy. UAE Denies Weapon Shipment Amid Rising Tensions The UAE emphasized that Yemen’s political future must be decided by local parties. Officials clarified that the UAE troop withdrawal does not reduce support for legitimacy or counterterrorism. Furthermore, the country rejected claims of supplying weapons to the STC, stating the shipment contained only vehicles for operational use. This strong response strengthens the UAE’s position and shows careful management of regional tensions. Experts note that the UAE exit may also prevent further confrontations in southern Yemen, reinforcing the importance of the troop withdrawal. STC Gains Deepen Regional Divisions Meanwhile, the STC expanded control over Hadramout and Mahra provinces, including strategic oil facilities. As a result, the group gained leverage in upcoming peace talks. The Yemeni military, supported by Saudi Arabia and local tribal alliances, opposed these advances. The withdrawal of UAE forces adds uncertainty as coalition partners support rival factions. Analysts say this UAE troop withdrawal could influence future negotiations and alter the balance of power between Gulf allies. Regional Implications of UAE Troop Withdrawal After the initial airstrike, Saudi Arabia carried out additional attacks in Mukalla. Experts suggest these strikes were meant to halt the STC’s expansion. The UAE troop withdrawal signals a shift in Gulf strategy. This UAE pullout may affect counterterrorism coordination, reshape power dynamics, and influence upcoming political negotiations. With tensions rising, the UAE troop withdrawal marks a critical moment for regional stability and demonstrates the UAE’s careful strategic adjustments.

title: India Becomes 4th Largest Economy in the World, Set to Surpass Germany by 2026: Government.
content: India Overtakes Japan to Claim 4th SpotIndia becomes 4th largest economy 2025, surpassing Japan with a GDP of USD 4.18 trillion, the government said. Consequently, India is now the fastest-growing major economy globally. Experts predict that India will surpass Germany within 2–3 years. Meanwhile, the United States remains the largest economy, followed by China. This milestone highlights India’s growing influence in global economic rankings. Strong Domestic Consumption and Investment Drive GrowthIn Q2 of FY 2025-26, India’s real GDP grew by 8.2%, marking the highest growth in six quarters. Growth in Q1 was 7.8%, while Q4 of FY 2024-25 recorded 7.4%. Strong domestic demand, private consumption, and strategic investments fueled this expansion. Therefore, India becomes 4th largest economy 2025 not only by size but also due to robust domestic drivers. Analysts highlight that infrastructure development, technological adoption, and urban consumption are key factors sustaining long-term growth. RBI and Global Agencies Upgrade Growth ForecastsThe Reserve Bank of India (RBI) raised its GDP growth projection for FY 2025–26 from 6.8% to 7.3%. Similarly, international organizations revised their forecasts. The World Bank projects 6.5% growth in 2026, whereas Moody’s expects 6.4% in 2026 and 6.5% in 2027. Moreover, the IMF forecasts 6.6% for 2025 and 6.2% for 2026. OECD, S&P, ADB, and Fitch also raised their estimates, highlighting why India becomes 4th largest economy 2025 and is on track to surpass Germany. India Poised to Become Third-Largest Economy by 2028According to the PIB, India could reach a GDP of USD 7.3 trillion by 2030, surpassing Germany. Furthermore, government reforms, higher consumption, and strategic investments strengthened India’s economic foundation. As a result, India is expected to continue its growth trajectory. By 2028, India becomes 4th largest economy 2025 will likely transition to the third-largest economy globally. This growth will attract foreign investment, create employment opportunities, and strengthen India’s international trade position.

title: Dense Fog in Delhi May Disrupt New Year Travel, Airlines and Airport Issue Safety Advisories.
content: Dense Fog Hits Delhi, Disrupting New Year Travel Dense Delhi fog New Year conditions have enveloped the city on the final day of 2025, causing travel disruptions. The India Meteorological Department (IMD) issued a yellow alert for moderate to dense fog. Visibility dropped to just a few metres on Wednesday morning, making commuting difficult. Travelers were advised to check updates before heading out, as many reported longer travel times to airports and railway stations due to the foggy conditions. IGI Airport Faces Flight Delays Amid Delhi Fog Delhi’s Indira Gandhi International (IGI) Airport warned that flight schedules would face delays and cancellations because of the dense Delhi fog New Year travel conditions. “Our teams are actively assisting passengers to ensure smooth operations despite low visibility,” the airport said. Flights are being managed under CAT III protocols to maintain safety. Passengers were urged to contact airlines directly for the latest updates, as flight disruptions are expected throughout the day. Airlines Issue Travel Advisories for New Year Travel Several airlines, including IndiGo, Air India, and SpiceJet, issued advisories to alert passengers about New Year travel in Delhi fog. Air India activated its FogCare initiative, allowing travelers to reschedule flights or get refunds without penalties. IndiGo confirmed that departures and arrivals could be delayed, and SpiceJet warned that connecting flights may also be affected. Passengers were urged to monitor flight status and plan extra travel time to avoid inconvenience. Poor Air Quality Adds to Delhi Travel Challenges Alongside dense fog, Delhi recorded “very poor” air quality, with an AQI reaching 383, near “severe.” The combination of pollution and Delhi fog New Year conditions increases travel and health risks. Authorities recommended wearing masks, avoiding prolonged outdoor exposure, and exercising caution while commuting. Residents were advised to minimize outdoor activities during peak fog hours. Tips for Travelers During Dense Fog in Delhi Passengers are advised to arrive at the airport early, check flight status online, and keep travel documents ready. Using apps like the IGI Airport flight tracker or airline notifications can help avoid unexpected delays. Travelers should also consider alternative routes or rescheduling flights if needed. Staying updated on Delhi fog New Year travel alerts ensures safe and smooth journeys.

title: China Claims Mediation Role in India-Pakistan Tensions After Trump Comment: New Delhi Calls Remark ‘Bizarre’.
content: Beijing’s China India Pakistan Mediation Remark Sparks Backlash China sparked controversy after foreign minister Wang Yi claimed that Beijing mediated the India-Pakistan tensions in May. He made this statement during the “Symposium on the International Situation and China’s Foreign Relations” in Beijing. Indian officials immediately rejected the claim, calling it “bizarre.” People familiar with the situation said China had no role in ending the standoff. According to them, the ceasefire resulted solely from direct talks between Indian and Pakistani military officials. Background of the May India-Pakistan Standoff The crisis began on April 22 after a terror attack in Pahalgam valley, Jammu and Kashmir, which killed 26 civilians. India responded with Operation Sindoor, targeting terror bases inside Pakistan and Pakistan-occupied Kashmir. The standoff escalated quickly, raising tensions between the two nuclear-armed neighbors. At the time, several reports suggested China provided Pakistan with surveillance inputs and logistical support. These reports fueled skepticism in New Delhi regarding China’s neutrality. Despite this, Wang Yi claimed that Beijing mediated the India-Pakistan tensions, along with other global conflicts like Myanmar, Palestine-Israel, and Cambodia-Thailand. Indian Officials Reject China India Pakistan Mediation Narrative Officials in New Delhi insist that only military-level discussions between India and Pakistan resolved the crisis. They argue that China’s deep defense partnership with Pakistan, which provides over 81% of Pakistan’s military hardware, makes Beijing’s claim questionable. Indian officials also noted that China may have used the standoff to showcase its weapons systems supplied to Pakistan. The attempt to project itself as a mediator mirrors earlier claims by Donald Trump, who also suggested the US could mediate India-Pakistan issues—remarks India had rejected. India’s Firm Stand Against Third-Party Intervention People familiar with the developments say China’s statement seems aimed at boosting its global diplomatic profile. Indian officials emphasize that New Delhi does not accept third-party mediation in disputes with Pakistan. “The claim by the Chinese side is bizarre,” one official said. Another added that China appears to be “following the US playbook.” Both stressed that India resolved the May standoff directly with Pakistan. Officials insist that India’s position on external mediation remains firm and consistent, emphasizing bilateral dialogue over outside involvement.

title: Rajasthan New Year’s Eve Security Scare: Two Arrested With 150 Kg Explosives in Tonk.
content: Rajasthan Tonk Explosives Seizure Triggers Major Alert Rajasthan faced a major security alert on New Year’s Eve after the District Special Team (DST) arrested Surendra Patwa and Surendra Mochi, both from Bundi district. Officers stopped their car in Tonk and found 150 kg of ammonium nitrate packed inside sacks disguised as urea fertiliser. The Rajasthan Tonk explosives seizure shocked authorities as celebrations were underway across the state. Car Intercepted in Tonk During Explosives Seizure Operation The DST team moved fast after receiving a precise intelligence tip. Officers intercepted the vehicle near the Baroni police station area and began a detailed search. They uncovered ammonium nitrate, 200 cartridges, and six bundles of fuse wire measuring nearly 1,100 metres. Police seized the car and detained both accused for questioning. Tonk Explosives Case: Police Explain the DST Operation DSP Mrityunjay Mishra said the team acted without delay and sealed the area to secure the explosives. He added that the two men were transporting the material from Bundi to Tonk for supply. Officials are checking whether the consignment was linked to illegal mining or a more serious plan. Bundi Men Questioned in Rajasthan Explosives Transport Case Investigators are reviewing phone records, contacts, and recent movements of both accused. Officers want to learn whether they made earlier deliveries or worked with a larger network. Their route and meeting points are now part of the ongoing investigation. Rajasthan Explosives Haul: DST Tracks Supply Chain Police are tracing the source of the ammonium nitrate and ammunition recovered from the car. They want to identify everyone involved in supplying, storing, and financing such a large explosive consignment. Officers believe the material was ready for immediate handover. Police Probe Source Behind Tonk Explosives Movement Authorities are checking every possible link, including transport routes, storage locations, and earlier suspicious activity around Bundi and Tonk. Tonk Explosives Recovery Raises Security Concerns The Rajasthan Tonk explosives seizure comes weeks after ammonium nitrate was used in the Red Fort blast in Delhi, which killed 12 people. Investigators said bomber Umar-un-Nabi may have mishandled the device. That incident showed how dangerous the chemical can become in the wrong hands. Rajasthan Authorities Alert After Major Explosives Find Police have increased checks across transport routes and sensitive areas. The

title: Amitabh Bachchan Pays Heartfelt Tribute to Dharmendra on KBC 17: ‘He Was More Than a Person, He Was a Feeling'.
content: Zoom Chronicle News – December 31, 2025: Amitabh Bachchan tribute Dharmendra on Kaun Banega Crorepati 17 moved viewers across India. The megastar reflected on his lifelong friendship with Bollywood legend Dharmendra and shared insights about his final film, Ikkis. “Mr Dharam was not just a person. He was a feeling, and a feeling never lets you go,” Amitabh said, visibly emotional. Amitabh Honors Dharmendra Through Ikkis While discussing Ikkis, Amitabh described the film as a “precious memento for millions of people.” He added, “An artist wants to practise art until the very last breath. That is exactly what my friend, my family, and my idol, Mr Dharmendra Deol, did.” Amitabh also recalled a memory from Sholay, emphasizing Dharmendra’s physical presence and instinctive acting. “In the death scene, the agony you saw was real because he held me so tightly,” he said, highlighting the actor’s dedication to authentic performance. Colleagues Praise Bollywood Legend Dharmendra Director Sriram Raghavan admired Dharmendra’s work in his final film, saying, “I feel blessed he was part of Ikkis. His performance was extraordinary.” Actor Jaideep Ahlawat added, “On set, he never acted like a superstar; he treated us like family.” Amitabh’s tribute showcased how Dharmendra inspired colleagues and left a lasting legacy in Indian cinema. Fans Celebrate Amitabh’s Tribute to Dharmendra Ahead of its January 1 release, Ikkis is receiving praise from critics and industry experts. Casting director Mukesh Chhabra lauded Dharmendra’s performance for its “grace and depth,” calling it a “heartbreaking final role.” Fans on social media shared memories, applauding Amitabh’s heartfelt tribute and Dharmendra’s contribution to Bollywood. Many viewers expressed how the tribute reminded them of Dharmendra’s iconic roles and the unforgettable bond he shared with Amitabh Bachchan. The emotional episode also sparked discussions on fan forums and entertainment platforms, with audiences celebrating the legend’s enduring influence on Indian cinema.

title: India Welcomes New Year 2026: What’s Open and What’s Closed Across the Country Today.
content: How India Welcomes New Year 2026 Amid a Severe Cold Wave India welcomes New Year 2026 with fireworks, bright lights and energetic gatherings across major cities. People stepped out despite the harsh cold wave. Crowds filled Marine Drive in Mumbai and Connaught Place in Delhi to celebrate the new year. Police increased security across major metros to control heavy footfall and keep celebrations smooth and safe. India Welcomes New Year 2026: Status of Government Offices, Schools and Services As India welcomes New Year 2026, most government offices and departments continue regular work since January 1 is a restricted holiday. Schools and colleges also remain open in many states. However, severe winter conditions forced some regions to change schedules. Punjab extended winter vacations in all government, aided and private schools till January 7 due to fog and cold. Guwahati authorities also closed schools for a week and will reopen them on January 7. Shops, commercial establishments and emergency services continue to operate normally across the country. Bank, Market and Transport Updates as India Welcomes New Year 2026 With India welcoming New Year 2026, some cities observe bank closures today. As per the RBI list, banks in Aizawl, Chennai, Gangtok, Imphal, Itanagar, Kolkata and Shillong remain shut. Banks in other areas continue regular operations. The BSE and NSE stay open since January 1 is not a trading holiday. Public transport networks, including the Delhi Metro, state buses, autos and taxis, follow their usual schedules. Delhi, Bengaluru and Kolkata also extended metro timings on New Year’s Eve to manage large crowds. High Security and Large Gatherings as India Welcomes New Year 2026 Nationwide As India welcomes New Year 2026, large gatherings appear at shopping malls, tourist spots and temples across the country. Police teams monitor busy markets, metro stations and public areas to maintain safety. Devotees visit temples in huge numbers. In Amritsar, thousands reach Shri Harmandir Sahib to offer prayers for the new year. Despite the cold wave, India celebrates the start of 2026 with strong festive spirit, active security measures and uninterrupted essential services. If you want, I can also generate:

title: Centre proposes mandatory 90-day work requirement per year for gig workers to access social security benefits.
content: Centre Introduces 90-Day Gig Worker Rule The Union labour ministry has released draft rules that introduce the 90-day gig worker rule for social security benefits. These rules require gig and platform workers to complete 90 working days with one aggregator, or 120 days across multiple aggregators, within a financial year. The Centre issued this notification on December 30, 2025. The announcement came a day before gig workers held a strike demanding higher earnings and better working conditions. The new rule aims to create a clear eligibility system for workers in India’s fast-growing gig economy. How the 90-Day Gig Worker Rule Works The draft rules explain how engagement will be calculated under the 90-day gig worker rule. A worker counts as engaged for a full day if they earn any income on that calendar day, regardless of the amount. Workers who earn from multiple platforms on a single day can count each engagement separately. For example, if a worker completes tasks for three aggregators on the same day, it will count as three engagement days. This system supports workers who depend on multiple platforms to meet their daily income goals. It also helps them reach the engagement requirement faster. Eligibility Expanded for Gig and Platform Workers The Centre has broadened the scope of who qualifies under the 90-day gig worker rule. Workers hired directly by aggregators or indirectly through subsidiaries, holding companies, LLPs, or third-party contractors will all qualify. This expansion ensures that workers employed through flexible or indirect arrangements are not excluded. It also creates a more accurate representation of India’s large gig workforce. Labour experts say this rule could strengthen the rights of delivery agents, drivers, and service partners who often operate without formal protection. Digital Registration Through e-Shram Portal To access benefits under the 90-day gig worker rule, workers must register on the government’s digital portal. Registered workers will receive a digital identity card with their photograph and essential details. The ongoing e-Shram portal initiative already serves as the national database for unorganised workers. Workers must regularly update their occupation, address, skills, and mobile number. Failing to update information may affect their eligibility for social security schemes. This digital system aims to streamline welfare delivery and ensure accurate worker identification.

title: Vande Bharat Sleeper Trains to Connect Guwahati and Kolkata, Offering Cheaper Travel Than Flights: Govt.
content: PM Modi to Inaugurate Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat Prime Minister Narendra Modi will inaugurate the Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat sleeper train later this month. Railway Minister Ashwini Vaishnaw said the train will offer modern overnight travel at fares much lower than flights. Operations are expected around January 18, with the exact date to be confirmed soon. The launch of the Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat train marks a significant milestone in India’s railway modernization. Passengers across Assam and West Bengal will now enjoy faster, safer, and more comfortable overnight travel. Affordable Fares on Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat Vaishnaw highlighted that the Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat fares are designed for middle-class travelers. 3-AC tickets will cost ₹2,300, 2-AC ₹3,000, and 1-AC ₹3,600, all including meals. By comparison, flights between Guwahati and Kolkata cost ₹6,000–8,000. The per-kilometre fares are ₹3.8 for 1-AC, ₹3.1 for 2-AC, and ₹2.4 for 3-AC. The Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat offers almost half the cost of flying while providing modern amenities and a secure journey. Modern Amenities and Safety Features The Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat train has 16 coaches with a total of 823 berths and a design speed of 180 kmph, though it will operate at 120–130 kmph. Coaches include 11 3-AC, four 2-AC, and one 1-AC. Passengers benefit from ergonomic berths, enhanced cushioning, automatic doors, advanced suspension, and the Kavach safety system. Disinfectant technology kills 99.9% of germs, ensuring hygienic and safe travel on the Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat train. Regional Cuisine and Fleet Expansion Trains departing Guwahati will serve Assamese cuisine, while Kolkata departures feature Bengali meals. Railways plan to expand the Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat fleet, with eight more trains launching in six months and 12 by year-end. This service provides passengers across Assam and West Bengal with fast, affordable, and comfortable travel, combining convenience with regional flavors. The Guwahati Kolkata Vande Bharat train is set to redefine long-distance rail travel between the two cities.

title: Iran Hits Back at Trump’s Warning as Nationwide Protests Spark ‘Chaos and Destruction’ Debate.
content: Iran Protests Trump Warning Spark Nationwide Unrest The Iran protests Trump warning dispute has intensified public anger across the country. Demonstrators continue to gather in major cities as inflation rises, the currency weakens, and frustration grows. The Iran protests gained global attention after Donald Trump warned Iran against using lethal force on peaceful demonstrators. His statement increased tensions and encouraged more citizens to join the rallies. Many protestors say the economic crisis has reached a breaking point, and they want the government to acknowledge their grievances. Government Reaction Heightens Iran Protests A senior adviser to Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei responded sharply to Trump’s remarks. He warned that any US interference would bring “chaos and destruction” to the region. Iranian officials accused the US of exploiting the Iran protests for political gain. Students from more than ten universities joined the demonstrations, adding new momentum. Shops and markets also closed in several cities, showing growing solidarity with the Iran protests. Many citizens believe government policies have deepened the economic crisis. Violent Clashes Intensify Amid Iran Protests The latest phase of the Iran protests turned more violent as clashes spread to multiple provinces. Protesters threw stones, confronted security forces, and burned vehicles during the unrest. Authorities said some armed individuals used the crowds to create more chaos. International media, including CNN, reported rising confrontations tied to the Iran protests. The economic burden of US sanctions continues to fuel anger, making it harder for the government to control the unrest. Leadership Responds as Iran Protests Trump Warning Grows President Masoud Pezeshkian said his civilian government is ready to talk with protesters. He emphasized the need to address economic problems and restore public trust. Many citizens want clear action rather than promises, and they say the Iran protests will continue until change appears. With the Iran protests Trump warning dispute growing, both Tehran and Washington are watching closely. The next phase of this unrest will likely shape political dynamics in Iran and influence how the region responds to rising tensions.

title: Indore water contamination: MP CM fires officials after 10 dead.
content: Indore Water Contamination Sparks Public Health Concerns The Indore water contamination in Bhagirathpura, Madhya Pradesh, has claimed at least 10 lives and affected over 1,400 residents. Contaminated drinking water caused vomiting and diarrhoea across the community. Preliminary tests confirmed bacteria commonly found in sewage. Authorities advised residents to avoid tap water, rely on tankers, and boil water before drinking. Civic teams are inspecting pipelines and distributing chlorine tablets to prevent further contamination. The Indore water contamination outbreak has raised urgent public health concerns in the city. MP CM Takes Swift Action Amid Indore Water Contamination Madhya Pradesh Chief Minister Mohan Yadav acted promptly after the Indore water contamination crisis. He instructed the Indore Municipal Corporation to issue show-cause notices to erring officials. Additionally, he removed the Additional Commissioner and relieved the Superintending Engineer overseeing water distribution. The CM also ordered the immediate filling of vacant positions to strengthen oversight. “We will hold officials accountable for this public health crisis,” Yadav said on social media. His actions aim to contain the Indore water contamination and prevent further deaths. Hospitals Monitor Patients Amid Drinking Water Contamination Chief Medical and Health Officer Madhav Prasad Hasani said hospitals are closely monitoring patients affected by the Indore water contamination. So far, 272 patients were admitted, 71 discharged, and 32 remain in intensive care. Survey teams are conducting door-to-door checks to identify new cases. Authorities admitted 13 more patients recently. Water tests revealed bacterial contamination in 26 of 50 samples collected from Bhagirathpura and surrounding areas. Hospitals are isolating critical patients and ensuring proper treatment to contain the Indore water contamination outbreak effectively. Political Reactions and Public Outrage Over Water Crisis The Bhagirathpura water outbreak has triggered nationwide outrage over the Indore water contamination. Opposition leaders, including Rahul Gandhi and Jitendra Patwari, blamed the Madhya Pradesh government for negligence. BSP chief Mayawati described the incident as a failure of basic civic services. Families affected, including one who lost a six-month-old child, rejected compensation, stating that money cannot replace their loss. Meanwhile, authorities continue working to restore safe water supply, rebuild public trust, and prevent further fatalities. The Indore water contamination remains a top priority for state officials.ains a top priority for state officials.

title: Himachal Pradesh: Student Dies Following Sexual Assault and Ragging; College Professor, Three Students Booked.
content: Himachal Student Dies After Ragging and Assault A 19-year-old Himachal student dies after ragging at a government college in Dharamshala, Himachal Pradesh. Her father alleged that three senior students — Harshita, Aakriti, and Komolika — physically assaulted her on September 18, while a college professor, Ashok Kumar, reportedly subjected her to obscene acts. The harassment caused severe mental stress, which worsened her health and eventually led to her death during treatment at a Ludhiana hospital on December 26, 2025. Authorities registered a case following the father’s complaint, highlighting the urgent need to address ragging and sexual harassment in Himachal colleges. Himachal Student Dies After Ragging and Assault A 19-year-old student of a government college in Dharamshala, Himachal Pradesh, died after ragging and sexual harassment. Her father alleged that three senior students — Harshita, Aakriti, and Komolika — beat her on September 18, while a professor, Ashok Kumar, subjected her to obscene acts. The victim’s mental health deteriorated due to the harassment, leading to her death during treatment at a Ludhiana hospital on December 26, 2025. Authorities registered a case after the father’s complaint. Consequently, the incident highlighted the urgent need to tackle ragging and sexual harassment in Himachal colleges. Police Book Students and Professor Over Himachal Student Ragging The police booked the three students for ragging and voluntarily causing hurt. Meanwhile, the professor faces charges of sexual harassment. Officials registered the case under Sections 75, 115(2), and 3(5) of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, along with Section 3 of the Himachal Pradesh Educational Institution (Prohibition of) Ragging Act, 2009. Superintendent of Police Ashok Ratan confirmed that investigators are reviewing medical records, video evidence, and witness statements. Earlier, a video recorded by the student before her death went viral, showing her accusing the professor of intimidation and harassment. College Proceedings and Academic Pressure on Himachal Student The student enrolled in the college in 2024 and faced ragging from senior students. However, she failed her BA first-year exams and stopped attending classes after July 2025. The college struck her name off the rolls in August. Later, she sought re-admission but was told she would advance only after clearing re-evaluation. The professor denied the allegations, claiming he was not teaching her in the current session. Some colleagues supported him. The incident has exposed serious gaps in anti-ragging enforcement across Himachal colleges. Leaders Demand Justice for Himachal College Student The case has drawn nationwide attention. Student groups and political leaders are demanding strict action. Moreover, ABVP state secretary Nancy Atal said the accused must face justice to prevent future incidents. Police continue investigating while collecting medical records, CCTV footage, and witness statements. Therefore, authorities aim to ensure accountability and prevent further deaths. The Himachal student’s tragic death underscores the urgent need for stricter anti-ragging and harassment measures across colleges.

title: Centre Orders X to Remove Obscene, Sexually Explicit Content Immediately.
content: Centre Directs X Remove Obscene Content The Centre ordered X to remove obscene content immediately from its AI platform. Officials cited users misusing AI tools like Grok to create or share illegal material. Additionally, MeitY asked X to submit a compliance report without delay. This action highlights the government’s firm stance against digital abuse and online harassment. Authorities aim to prevent AI platforms from harming users and protect citizens’ digital rights. AI Misuse Prompts X Content Removal MeitY reported that users exploit Grok AI to create fake accounts and post obscene images or videos targeting women. Moreover, the ministry emphasized that this misuse exposes weak safeguards and inadequate enforcement. Such actions violate Indian law and raise serious ethical concerns. Officials warned that platforms must strengthen moderation and prevent AI tools from facilitating harassment. Experts also noted that unchecked misuse of AI could undermine public trust in digital platforms. X Remove Obscene Content Under Platform Compliance Review The ministry directed X’s Chief Compliance Officer to conduct a thorough review of Grok AI. Consequently, X must remove or disable all unlawful content immediately. MeitY stressed that legal action could follow if the platform fails to comply. Furthermore, the compliance report must outline steps taken to prevent future misuse. The ministry also instructed X to enhance content moderation policies, improve reporting mechanisms, and ensure rapid response to complaints. These measures aim to protect users while promoting responsible AI deployment. Digital Safety: Ensuring X Content Removal and Oversight The government’s directive highlights India’s growing focus on digital safety. In addition, it sends a clear message to tech companies that they must enforce robust safeguards. Experts stated that platforms like X must actively prevent AI tools from enabling harassment or exploitation. Therefore, the government’s action reinforces accountability, safeguards citizens’ rights, and promotes ethical AI use. With AI technologies advancing rapidly, regulators plan continuous monitoring to ensure compliance and protect online users.

title: Iran Declares US Bases ‘Legitimate Targets’ After Trump’s ‘Locked and Loaded’ Warning Amid Tehran Unrest.
content: Iran US Bases Legitimate Targets Claim After Trump’s Warning Tensions between Iran and the United States rose sharply after Donald Trump warned that the US would intervene if Iranian forces used lethal force on peaceful protesters. In response, Iran’s parliament speaker said Iran US bases legitimate targets if Washington took aggressive action. A senior adviser to Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei also warned that US interference could spark chaos across the Middle East. These statements increased Iran–US tensions and stressed that authorities would treat any threats to US bases seriously. Tehran Unrest Expands as Iran Warns US Bases Protests erupted in Tehran after shopkeepers criticized the government for failing to control inflation and stabilize the currency. The rial dropped sharply, and inflation reached 42.5%, making daily essentials unaffordable. Demonstrations spread quickly to major cities. Security forces clashed with protesters, killing at least seven people. Several buildings sustained serious damage. Citizens demanded relief from rising prices and economic hardship. Officials repeated that US bases are considered legitimate targets if the US intervenes. These warnings turned domestic unrest into a regional concern. Economic Pressure Deepens Public Anger Amid US Base Threats President Masoud Pezeshkian acknowledged the public’s financial struggles. He said the government must act urgently but admitted that its options remain limited. The rial now trades near 1.4 million per US dollar, worsening the burden on families. Pezeshkian emphasized that authorities face rising Iran–US tensions and must balance public needs carefully. Officials continue to warn that Iran US bases legitimate targets remain a key deterrent. They link the economic crisis with repeated threats toward US bases as targets. Authorities Call for Calm While Emphasizing Iran US Bases Threats Iran’s prosecutor general said citizens can protest peacefully but warned that anyone creating insecurity will face strong action. Analysts note that ongoing protests, combined with repeated mentions of US bases as targets, could escalate Iran–US tensions further. Tehran continues to stress that Iran US bases legitimate targets in case of foreign intervention. Observers fear that even small missteps could worsen domestic unrest and regional instability.

title: BCCI Directs Kolkata Knight Riders to Release Bangladesh Pacer Mustafizur Rahman from KKR Squad for IPL 2026.
content: Why BCCI Releases Mustafizur Rahman from the Squad The BCCI releases Mustafizur Rahman from the Kolkata Knight Riders’ IPL 2026 squad after reviewing the recent unrest in Bangladesh. Board secretary Devajit Saikia confirmed that the board acted because several violent attacks on Hindus created a sensitive atmosphere. As a result, BCCI told KKR to release Rahman and pick a replacement. The decision has changed KKR’s planning for the season, and discussions around why the BCCI releases Mustafizur Rahman have spread quickly across the cricketing community. Political Debate Over Rahman’s KKR Exit The debate intensified once news broke that the BCCI releases Mustafizur Rahman from the franchise. KKR had purchased him for ₹9.20 crore during the Abu Dhabi mini-auction, but the choice drew criticism as India-Bangladesh tensions rose. Political leaders from the BJP and Shiv Sena questioned KKR and co-owner Shah Rukh Khan for signing a Bangladesh player during a period of unrest. Furthermore, the killing of Dipu Chandra Das and multiple reports of attacks against Hindus added more pressure on the team. Many critics argued that Rahman’s KKR exit was unavoidable, while others questioned whether the BCCI releases Mustafizur Rahman for cricketing or political reasons. India–Bangladesh Relations Affected by Rahman’s Release The situation escalated beyond the IPL as observers connected the move to wider diplomatic tensions. Several analysts pointed out that when the BCCI releases Mustafizur Rahman, it signals concern about the regional environment. India’s tour of Bangladesh in September 2026 has now come under the spotlight. Although the Bangladesh Cricket Board announced a schedule of three ODIs and three T20Is, uncertainty continues to grow. Last year, the tour was postponed due to unrest, and Rahman’s release has sparked new questions about whether cricket relations can continue smoothly. Rahman’s IPL Future After BCCI Releases Him Mustafizur Rahman’s future in the IPL now appears unclear. Before the BCCI releases Mustafizur Rahman, the Bangladesh Cricket Board had already granted him an NOC for the full season, even allowing him to skip the New Zealand series. Rahman played for Delhi Capitals in IPL 2025, taking four wickets in three matches. Across his career, he has played 60 IPL matches and claimed 65 wickets, representing several major teams including Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, Rajasthan Royals and Chennai Super Kings. However, as the BCCI releases Mustafizur Rahman from KKR, franchises will closely monitor how this decision affects future signings involving Bangladesh players.

title: Venezuela Declares National Emergency, Condemns US ‘Aggression’ After Caracas Blasts.
content: Why Venezuela Declares National Emergency After Caracas Blasts President Nicolas Maduro announced that Venezuela declares national emergency following explosions in Caracas early Saturday. Smoke rose at La Carlota airport, and witnesses reported low-flying aircraft. Meanwhile, emergency crews rushed to secure the area. Maduro called the blasts a direct threat to national security and urged residents to stay indoors. As a result, authorities implemented immediate measures to protect civilians and critical infrastructure. Political Reactions to Maduro’s National Emergency Announcement The government’s decision triggered strong reactions across Venezuela and beyond. KKR had signed him for ₹9.20 crore, but political leaders criticized the choice amid unrest. Furthermore, the Venezuelan government rejected what it called “military aggression” by the United States. Officials said the alleged attack aimed to seize the nation’s oil and mineral resources. Analysts noted that the emergency announcement highlights how political tensions are influencing national security decisions. Impact of the Emergency on Venezuela-US Relations The national emergency declaration also affects international relations. Maduro accused Washington of attempting to destabilize the country. Shortly after, the government issued warnings to US officials and called on the international community to condemn the alleged aggression. Last year, unrest forced India to delay cricket tours in similar volatile situations. At the same time, experts suggest the emergency could escalate tensions between Venezuela and the United States if no diplomatic measures are taken. Rahmen for Citizens After Venezuela Declares National Emergency Citizens were advised to stay indoors and follow government instructions. Emergency services worked to contain the situation at La Carlota airport and nearby areas. Meanwhile, the government pledged to update the public with new safety instructions. Maduro emphasized that protecting civilians and critical infrastructure remains the top priority. The Venezuela declares national emergency order marks one of the most serious national security alerts in recent years.

title: Shreyas Iyer Returns, Ruturaj Gaikwad Dropped as India Announces Squad for NZ ODIs.
content: Shreyas Iyer Returns in India’s New ODI Squad India announced its squad for the three-match ODI series against New Zealand, and Shreyas Iyer returns to the lineup after a long injury layoff. This comeback strengthens India’s middle order, especially as Iyer continues to wait for final fitness approval from the Centre of Excellence. His recovery from a serious spleen injury has taken months, and his return is one of the biggest developments ahead of the home series. Squad Changes as Iyer Makes His Comeback The selectors made several notable decisions as Iyer began his return. Mohammed Siraj rejoined the side after completing his rehabilitation, giving India a strong pace option. However, the squad announcement also meant exits for Ruturaj Gaikwad, Tilak Varma, and Dhruv Jurel. Gaikwad scored a century at number four in the last series, but the management preferred experience in this role now that Shreyas Iyer returns. Varma and Jurel, who had limited opportunities, will have to wait for future chances. Fitness Update as Shreyas Iyer Returns to Action Iyer’s comeback has been closely monitored throughout the past few months. Reports earlier mentioned weight-loss issues and delayed recovery, but his recent improvement gave selectors enough confidence to include him. Iyer may appear for Mumbai in the Vijay Hazare Trophy as part of his final fitness tests. Even though Shreyas Iyer returns to the squad, his involvement in the first ODI still depends on medical clearance. His presence, however, boosts India’s batting depth and stability. India Looks for Stability with Iyer’s Return The overall squad reflects a blend of reliability and emerging talent. Gill’s leadership continues, Siraj strengthens the attack, and Iyer’s return adds experience to the batting group. The absence of Gaikwad may invite debate, yet the team values Iyer’s proven ability to handle pressure in the middle overs. As Shreyas Iyer returns, India aims to regain rhythm and consistency before major tournaments. The New Zealand series will test both returning seniors and young players eager to secure their place in future squads.

title: First Supermoon of 2026 to Illuminate Skies on January 3: Timings and How to Watch in India.
content: Supermoon 2026: When and Where to Watch The first supermoon of 2026 will brighten the evening sky on January 3. Skywatchers across India can enjoy a stunning view. Also, this Moon, known as the Wolf Moon, will shine about 30% brighter and appear roughly 14% larger than the farthest full Moon of the year. As a result, it promises a spectacular sight. Near the horizon, the Moon will glow orange-yellow because moonlight passes through a thicker layer of Earth’s atmosphere. At its closest point, the Moon will be 362,641 km from Earth, making it one of the year’s most impressive lunar events. Best Time to Spot the Wolf Moon This supermoon concludes a four-month series that began in October. In India, the Moon rises between 5:45 pm and 6 pm IST, at full phase near perigee. Meanwhile, the global peak times vary. For example, New York will see it at 5:30 am EST, London at 10:03 am GMT, Tokyo at 7:30 pm local time, and Sydney at 9:03 pm. Therefore, early evening in India offers the most dramatic and photogenic views. Furthermore, the moon illusion makes the Moon appear larger near the horizon, enhancing its visual appeal. Viewing Tips for Skywatchers January’s full Moon is called the Wolf Moon, named after folklore of wolves howling during winter nights. In addition, some cultures call it the Moon after Yule. You can enjoy the supermoon with the naked eye. However, binoculars or a small telescope reveal lunar craters and finer details. A supermoon occurs when the full Moon aligns closely with perigee, the point in its orbit nearest Earth. As a result, tonight’s alignment makes it one of the year’s most impressive lunar events. Impact Beyond Its Beauty The supermoon can slightly affect Earth’s tides. For example, its stronger gravitational pull can cause slightly higher tides in oceans. Not all supermoons appear this close to Earth, which means tonight’s event is especially remarkable. In addition, the next supermoon is not expected until the end of 2026. Therefore, skywatchers in India have a rare opportunity to witness one of the year’s most memorable astronomical displays. Overall, this early-evening Moon will light up the sky and create an unforgettable experience for viewers.

title: US Launches Strikes on Venezuela: Maduro, Wife Indicted; Border with Brazil Closed.
content: US Strikes on Venezuela: Maduro Captured by Delta Force The United States launched strikes on Venezuela early Saturday, and President Nicolas Maduro was captured by US Delta Force troops. US President Donald Trump confirmed that Maduro and his wife, Cilia Flores, were taken into custody and flown out of the country. Meanwhile, Venezuela’s Vice President Delcy Rodríguez said the government cannot locate them and demanded proof of life. Explosions were reported across Caracas and nearby states, including Miranda, Aragua, and La Guaira. Residents described low-flying aircraft and loud blasts, while videos on social media showed explosions at Higuerote Airport. These events highlight the scale of the US strikes on Venezuela and their immediate impact. Global Reactions to US Strikes on Venezuela The US strikes on Venezuela drew widespread international condemnation. Russia, Iran, and the European Union urged restraint and warned the US not to interfere militarily in Venezuela. In addition, Brazil closed its border, and China advised its citizens not to travel. Brazilian President Lula and other leaders criticized the US action as crossing an “unacceptable line.” Spain offered to mediate for a peaceful solution, while Colombia deployed troops along its border. Analysts said Trump’s motives include seizing Venezuelan oil and targeting vessels linked to drug trafficking. Overall, global powers closely watched the results of the US strikes on Venezuela. Maduro’s Capture Prompts Domestic Response The Venezuelan government declared a national emergency and asked citizens and political groups to mobilize. Maduro, in power since 2013, faced repeated US pressure over alleged election rigging and corruption. Furthermore, opposition leaders and international observers accused Maduro’s administration of consolidating power undemocratically. US lawmakers, including Marco Rubio, stated Maduro will face criminal charges in the US. Venezuela’s Interior Minister called the attacks a violation of sovereignty, while Trump praised the operation as “brilliant.” These developments emphasize the significance of the US strikes on Venezuela for domestic politics. Ongoing Uncertainty and Regional Implications The situation remains fluid, with no independent verification of Maduro’s capture. Meanwhile, explosions, airstrikes, and border closures continue to disrupt life in Venezuela. The US embassy warned American citizens, and local authorities reported damage. Experts warn the strikes could destabilize the region, intensifying conflicts over resources and geopolitics in South America. In conclusion, the US strikes on Venezuela mark a historic escalation with far-reaching regional and international consequences.

title: Uttarakhand Minister’s Husband Sparks Outrage Over Bihar Girls Remark; BJP Distances Itself.
content: Political Storm Over Uttarakhand Minister’s Husband Remark The Uttarakhand minister’s husband remark by Girdhari Lal Sahu, husband of women and child welfare minister Rekha Arya, has triggered a nationwide political storm. Sahu allegedly suggested that girls from Bihar could be “brought for marriage” for ₹20,000–25,000. A video circulated on social media showing him addressing young men in Almora: “Will you get married in old age? If not, we will bring a girl for you from Bihar… you can get one there for ₹20,000 to 25,000.” He also said, “Come with me, we’ll get you married.” Meanwhile, Sahu apologized, claiming reporters misrepresented his words. “If my words offended anyone, I apologise with folded hands,” he added. BJP Condemns Controversial Statement by Sahu The BJP Uttarakhand unit condemned Sahu’s controversial statement, saying it does not reflect the party’s values. Spokesperson Manveer Singh Chauhan stressed that the BJP strongly opposes hateful statements against women. In addition, the Bihar State Women Commission announced it would issue a notice to Sahu. Chairperson Apsara criticized the remarks, calling them “highly condemnable” and highlighting the contradiction since his wife manages women and child welfare in Uttarakhand. Opposition Reacts to Bihar Girls Remark Opposition leaders attacked the Bihar girls remark, describing it as an insult to women. State Congress president Ganesh Godiyal said the statement reflects poorly on the party’s respect for women. Congress Mahila Morcha state president Jyoti Rautela added that such comments encourage social evils like human trafficking, child marriage, and exploitation. Furthermore, Bihar’s Leader of Opposition Tejashwi Yadav criticized the BJP’s mindset toward women from Bihar and referenced past allegations of vote-buying schemes in the state. Social Backlash and Wider Implications The Uttarakhand minister’s husband remark has triggered widespread outrage on social media. Citizens demanded strict action against Sahu. Analysts warned that statements like these, even from relatives of public officials, can erode trust in governance and fuel social divisions. As a result, political parties must respond decisively. Overall, Sahu’s apology attempts to calm tensions, but the backlash continues. Leaders, parties, and authorities remain under scrutiny for failing to act against statements that undermine women’s rights and dignity.

title: India Issues Advisory to Citizens After US Operation in Venezuela.
content: India Reaction to US Operation in Venezuela: MEA Issues Strong Advisory The India reaction to US operation in Venezuela became clear on Saturday as New Delhi issued a strong travel advisory following rising tensions in the South American nation. The US military operation that captured Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro and his wife created global shockwaves, prompting India to put the safety of its citizens first. The Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) urged all Indians to avoid non-essential travel and advised those already in Venezuela to remain extremely cautious. India’s Advisory Highlights Concern Over US Operation in Venezuela As the India reaction to US operation in Venezuela gained attention, the MEA stated that the volatile situation required immediate precaution. The advisory asked Indians to restrict their movements, stay indoors whenever possible, and maintain regular contact with the Indian Embassy in Caracas. This reflects India’s priority: protecting its nationals rather than commenting on the political crisis triggered by the US operation. The government also provided emergency contact details so citizens could quickly reach officials during any escalation. Global Context Behind India Reaction to US Operation in Venezuela The India reaction to US operation in Venezuela comes amid global criticism of Washington’s aggressive move. Several countries described the action as destabilizing, while others urged diplomatic solutions. India maintained its neutral and cautious stance, staying away from political commentary and focusing solely on the welfare of citizens abroad. The advisory is consistent with India’s policy of avoiding involvement in international military conflicts and ensuring the safety of its diaspora during global crises. India Strengthens Safety Measures as Venezuela Crisis Intensifies To support Indians affected by the situation, the MEA emphasized continued communication and urged them to follow updates from the embassy website and social media channels. The India reaction to US operation in Venezuela underscores New Delhi’s awareness of the rapidly shifting ground situation, including reports of airstrikes, movement restrictions, and disruptions across Caracas. By reinforcing safety protocols and maintaining active contact lines, India aims to safeguard its community until stability returns to Venezuela.

title: No Love Lost Between Ranbir Kapoor, Alia Bhatt, and Vicky Kaushal on ‘Love & War’ Sets: Report.
content: Ranbir Alia Vicky Love Work Smoothly on Sets Rumours of tension between Ranbir Kapoor, Alia Bhatt, and Vicky Kaushal on Sanjay Leela Bhansali’s Love & War sets have been dismissed. Sources told Mid-Day that the film’s production continues smoothly. The crew is currently on a scheduled year-end break, planned months ago. Meanwhile, the remaining shoot focuses on patchwork, VFX, select scenes, and musical sequences, typical of Bhansali’s grand-scale filmmaking. Fans following the project can rest assured that Ranbir Alia Vicky Love sets remain professional and committed. Filming Updates for Ranbir Alia Vicky Love The lead actors remain fully committed to completing Love & War. Filming will restart by mid-January and continue through March, while post-production progresses in parallel. Initially, the film was slated for a Christmas 2025 release; however, sources now suggest a tentative release on March 20, 2026. With around 75 days of shooting left, Bhansali has requested bulk dates from the actors. As a result, Ranbir Alia Vicky Love shooting schedules are carefully coordinated to ensure the film wraps efficiently by summer 2026. No Fallout Between Ranbir Alia Vicky Love Stars Despite earlier reports of a fallout, the production team clarified that the actors maintain a professional relationship. A source said, “Ranbir, Alia, and Vicky are fully on board and focused.” Additionally, long and demanding shoots sometimes create misunderstandings, which can lead to false rumours. Therefore, fans can rest assured that the lead trio is collaborating smoothly, and Ranbir Alia Vicky Love interactions on set remain positive and productive. Lead Actors’ Upcoming Projects While Love & War continues production, Ranbir Kapoor will play Lord Rama in Ramayana: Part One, directed by Nitesh Tiwari, releasing on Diwali 2026. The film also stars Sai Pallavi, Sunny Deol, and Yash. Meanwhile, Alia Bhatt will appear in YRF’s Alpha, an action-packed thriller alongside Sharvari and Bobby Deol, scheduled for 2026. Vicky Kaushal remains focused solely on completing Love & War during the current shooting schedule. Fans are excited to see Ranbir Alia Vicky Love on screen later this year.

title: Bangladesh Wants T20 World Cup Games Moved to Sri Lanka Following Mustafizur Rahman’s IPL Exit.
content: BCB Raises Safety Concerns for Bangladesh T20 Matches The Bangladesh Cricket Board (BCB) has decided to request the ICC to shift Bangladesh T20 matches from India to Sri Lanka. This comes after Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) released pacer Mustafizur Rahman from their IPL 2026 squad. The BCCI issued the directive due to political tensions and recent incidents in Bangladesh. Therefore, the BCB feels that playing Bangladesh T20 matches in India could put players at risk. Political Tensions Affect Bangladesh T20 Matches Recent attacks on minority Hindus in Bangladesh have strained relations with India. Moreover, criticism targeted KKR and co-owner Shah Rukh Khan over Rahman’s inclusion. This prompted the BCCI to ask for Rahman’s release. As a result, the BCB plans to write to the ICC, stressing safety concerns for Bangladesh T20 matches in Kolkata, where the team will play three opening games of the World Cup. Media Committee Chairman Amzad Hussain said, “We will write to the ICC regarding what has happened today.” Sports Adviser Supports Moving Bangladesh T20 Matches Bangladesh’s sports adviser, Asif Nazrul, urged the BCB to request a full relocation of Bangladesh T20 matches to Sri Lanka. He explained that if one Bangladeshi cricketer cannot safely play in India, the entire team may face dangers. In addition, Nazrul recommended halting IPL broadcasts in Bangladesh. Bangladesh will face the West Indies at Eden Gardens on February 7 for its first T20 match. Meanwhile, the BCB continues to prioritize player safety in all discussions about Bangladesh T20 matches. KKR Confirms Rahman Release Amid Controversy KKR confirmed Rahman’s release on Saturday under the BCCI’s directive. Consequently, the franchise will sign a replacement player under IPL rules. Rahman had joined KKR for INR 9.20 crore after a bidding contest with Chennai Super Kings and Delhi Capitals. With tensions rising, Bangladesh is taking proactive steps to ensure both the safety of its players and the smooth conduct of Bangladesh T20 matches in the World Cup.

title: Ready to face consequences if found guilty’: Accused professor speaks out in Dharamshala student death case.
content: The Dharamshala student death case probe has intensified across Himachal Pradesh. Assistant professor Ashok Kumar received anticipatory bail on Saturday. He rejected all allegations and said he is ready to face consequences if the law finds him guilty. The 19-year-old student died on December 26 during treatment in Ludhiana. Her father filed a complaint saying she faced ragging by three senior students and harassment by the professor. The incident triggered protests in Dharamshala and renewed questions on campus safety. Government Action in Student Death Case Probe The Himachal Pradesh government suspended the professor as the Dharamshala student death case probe moved forward. Kumar told reporters he had no link to the incident and said the student shifted to another teacher’s class this semester. He added that he had taught for 26 years without complaints. A video recorded by the student before her death went viral. In the clip, she accused the professor of mental harassment and inappropriate behaviour. Committees Reviewing Dharamshala Student Death Case Several committees are now examining the Dharamshala student death case probe. The state education department formed a four-member inquiry panel. It must submit a report within three days. Education minister Rohit Thakur said strict action would follow. The University Grants Commission also created a five-member fact-finding panel. It will examine the circumstances leading to the student’s death and any lapses by college officials. College Response During Ongoing Probe The college clarified the victim’s academic status during the Dharamshala student death case probe. Principal Rakesh Pathania said she passed her first year but failed three subjects. The college asked her to repeat the year.
