She attended some classes in the new session but did not complete re-admission. The college learned about the incident only when police arrived on December 22. Public pressure continues to grow as people demand justice and accountability.

title: South Korea’s President Lee Begins China State Visit After North Korea Fires Missiles.
content: Lee China Visit Missiles Shape Regional Security Concerns North Korea fired ballistic missiles on Sunday, just hours before South Korea President Lee Jae Myung started his state visit to China. Analysts said Pyongyang wanted to warn China and disrupt improving ties between Seoul and Beijing. The carefully timed launches increased pressure on President Lee as he began talks aimed at reducing tension and restoring regional dialogue. The incident also reminded the region that North Korea wants to shape the agenda whenever diplomatic momentum builds around peace. Lee China Visit Missiles Impact Seoul–Beijing Diplomacy This visit marks Lee’s first trip to China since he took office in June. His trip comes at a time of rising uncertainty across Asia. North Korea’s repeated missile tests and the recent U.S. attack on Venezuela have intensified global concern. Lee will meet Chinese President Xi Jinping for the second time in two months. The unusually short interval between meetings shows China’s renewed interest in expanding cooperation with South Korea, especially in tourism and trade. Tensions between China and Japan remain high after Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi hinted Tokyo could consider military action if China struck Taiwan. North Korea Missile Test Overshadows China Visit Public screens across Seoul replayed the missile footage throughout the day. The images highlighted the fragile security climate on the Korean Peninsula. Lim Eul-chul, a professor at the Institute for Far Eastern Studies, said North Korea wants to keep China at a distance from South Korea and challenge China’s position on denuclearisation. He added that the launches served as a strategic response to Beijing’s growing engagement with Seoul. Lee China Visit Missiles Trigger Strategic Responses Lee arrived in Beijing with a large business delegation of more than 200 South Korean leaders. The size of the group signals his intent to strengthen economic ties while pushing for regional stability. China’s state broadcaster CCTV said the two sides will discuss supply chain cooperation, digital economy projects, and new cultural exchange programs. Lee hopes stronger economic engagement will encourage China to take a more active role in managing tensions created by North Korea. South Korea–China Talks Continue Despite Missile Threat As both countries look for areas of cooperation, the missile tests remain a reminder of the challenges ahead. The outcome of Lee’s visit may influence not only bilateral relations but also the future of regional diplomacy.

title: Ranveer Singh’s Dhurandhar Becomes First Bollywood Film to Cross ₹800 Crore in India, Set to Overtake Pushpa 2 Record.
content: Dhurandhar Box Office Collection Crosses ₹800 Crore in India Aditya Dhar’s spy thriller Dhurandhar has made history by crossing ₹800 crore in India within 30 days. Since its release on December 5, Ranveer Singh’s high-energy performance and the gripping story have drawn huge audiences. Moreover, the record-breaking Dhurandhar box office collection establishes it as one of the highest-grossing Hindi films in domestic markets. Consequently, the movie now competes with Pushpa 2: The Rule, the only other Indian film to reach similar domestic numbers. Jio Studios Confirms Dhurandhar Earnings Milestone Jio Studios revealed that the Dhurandhar earnings reached ₹806.80 crore in India in just 30 days. The film earned ₹218 crore in week one, ₹261.5 crore in week two, ₹188.3 crore in week three, and ₹115.7 crore in week four. Meanwhile, ₹9.7 crore on Saturday and ₹12.6 crore on Sunday pushed totals higher. Furthermore, its worldwide earnings now stand at ₹1186.25 crore. This impressive performance highlights strong audience engagement and consistent footfall, making it one of the most successful Hindi films of recent years. Ranveer Singh Film Collection Surpasses Major Bollywood Hits The latest Ranveer Singh film collection places Dhurandhar ahead of Shah Rukh Khan’s Jawan (₹640 crore) and Vicky Kaushal’s Chhaava (₹600 crore). Moreover, this milestone strengthens Ranveer Singh’s position as one of Bollywood’s top stars. While Pushpa 2 still leads total domestic revenue, analysts predict that Dhurandhar earnings may soon challenge that benchmark. Therefore, sustained audience interest and repeat viewership will be key to breaking the next Hindi cinema box office record. Sequel Buzz Grows as Dhurandhar Breaks Box Office Records Aditya Dhar wrote, directed, and co-produced Dhurandhar, creating a thrilling spy-action universe. The film features Ranveer Singh, Akshaye Khanna, Sanjay Dutt, R Madhavan, and Arjun Rampal. Fans have praised its high-octane action and emotional storytelling. Additionally, the film’s success has fueled excitement for Dhurandhar 2, which releases on March 19, 2026. Consequently, the sequel is expected to continue the franchise’s record-breaking box office performance.

title: Priyanka Gandhi Gets Key Role in High-Stakes Election: Can She End Congress’ 10-Year Drought?
content: The Priyanka Gandhi Assam role has become central to the Congress strategy as the state heads toward the 2026 assembly elections. With the BJP ruling Assam since 2016, the Congress wants a fresh revival. Therefore, the party hopes that Priyanka Gandhi’s entry into Assam’s poll planning will energise workers and sharpen its election campaign. The Congress plans to contest the elections with support from other opposition parties. Through this alliance push, the party aims to weaken the BJP’s stronghold. Meanwhile, Priyanka Gandhi now leads the screening committee for candidate selection in Assam, giving her direct control over the early stages of campaign planning. Why Priyanka Gandhi’s Assam Role Is Crucial Assam is a key state where the Congress wants to regain lost ground. The last Congress government ended in 2016 when Tarun Gogoi stepped down. Since then, the BJP has expanded its influence. As a result, the Priyanka Gandhi Assam role gains extra importance for a Congress comeback. Gaurav Gogoi, son of Tarun Gogoi and Deputy Leader of Opposition in Lok Sabha, has emerged as the party’s top face. Priyanka Gandhi’s presence in Assam is expected to strengthen his fight against the BJP. Additionally, she will work with leaders like Imran Masood and Saptagiri Sankar Ulaka to select candidates and build alliances with smaller parties. The Congress believes Priyanka’s leadership style can create renewed momentum. In the last assembly election, the BJP-led alliance won 75 seats while the Congress-led bloc secured 50. Since the vote share difference was only 1.6%, the party feels the gap can narrow further under the Priyanka Gandhi Assam role. Challenges Priyanka Faces in Assam However, Priyanka Gandhi still carries the burden of past electoral setbacks. Her 2022 Uttar Pradesh campaign delivered poor results. Even so, she has recently taken a stronger position in national politics. She has attacked the BJP on voter roll revisions, the G Ram G bill and issues linked to Vande Mataram. These interventions helped increase her visibility. At the same time, the BJP has intensified its counter-attacks in Assam. Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma has targeted Gaurav Gogoi with sharp allegations. Although the Gogoi family denied the charges, the political tension continues. Even with these challenges, the Priyanka Gandhi Assam role remains vital for the Congress. If her strategy works, Assam may become the state where the party breaks its 10-year drought and stages a major comeback. — Zoom Chronicle News

title: All Airports in Greece Suspend Operations After Massive Radio Frequency Failure.
content: Air Travel Suspended Due to Greece Airport Radio Failure A Greece airport radio failure forced all major airports in the country to suspend flights on Sunday. The sudden disruption affected communication between aircraft and air-traffic controllers, creating nationwide chaos. Passengers at Athens International Airport and other terminals faced long queues as operations came to a standstill. This Greece airport radio failure is considered one of the largest air travel disruptions in Greece in recent years, highlighting the vulnerability of critical aviation communication systems. Many travellers expressed frustration on social media, posting images of crowded terminals and halted departures. Authorities Respond to Greece Airport Radio Outage Greece’s Civil Aviation Authority immediately launched an investigation into the radio outage. Officials said halting flights was necessary to ensure passenger safety. While a few overflights continued under close monitoring, most flights remained grounded. Engineers and technicians worked throughout the morning to locate the source of the failure. Authorities reassured the public that updates would follow once the technical issue is resolved. They also coordinated with airlines to manage passenger assistance and rerouting plans. International Flight Disruptions Amid Greece Airport Radio Failure The Greece airport radio failure caused disruptions beyond national borders. Several flights were diverted to neighbouring countries, including Cyprus, Turkey, and Italy. State broadcaster ERT reported that arrivals and departures had been suspended since 9 a.m. local time. Airlines across Europe issued warnings to passengers about possible cancellations and delays. Terminals quickly became overcrowded, with stranded travellers waiting for updates. Many airports activated contingency plans, and airline staff assisted passengers with rebooking and accommodation. Passengers Stranded as Greece Airport Radio Outage Persists Security check-ins at Athens International Airport were closed early Sunday, leaving many travellers stranded. Only a few pilots attempted manual landings, while most flights followed diversion protocols. The Civil Aviation Authority urged passengers to monitor airline updates for further changes. Meanwhile, the incident raised questions about Greece’s aviation infrastructure and its reliance on critical communication systems. Authorities continue working to restore normal operations as quickly as possible, aiming to minimise further delays and inconvenience. — Zoom Chronicle News

title: Deadly Nightclub Fires in Switzerland and Goa: How Indoor Fireworks and Flammable Roofs Sparked Tragedy.
content: Nightclub Fire Safety Risks in Switzerland Two deadly nightclub fires in Switzerland and Goa exposed serious nightclub fire safety risks. In Crans-Montana, Switzerland, 40 people died and over 100 were injured when sparkler candles on champagne bottles ignited a blaze at the Le Constellation bar. The fire spread quickly after contacting the club’s soundproofing foam. Additionally, narrow lanes and crowded spaces made evacuation extremely difficult. Authorities immediately investigated ceiling materials, crowd limits, and emergency exits to address fire safety hazards. Fire Safety Risks in Goa Nightclub Meanwhile, in Goa, a nightclub in Arpora caught fire during a belly dance performance, killing 25 people and injuring many others. Electrically detonated pyrotechnic guns likely ignited the bamboo, fibre, and straw ceiling. Moreover, stacks of alcohol and a highly flammable thatched roof accelerated the fire. Limited exits trapped partygoers, and fire tenders had to park far from the venue, which further delayed rescue operations. This incident highlighted how poor construction and pyrotechnic use increase nightclub fire safety risks. Investigations into Fire Safety Negligence Swiss authorities filed criminal charges against the bar operators for negligent homicide and bodily harm. Similarly, Goa police arrested eight people, including nightclub owners and staff, and issued a Blue Corner Notice against one accused. At the same time, investigators in both countries continue to examine operational negligence, structural flaws, and adherence to safety rules, emphasizing the need to reduce nightclub fire safety risks. Lessons for Nightclub Fire Safety Experts warn that indoor fireworks, flammable ceilings, and limited exits are major fire hazards. Therefore, tourist hotspots like Crans-Montana and Goa must enforce strict fire codes. Clubs should also install multiple emergency exits, use fire-resistant materials, and regulate pyrotechnic displays. Ultimately, addressing fire safety risks in nightclubs can prevent tragedies and protect partygoers worldwide.ant materials, and regulate pyrotechnic displays. Ultimately, addressing nightclub fire safety risks can prevent tragedies and protect partygoers worldwide.

title: Umar Khalid & Sharjeel Imam Await Crucial Supreme Court Verdict on Their Bail Pleas Today.
content: SC to Decide Key Bail Verdict in Delhi Riots Case The Supreme Court will deliver the Umar Khalid bail verdict today, ending years of anticipation for Khalid, Sharjeel Imam and five others charged under the UAPA. The bench reserved its decision on December 10 after detailed arguments from both sides. Because the case raises important questions about dissent, free speech and state authority, the verdict has drawn national attention. Background of the 2020 Conspiracy Case The decision comes nearly six years after the 2020 Delhi riots, which erupted during protests against the Citizenship (Amendment) Act. The violence left 53 people dead and caused widespread destruction across Northeast Delhi. Police claim the accused planned a larger conspiracy behind the unrest. However, the defence argues that investigators used selective video clips, short fragments of speeches and isolated WhatsApp chats without proper context. These opposing narratives have kept the case in the spotlight and added weight to the upcoming ruling. Legal Questions Shaping the Bail Decision During the hearings, the judges repeatedly questioned whether the allegations fit the UAPA’s definition of a “terrorist act.” Defence lawyers said that sharp criticism of government policies cannot be treated as terrorism. The prosecution, however, highlighted alleged calls for road blockades and speeches made before the riots. These contrasting positions have shaped the Umar Khalid bail verdict, as the court must determine whether the evidence meets the strict UAPA threshold. Why the Verdict Holds National and Global Importance The court’s decision will also impact co-accused Gulfasha Fatima, Meeran Haider, Shifa-ur-Rehman, Mohd Saleem Khan and Shadab Ahmed. International figures, including New York lawmaker Zohran Mamdani, have urged Khalid’s release. As a result, the Umar Khalid bail verdict is expected to influence future debates on civil rights, the policing of protest movements and the broader use of UAPA in India. With growing global focus on due process and accountability, the outcome may shape similar legal battles ahead.

title: Marco Rubio Walks Back Comments a Day After Trump Vows to ‘Run’ Venezuela.
content: Rubio Trump Venezuela Update: US Role Clarified A day after former President Donald Trump said the US would be “running” Venezuela following Nicolás Maduro’s removal, Secretary of State Marco Rubio clarified the administration’s position. He told CBS News the US would not govern Caracas directly. Instead, the US will enforce sanctions, including the oil quarantine, and pressure Venezuela to reform its oil sector and stop drug trafficking. Rubio aimed to calm concerns about a long-term military or nation-building intervention. Trump and Rubio on Venezuela: Key Updates Trump defended his remarks in Florida, saying the US would temporarily control the country until a “safe, proper, and judicious transition.” He highlighted his national security team, including Rubio, saying, “We’re gonna be running it… we’re gonna be bringing it back.” He also warned interim leader Delcy Rodriguez that failure to comply could bring harsher consequences than those Maduro faced. This became a major part of the Rubio Trump Venezuela update coverage. Rubio Trump Venezuela Update: Intervention Comparisons Rubio stressed the situation differs from Libya, Iraq, or Afghanistan interventions. “This is not the Middle East. Our mission is very different. This is the Western Hemisphere,” he said. He added that the US will monitor Caracas while allowing local leaders time to act. Moreover, he said the current US force posture is sufficient to intercept drug shipments and sanctioned oil vessels, with no immediate escalation planned. Rubio Trump Venezuela Update: Oil Blockade Pressure Rubio confirmed that the blockade on sanctioned oil tankers, some already seized by the US, will remain a key pressure point. As a result, the US expects Venezuela to reform its oil industry and curb illicit activities. Analysts say Rubio’s remarks signal a sanctions-focused strategy, while Trump emphasizes direct influence over transitional governance. Global observers continue monitoring this situation closely as part of the ongoing Rubio Trump Venezuela update. Rubio Pushes Back on Intervention Comparisons Rubio stressed the situation differs from interventions in Libya, Iraq, or Afghanistan. “This is not the Middle East. Our mission is very different. This is the Western Hemisphere,” he said. He added that the US will monitor Caracas while allowing local leaders to act. Moreover, the current US force posture is sufficient to intercept drug shipments and sanctioned oil vessels, with no immediate escalation planned. Analysts note this clarification is a critical element of the Rubio Trump Venezuela update. Oil Blockade Remains Key Pressure Point Rubio confirmed that the blockade on sanctioned oil tankers, some already seized by the US, will continue. As a result, the US expects Venezuela to reform its oil industry and curb illicit activities. Analysts say Rubio’s approach signals a sanctions-focused strategy, while Trump emphasizes direct influence over transitional governance. Observers worldwide are closely watching this development as part of the ongoing Rubio Trump Venezuela update.

title: Amitabh Bachchan Feels ‘Stuck’ After KBC 17 Shoot: Shares How Days Seem Too Long.
content: Amitabh Bachchan KBC 17 Finale Leaves Big B Feeling ‘Stuck’ With the finale of Kaun Banega Crorepati Season 17 wrapping up, Amitabh Bachchan has admitted that he feels “stuck” without the show’s daily routine. The finale aired on Friday night at 9 PM, marking the end of another memorable KBC season. Big B bid an emotional farewell to the show, thanking fans for their love and support throughout the season. Amitabh Bachchan KBC 17: Big B Shares Post-Show Reflections In his latest Tumblr blog post, the 83-year-old actor revealed the struggle of adjusting to life after KBC 17. He wrote, “It’s been hardly a few days since the season ended, and the days feel too long to bring back some work rhythm. No work feels like walking sluggishly through a vast, wet wasteland.” He added, “Stuck in it… I shall try my very best to pull my weary legs out and move.” Amitabh Bachchan KBC 17: Emotional Farewell on Finale During the final episode, Amitabh thanked the audience for their support. “Whenever I have said I am coming, you welcomed me with open arms. When I laughed, you laughed with me. When my eyes filled with tears, you shed tears too. You have been my companions from start to end. If you are here, this game exists. And if this game exists, then I exist. Thank you so much,” he said. The audience responded with loud applause and cheers. Amitabh Bachchan KBC 17 Star-Studded Guests Season 17 featured a host of celebrity guests, including Manoj Bajpayee, Jaideep Ahlawat, Farhan Akhtar, Javed Akhtar, Kartik Aaryan, Ananya Panday, and Amitabh’s grandchildren Agastya Nanda and Navya Nanda. Their presence made the season engaging and memorable for fans. Amitabh Bachchan KBC 17: Recent Work After the Show On the work front, Amitabh was last seen in the blockbuster sci-fi film Kalki 2898 AD, directed by Nag Ashwin. He played Ashwatthama alongside Prabhas, Deepika Padukone, and Kamal Haasan. The film grossed over ₹1,000 crore worldwide, earning Big B praise for his performance. Fans Eager for Amitabh Bachchan KBC 17 Return As Amitabh Bachchan navigates life post-KBC 17, fans eagerly await his return to television. Season 17 left a lasting impression, and Big B’s heartfelt moments continue to resonate with audiences.

title: Three Indian Siblings and Domestic Worker Killed in Abu Dhabi Car Crash.
content: Abu Dhabi Indian Crash Claims Four Lives The Abu Dhabi Indian crash early Sunday morning claimed the lives of three young siblings and their domestic worker. The Kerala-origin family was returning to Dubai after attending the Liwa Festival when their vehicle crashed on the highway. As a result, the Abu Dhabi Indian crash immediately shocked the Indian expatriate community, especially because the family had travelled from Ras Al Khaimah with their five children for the desert event. Three Children and Domestic Worker Die on the Spot The crash killed the children — Ashaz (14), Ammaar (12) and Ayyash (5) — along with their domestic worker, Bushra. Emergency teams quickly moved the injured survivors to a hospital in Abu Dhabi. Doctors are treating parents Abdul Latheef and Ruksana and their children Ezza (10) and Azzam (7). One child remains in critical condition. Relatives and friends rushed to the hospital soon after the Abu Dhabi Indian crash, offering immediate support. Family Requests Burial Permission in Abu Dhabi The grieving parents want to bury their three sons in the UAE. They believe that a burial in Abu Dhabi, where the Abu Dhabi Indian crash occurred, is more meaningful. However, this requires special approval, as expatriates must normally be buried in the emirate that issued their residency visa. Social workers are helping the family request the exemption. Meanwhile, arrangements for repatriating Bushra’s remains are underway. Community Supports Family After Abu Dhabi Indian Crash Volunteers and community organisations continue to support the family as they cope with the emotional shock of the Abu Dhabi Indian crash. Many UAE residents have offered help with medical care, legal procedures and funeral arrangements. The tragedy highlights the risks of late-night travel and the heavy toll such incidents take on expatriate families. Members of the Indian diaspora across the UAE are praying for the injured survivors and for strength for the grieving parents.

title: US Strikes on Venezuela: China Condemns ‘Bullying Act’, Voices ‘Grave Concern’ Over Maduro Capture – LIVE Updates.
content: China Strongly Condemns the US Operation Tensions escalated after US attacks Venezuela LIVE became the centre of global attention following the capture of President Nicolás Maduro. China condemned the military operation and called it a “bullying act” that violates Venezuela’s sovereignty. Beijing demanded Maduro’s immediate release and warned that the use of force against a sitting president was “deeply shocking.” Meanwhile, Maduro and his wife were taken to New York, where former US President Donald Trump said the US would temporarily manage Venezuela until a safe political transition begins. Venezuela Names Delcy Rodriguez as Acting President In response, to the US attacks Venezuela LIVE situation, Venezuela’s Supreme Court appointed Vice President Delcy Rodríguez as acting president. The court said it would soon decide on the legal steps needed to maintain continuity of the State. Consequently, the sudden removal of Maduro has created political uncertainty across the nation. As a result, authorities urged citizens to remain calm while institutions work to defend national sovereignty. Global Leaders Express Sharp Criticism International criticism grew rapidly after the US attacks Venezuela LIVE operation. Russia labelled the strike “an act of armed aggression” and warned of serious consequences. Similarly, China expressed grave concern and criticised the use of force against a sovereign nation. Brazil’s President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva said the bombing and capture “cross an unacceptable line.” Moreover, many nations warned that the action sets a dangerous precedent and could lead to wider instability. Therefore, global pressure on Washington continues to rise. India Urges Dialogue and Regional Stability India expressed deep concern over the US attacks Venezuela LIVE developments and urged all sides to seek a peaceful solution. In addition, New Delhi reaffirmed its support for the safety of the Venezuelan people. India encouraged dialogue to maintain peace in the region. Meanwhile, world leaders are closely watching how Washington proceeds and how international efforts may influence Venezuela’s political future.

title: Bangladesh Government Suspends IPL Broadcast ‘Until Further Notice’ as Mustafizur Rahman Row Escalates.
content: Bangladesh IPL Ban Comes After KKR Releases Rahman The Bangladesh government has imposed an IPL ban, stopping all telecasts and streaming of the Indian Premier League (IPL) in the country. The decision followed the release of Mustafizur Rahman from the Kolkata Knight Riders (KKR) squad. As a result, fans in Bangladesh can no longer watch IPL matches on TV or online platforms. Moreover, the move highlights the growing tension between Bangladesh and India. Public Sentiment Drives Bangladesh IPL Ban Officials said the BCCI’s decision to drop Rahman “pained and saddened” Bangladeshi cricket fans. However, no clear reason was provided for the exclusion. Consequently, public anger increased, and the government acted swiftly. Therefore, the Bangladesh IPL ban was enforced to reflect public sentiment and protect the nation’s cricket-following audience. In addition, authorities asked broadcasters to stop all IPL-related programs until further notice. BCB Requests ICC to Shift T20 World Cup Matches The controversy escalated after KKR released Rahman, who had been bought for INR 9.20 crore. Meanwhile, the Bangladesh Cricket Board (BCB) wrote to the International Cricket Council (ICC), urging a venue change for Bangladesh’s T20 World Cup matches from India to Sri Lanka. If approved, all Group C games—including matches against England, West Indies, Nepal, and Italy—will be played in Sri Lanka. This development further reinforces the significance of the Bangladesh IPL ban. Mustafizur Rahman Reacts to Sudden Release Mustafizur Rahman later expressed his helplessness, saying, “If they release me, what can I do?” Earlier, the BCB had cleared him to play the entire tournament. Rahman joined KKR after a heated bidding war with Delhi Capitals and Chennai Super Kings. Finally, his release has triggered a mix of political and sporting tension. As a result, the Bangladesh IPL ban and potential T20 World Cup venue changes have drawn global attention.

title: Hema Malini Explains Why She Held Two Separate Prayer Meets for Dharmendra: ‘We Spoke to Each Other…
content: Hema Malini Prayer Meets Spark Family Speculation Following the death of veteran actor Dharmendra on November 24, Hema Malini prayer meets were held to honour his memory. One was hosted by Hema Malini and her daughters at her Mumbai residence, while Dharmendra’s sons, Sunny and Bobby Deol, organised another event attended by Bollywood stars. As a result, rumours about a family rift began circulating. However, Hema Malini clarified that the separate prayer meets reflected personal and professional considerations, not any tension between the families. Actress Explains Her Prayer Meets in Mumbai and Delhi In an interview with The Times of India, Hema Malini explained, “Yeh humare ghar ka personal mamla hai (this is our family’s personal matter). We spoke to each other. I held a prayer meet at my home because my circle of people is different. Then I organised one in Delhi because I am in politics, and it was important for me to host a prayer meeting there for my friends from that field. Mathura is my constituency, and the people there are very fond of him. So I held a prayer meet there as well. I am happy with what I did.” She emphasised that the prayer meets addressed both personal and professional obligations, rather than family discord. Family Legacy Highlighted Through Prayer Events Hema Malini also shared that Sunny Deol plans to convert Dharmendra’s farmhouse into a museum to preserve his legacy. She reassured everyone about family unity, saying, “Everything is happening nicely. So there’s no need to worry ki yeh do alag families hai, pata nahi kya hoga. Kisiko itni fikr karne ki zaroorat nahi hai. Hum log ekdum achche hai (these are two different families, what will happen now? No one needs to worry that much. We are all fine).” Moreover, these prayer events highlighted the families’ respect and mutual support. Remembering Dharmendra Through Prayer Meets Dharmendra passed away at 89 in Mumbai. His sons Sunny and Bobby Deol hosted a prayer meet on November 27, attended by stars like Salman Khan and Amitabh Bachchan. Hema Malini and her daughters arranged additional prayer meets in Mumbai, New Delhi, and Mathura. Finally, these events celebrated Dharmendra’s life while allowing both sides of the family to honour him. He leaves behind two wives: Prakash Kaur, with four children, and Hema Malini, with daughters Esha and Ahana Deol.

title: Marty Supreme’, the film that won Timothée Chalamet the Best Actor award at Critics Choice, set for India release.
content: Timothée Chalamet’s Award-Winning Performance Arrives in India The Marty Supreme India release is creating huge excitement as Timothée Chalamet’s award-winning film heads to Indian theatres on January 23, 2026. The actor’s Critics Choice–winning performance has pushed Marty Supreme to the center of awards-season chatter, making the upcoming India release even more anticipated. A Powerful Story That Drives the Hype Marty Supreme follows Marty Mauser, a determined young man who refuses to drop his dream, even when people doubt him. This emotional core increases curiosity for the Marty Supreme India release. Josh Safdie directs the film, making it his first solo project after Uncut Gems. Furthermore, the film blends sports drama with thriller elements, giving the story a sharp and gripping rhythm. Gwyneth Paltrow, Fran Drescher, Tyler, the Creator, and Odessa A’zion join the cast, adding variety and strength to the film. Because of this ensemble, the Marty Supreme India date has become a major talking point among moviegoers. Chalamet’s Dedication Strengthens the Film Chalamet trained for almost six to seven years to perfect the table tennis sequences. Therefore, he performed every major match without using a double. Critics praised this dedication after the US release. Meanwhile, Chalamet thanked Safdie in his awards speech and called the film a relatable story of ambition. His remarks have boosted excitement around the Marty Supreme India release and encouraged fans to follow its awards journey. Why the Marty Supreme Release in India Matters The Marty Supreme India release is expected to draw strong theatrical turnout. Additionally, the film’s mix of ambition, conflict, and suspense appeals to Indian audiences who enjoy intense storytelling. Even so, the central theme remains Marty’s struggle to rise above mediocrity. With Oscar buzz building, the Marty Supreme release in India stands out as a top Hollywood event of 2026. Viewers can watch Chalamet’s acclaimed performance in cinemas on January 23.

title: Tension Erupts in Delhi’s Turkman Gate After Pre-Dawn Demolition of Encroachments Near Mosque.
content: Turkman Gate Demolition Clash Erupts in Pre-Dawn Drive Tension erupted in Old Delhi’s Turkman Gate Early Wednesday as the Turkman Gate demolition clash unfolded during a pre-dawn anti-encroachment operation. MCD teams arrived at 1:30 am—hours before the scheduled 8 am start—and began clearing structures near Masjid Syed Elahi. Local videos showed bulldozers razing parts of the area while police secured key points. Other clips showed police firing tear-gas shells as residents pelted stones, escalating the demolition clash. At least five police officers were injured during the unrest. Police Contain Turkman Gate Demolition Clash Delhi Police moved quickly to control the situation during the Turkman Gate demolition clash. Joint CP Madhur Verma said officers divided the area into nine zones, each supervised by an Additional DCP. Over ten companies of Delhi Police and the Rapid Action Force were deployed to maintain order. Officials also met local leaders and the Aman Committee to prevent escalation. Despite these efforts, some protesters threw stones, prompting police to use tear gas and batons to restore calm. Court Directive Sparks Anti-Encroachment Drive at Turkman Gate The MCD launched the drive after a High Court directive in November 2025, which eventually led to the Turkman Gate demolition clash. The court ordered MCD and PWD to clear 38,940 sq ft of encroachments at Ramlila Ground near Turkman Gate. A joint survey identified illegal extensions, including parts of a road, banquet hall, car park, and diagnostics centre. On December 22, 2025, MCD issued notices rejecting ownership claims beyond 0.195 acres near the mosque. Officials said the managing committee and Delhi Waqf Board could not produce valid documents, creating the legal basis for the clash. Residents React to Turkman Gate Demolition Clash Many residents stayed indoors as the Turkman Gate demolition clash unfolded. A 32-year-old shopkeeper near the mosque told Zoom Chronicle News that he and his family stayed awake all night. “People threw stones, and police fired tear gas. We didn’t leave our home,” he said. Calm returned by morning, but locals remain cautious. Police continue monitoring the area as tensions persist and legal disputes around the demolition progress.

title: Will Dhurandhar 2 Include Another Flipperachi Song? Fa9la Speaks.
content: Bahrain-based singer-producer Flipperachi, whose real name is Hussam Aseem, has been thrilled with the response to his hit track Fa9la from Dhurandhar. The song, picturised on actor Akshaye Khanna, became a nationwide sensation. Moreover, Flipperachi revealed that his social media inboxes overflow daily with messages praising the track. “To be honest, it’s crazy. My DMs are blowing up every single day. People keep tagging me and enjoying the song. So, it has been a crazy, crazy time,” he shared. Flipperachi Hints at a New Song in Dhurandhar 2 When asked if another song will appear in Dhurandhar 2, Flipperachi remained coy but confirmed the possibility. “I was going to keep it a surprise, but there’s something. I wouldn’t reveal everything, but yes, there might be a new track,” he said. In addition, fans of Fa9la can expect another musical highlight in the sequel. In the first film, Fa9la played during Akshaye’s introduction as Rehman Dakait and became one of the most popular sequences. Meanwhile, excitement among audiences continues to grow. About Dhurandhar and Its Star-Studded Sequel Dhurandhar 2 promises action and intrigue. The film stars Ranveer Singh, Akshaye Khanna, Sanjay Dutt, Arjun Rampal, Rakesh Bedi, and Manav Gohil. The story follows covert intelligence operations linked to historical events like the Kandahar plane hijack, the 2001 Parliament Attack, and the 26/11 Mumbai terror attacks. As a result, the sequel has already generated high expectations. It will release on March 19 in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, and Malayalam, giving fans multiple viewing options. Dhurandhar’s Box Office Success and Anticipation The first Dhurandhar set a strong box office record. Furthermore, it became the only Hindi film to register double-digit collections for 28 consecutive days. According to Sacnilk.com, it earned ₹781.75 crore nett in India since its release on December 5. Consequently, with the massive popularity of Fa9la, fans eagerly await whether Flipperachi will deliver another hit song in Dhurandhar 2. Also, anticipation for the soundtrack continues to grow as the release date approaches.

title: Supreme Court Slams Rich for Misusing Writ Petitions in PMLA Cases.
content: SC Flags Rising Abuse of Writ Petitions The Supreme Court criticized the growing trend of PMLA trial writ misuse. Moreover, the bench observed that many wealthy accused rush to file writ petitions once the Enforcement Directorate begins action. Meanwhile, the CJI highlighted that these litigants try to delay criminal trials by challenging the law itself. As a result, the Court stressed that every accused must stand trial like ordinary citizens. Legal processes cannot bend for the rich. Furthermore, the judges warned that repeated misuse of writ petitions could weaken public confidence in the legal system. Bench Rejects Challenge to Section 44(1)(c) The Court made these remarks while hearing a plea by lawyer Gautam Khaitan. He questioned the validity of Section 44(1)(c) of the PMLA. This provision allows one special court to handle both the money-laundering case and the linked scheduled offence. However, the bench refused to entertain his writ. It noted that similar issues are already pending in the review of the Vijay Madanlal Choudhary judgment. Therefore, filing fresh writs only encourages PMLA trial writ misuse and slows down the legal process. In addition, the judges emphasised that constitutional remedies must be used responsibly and not as tools to bypass justice. CJI Calls for Fewer Parallel Challenges During the hearing, the CJI warned against using writs to stall trials. He also said repeated constitutional challenges harm the justice system. The bench advised Khaitan to raise his arguments in the ongoing review matters. In addition, the Court noted that such misuse affects the pace of PMLA proceedings. By highlighting PMLA trial writ misuse, the Court sent a strong signal to high-profile litigants. Moreover, the judges made it clear that the courts will not tolerate attempts to delay proceedings through technicalities. Larger Review of PMLA Framework Ahead The Supreme Court will soon resume hearings on pending PMLA review petitions. Many petitioners challenge key provisions, including the ED’s powers and strict bail rules. Consequently, the Court emphasised the need to maintain discipline in legal challenges. Finally, the warning about PMLA trial writ misuse underlines that trials must proceed smoothly without unnecessary delays. Additionally, the Court reiterated that wealthy accused must face trials like any other citizen, ensuring fairness and upholding public trust.

title: Hindu Man in Bangladesh Dies After Jumping into River to Escape Mob Over Theft Allegation, Police Say.
content: Hindu Man Dies in Bangladesh After Jumping into Pond to Escape Mob A Hindu man in Bangladesh, Mithun Sarkar, died after jumping into a pond to escape a mob accusing him of theft, police said on Wednesday. The incident happened in Naogaon district. According to Police Superintendent Mohammad Tariqul Islam, the mob chased Sarkar, and he drowned while fleeing. “A mob chased him. He jumped into the water and died. Police recovered his body with help from the fire service. We are conducting a post-mortem and investigating the case,” he added. Rising Violence Against Hindus This attack is the latest in a wave of violence against Hindus after student leader Sharif Osman Hadi died in December. Earlier, on December 18, a mob lynched Dipu Chandra Das over false blasphemy rumors. They tied his body to a tree and set it on fire. Since then, attackers have targeted multiple Hindu residents, raising fear among minority communities. In addition, local authorities have struggled to prevent further attacks. Recent Attacks on Hindu Business Owners Violence against Hindu business owners has escalated across Bangladesh. On Monday night, attackers killed 40-year-old grocery shop owner Moni Chakraborty in Charsindhur Bazar, Narsingdi, using a sharp weapon. Meanwhile, hours earlier, unidentified men shot Rana Pratap Bairagi, a Hindu businessman and acting newspaper editor in Jessore, in the head. Following these incidents, earlier in January, attackers hacked and set Khokon Chandra Das, 50, on fire. Similarly, on December 24, they allegedly lynched Amrit Mondal over extortion claims in Rajbari town. As a result, repeated attacks have alarmed residents and highlighted the urgent need to protect minority communities. Calls for Immediate Action Human rights organizations have demanded that the government take strong measures to protect minority communities and arrest the attackers. However, the rising attacks show that without swift action, more Hindus could face similar threats. In addition, locals fear that continued violence will leave minority communities increasingly vulnerable.

title: Fadnavis Slams BJP Leaders for Congress Alliance, Warns Action.
content: Fadnavis Slams BJP Leaders Over Congress, AIMIM Tie-Ups; Warns Strict Action Maharashtra chief minister Devendra Fadnavis on Wednesday warned BJP leaders after reports of local tie-ups with the Congress and AIMIM. He said the BJP “can never form an alliance” with either party. He called the alliances “unacceptable” and said they violated party discipline. Fadnavis issued immediate instructions to undo the arrangements. He also confirmed that the party will act against leaders who approved these decisions without permission. Fadnavis Calls the Alliances a Serious Breach Fadnavis said the senior leadership never cleared the alliances in Ambernath or Akot. He said local leaders acted without approval and broke party rules. Earlier, BJP members in Ambernath joined the Congress and the Ajit Pawar-led NCP under the ‘Ambernath Vikas Aghadi’. They sidelined the Shiv Sena in the process. Meanwhile, BJP leaders in Akot created the ‘Akot Vikas Manch’ with the AIMIM and several smaller groups. Fadnavis said these steps damaged internal discipline and created confusion within the party. Opposition Criticises BJP for Violating Coalition Dharma The opposition reacted immediately. Shiv Sena (UBT) MP Sanjay Raut accused the BJP of opportunism. He said the party joins hands with anyone “to grab power”. Sena MLA Dr Balaji Kinikar said the move betrayed “coalition dharma”. He added that the alliances contradicted the BJP’s “Congress-mukt Bharat” message. Despite the criticism, the Ambernath alliance did shift the results. The BJP-Congress-NCP front won 31 of the 60 seats. Meanwhile, the Shiv Sena became the single largest party with 27 seats. BJP’s Tejashree Karanjule Patil then won the council president post. Alliance Moves Strain Mahayuti Relations The issue has now raised concerns within the Mahayuti alliance. The coalition includes the BJP, Eknath Shinde’s Shiv Sena, and Ajit Pawar’s NCP. These unexpected alliances created new friction between the partners. In Akot, the BJP-AIMIM bloc won the mayor’s post. BJP’s Maya Dhule took charge after the group registered its alliance with district officials. As a result, party leaders expect disciplinary action soon. Many believe the BJP will tighten internal control to avoid similar incidents. The controversy has also pushed the Mahayuti to review its coordination strategy before upcoming elections.

title: Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal Reveal Son Vihaan Kaushal in First Photo.
content: Katrina Vicky Son Vihaan Revealed in First Photo Katrina Vicky's son Vihaan has finally been introduced to fans as the couple shared his first photo on Instagram. Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal posted a tender picture holding their newborn’s tiny hand and described him as their “ray of light.” Moreover, the reveal ended weeks of anticipation and quickly became one of the most loved celebrity moments online. First Glimpse of Katrina Vicky Son Vihaan Melts Hearts Online The photo of Katrina Vicky's son Vihaan spread quickly across social media, and reactions poured in almost instantly. Bollywood celebrities like Parineeti Chopra, Bhumi Pednekar, and Dia Mirza added heartfelt wishes. Furthermore, fans praised the name Vihaan, noting that it means “sunrise.” Many also pointed out the interesting coincidence that Vicky’s character in the film Uri was named Vihaan, adding to the emotional connection. Moreover, the picture symbolized warmth, hope, and new beginnings. Fans and Celebrities Celebrate the Arrival of Vihaan Kaushal Messages filled the comment section as fans celebrated Katrina and Vicky’s joyful moment. Meanwhile, many appreciated the couple’s decision to share a peaceful and simple introduction rather than a big announcement. Additionally, several fans admired Vihaan’s tiny hand and described it as a symbol of pure innocence. The overwhelming response reflected the strong bond the couple shares with their audience. Consequently, Vihaan’s reveal became one of the most loved social media moments of the week. Katrina and Vicky’s Journey to Welcoming Son Vihaan Katrina Kaif and Vicky Kaushal first met at an award show, where a casual introduction turned into a memorable connection. Later, they began dating and kept their bond private until they married in December 2021 in Rajasthan. In September 2025, they announced Katrina’s pregnancy, and excitement grew steadily afterward. Finally, on November 7, 2025, they welcomed their baby boy with immense joy. Therefore, by revealing Katrina Vicky son Vihaan through a gentle and intimate photo, the couple shared a moment that fans will cherish for years.

title: Forced Into Hotel Room’: National Shooting Coach Accused of Sexual Assault on Minor Athlete.
content: Police Act on Family’s Complaint National Shooting Coach POCSO case has emerged in Haryana after police booked a national-level shooting coach for allegedly sexually assaulting a minor woman shooter at a hotel in Faridabad last month. The incident reportedly took place on December 16, a day after the athlete competed in a national shooting competition in New Delhi. Haryana Police registered the case at the Women’s Police Station in NIT Faridabad following a detailed complaint filed by the athlete’s family. Investigators confirmed that the athlete was a minor at the time of the alleged offence. Coach Called Athlete for “Performance Review” The FIR states that the accused coach asked the athlete to meet him at a Surajkund hotel. He was staying there during the competition period. The coach allegedly said he wanted to analyse her performance. He also offered to discuss shooting techniques. The competition took place at the Dr Karni Singh Shooting Academy in New Delhi. The family alleged that the coach later pressured the athlete to go to his room. He claimed the discussion would be better in private. Police said the accused is among 13 national pistol coaches appointed by the NRAI. Threats and Assault Alleged According to the complaint, the coach assaulted the athlete inside the hotel room. The FIR says she tried to resist him. The accused allegedly ignored her resistance. He also threatened to ruin her sporting career. The complaint states that he warned of harm to her family. The athlete left the hotel in shock soon after the incident. She later told her family about what happened. After discussions, the family decided to approach the police. CCTV Footage Sought as Probe Continues Faridabad Police have sought CCTV footage from the hotel. Officers want to confirm the timeline of events. Police are also recording witness statements. “We asked the hotel to provide CCTV footage without delay,” said Yashpal Yadav, Faridabad Police PRO. The accused has not been detained so far. Police have also not issued a notice yet. Investigators said they have not informed the sports federation. The case includes charges under Section 6 of the POCSO Act. Police also invoked Section 351(2) of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita.

title: Veteran Ecologist Madhav Gadgil Dies in Pune After Brief Illness.
content: Madhav Gadgil Environmental Legacy in Grassroots Conservation Veteran ecologist Madhav Gadgil passed away in Pune at the age of 83 after a brief illness. His son, Siddhartha Gadgil, confirmed the news. Known for his bottom-up approach to conservation, Gadgil shaped India’s environmental movement. His work connected science with local communities and influenced generations of environmentalists. Madhav Gadgil Environmental Legacy continues to inspire grassroots initiatives across India. He emphasized that protecting ecosystems must go hand-in-hand with supporting local livelihoods. Western Ghats and Madhav Gadgil Environmental Legacy Gadgil chaired the Western Ghats Ecology Expert Panel in 2011. The panel’s Gadgil Report recommended declaring 75% of the Western Ghats as environmentally sensitive. His warnings about infrastructure and industrial projects proved prescient after floods and landslides affected the region. Despite opposition from states, Gadgil’s vision emphasized protecting biodiversity while empowering local communities. This commitment forms a central part of his environmental legacy, influencing environmental debates and policy decisions even today. Global Recognition for Madhav Gadgil Environmental Legacy A “people’s scientist,” Gadgil worked with tribal and farming communities to conserve forests, wetlands, and ecosystems. He authored seven books and over 225 scientific papers. In 2024, the United Nations Environment Programme named him one of six “Champions of the Earth,” highlighting his lifelong dedication. Gadgil also contributed to India’s Biological Diversity Act. His research and advocacy strengthened policies and programs that benefit both nature and people, solidifying the Madhav Gadgil Environmental Legacy. A Life Dedicated to Nature and Science Born in Pune in 1942, Gadgil developed an early love for nature through his birdwatcher father. He studied in Pune, Mumbai, and Harvard University, earning a doctorate in mathematical ecology. He spent 31 years at the Indian Institute of Science, Bengaluru, founding the Centre for Ecological Sciences. Gadgil’s work across ecology, anthropology, and public policy reflects the depth of his environmental legacy. He is survived by his family; his wife, monsoon scientist Sulochana Gadgil, passed away last year. His teachings and writings will continue to inspire scientists, policymakers, and conservationists for decades to come. title: Trump Backs Bill Proposing 500% Tariff on India Over Russian Oil Purchases.
content: White House Signals Support for New Sanctions Washington, January 8 — US Senator Lindsey Graham said President Donald Trump has “greenlit” a bipartisan sanctions bill targeting buyers of Russian oil. The proposal is formally known as the Sanctioning Russia Act of 2025. Under the plan, the US could impose tariffs of up to 500%. These penalties would apply to countries trading in Russian petroleum, gas and uranium. As a result, the Trump India Russia tariff debate has gained global attention amid the ongoing Ukraine war. What the Proposed Legislation Seeks to Do According to Graham, the bill would give President Trump broad powers. Specifically, it would allow him to “punish countries” buying cheap Russian oil. During a recent meeting, Graham said Trump approved the legislation. He described the talks as productive. Moreover, the bill has been under preparation for several months. If momentum continues, Congress could vote on it as early as next week. Trump India Russia tariff Proposal Targets Oil Trade In addition, Graham said the legislation would create leverage over major Russian oil buyers. Notably, he named India, China and Brazil. According to the senator, discounted oil revenue continues to fund Russia’s military operations. Therefore, the Trump India Russia tariff strategy aims to cut off that income. The bill also allows secondary sanctions. As a consequence, companies involved in transporting or trading Russian exports could face penalties. Trump India Russia tariff Push Grows Despite Peace Efforts Previously, the sanctions bill faced delays in Congress. At that time, President Trump preferred diplomacy over sweeping penalties. However, fighting has continued with limited progress toward peace. Because of this, support for tougher economic action has increased. Still, the bill must clear both chambers of Congress. If approved, it could strain trade ties with India and other buyers of Russian oil. Meanwhile, the administration says diplomatic efforts to end the war will continue.

title: Who Was Agnivesh Agarwal? Anil Agarwal’s Son Dies at 49 After Cardiac Arrest.
content: Agnivesh Agarwal Death News: Vedanta Chairman’s Son Dies at 49 Agnivesh Agarwal death news shocked the nation on Wednesday as Vedanta Group chairman Anil Agarwal announced the sudden demise of his son. Anil called it the “darkest day” of his life. Agnivesh, aged 49, passed away due to cardiac arrest in the United States. Earlier, he had been recovering from a skiing accident at Mount Sinai Hospital in New York. However, despite initial signs of recovery, his health worsened suddenly, leading to his untimely death. Who Was Agnivesh Agarwal and His Journey Specifically, Agnivesh Agarwal was born in Patna, Bihar, on June 3, 1976. From childhood, he showed leadership qualities and compassion. He studied at Mayo College in Ajmer and later founded Fujairah Gold. In addition, he served as Chairman of Hindustan Zinc, a flagship company of the Vedanta Group. Moreover, he was admired for his humility, warmth, and ethical approach to business. His story has become central in Agnivesh Agarwal death news reports across India. Family Shares Grief and Memories of Agnivesh Agarwal In an emotional post on X, Anil Agarwal wrote, “We believed the worst was behind us. But fate had other plans.” He described Agnivesh as a sportsman, musician, and leader. Yet, beyond achievements, he remained warm and deeply human. Agarwal said his son was not only his child but also his friend and pride. As a result, the family is devastated. The story of Agnivesh’s life and passing dominates Agnivesh Agarwal death news updates. Tributes Pour in Following Agnivesh Agarwal Death Agnivesh shared the family’s philanthropic vision. Referring to him as ‘Agni’, Anil Agarwal said his son pledged that over 75% of their earnings would go back to society. Meanwhile, Prime Minister Narendra Modi expressed condolences, calling his death “deeply shocking and saddening.” Finally, Agarwal thanked friends and well-wishers, promising to carry forward his son’s “light.” Overall, this continues to make headlines as Agnivesh Agarwal death news spreads worldwide.

title: Trisha Paytas Announces Run for Congress: ‘It Came to Me in a Dream.
content: Trisha Paytas Run Congress: Plans 2026 Political Bid YouTuber-turned-actor Trisha Paytas is turning her attention to politics. The 37-year-old influencer revealed she is considering a 2026 congressional bid in California. She lives there with her husband Moses Hacmon and their three children. Trisha shared the news in a video titled 2026 MANIFESTATIONS uploaded on January 5. Filming from her car, she said, “I would love to run for a seat in the U.S. House of Representatives.” She added the idea “came to me in a dream” and that she wants to make a real difference. From YouTube Star to Trisha Paytas Political Bid Trisha later shared a TikTok expanding on her plans. Becoming a mother in 2022 changed her perspective. “I never thought of myself as political until I started having kids,” she said. She added that the world could be disastrous by the time her children grow up. The dream to represent California felt vivid, she said. She is already researching the process of running for Congress. This includes filing nomination papers or collecting signatures to appear on the ballot. Campaign Goals for Trisha Paytas Run Congress If she runs officially in November 2026, Trisha must file a declaration of candidacy. She will need to pay a $1,740 fee or gather the required signatures by March 6. She could also run as a write-in candidate. However, she would need a top-two finish in the primary to advance. Trisha said she wants to raise the minimum age for the adult entertainment industry to 25. Her campaign slogan could be: “California could be good. It could be good. Just need a better system for everyone.” A Busy Year Ahead for Trisha Paytas Trisha’s political plans come amid a busy schedule. She recently completed a three-week Broadway run in Beetlejuice, marking her stage debut. She is also set to appear in HBO’s Euphoria season three this spring. Previously, she expressed political opinions across party lines. In 2012, she endorsed Mitt Romney and in 2016, Donald Trump. She later retracted support in 2019. Her announcement has created a stir online, as fans await updates on whether she will officially file for Congress.

title: ED vs Mamata Banerjee: Agency Says I-PAC Chief Raids Were Peaceful Until CM Arrived with Police Force.
content: ED vs Mamata Banerjee: Agency Says I-PAC Raids Were Peaceful The Enforcement Directorate (ED) on Thursday said search operations at locations linked to I-PAC chief Pratik Jain in Kolkata remained peaceful. However, the agency claimed the situation changed after West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee arrived with a large police contingent. The ED conducted the raids as part of a money laundering probe linked to alleged coal smuggling. Meanwhile, Mamata Banerjee rejected the agency’s version and described the action as politically motivated. As a result, the ED vs Mamata Banerjee standoff intensified ahead of the Assembly elections. ED Cites Coal Smuggling and Hawala Links According to the ED, the searches focused on individuals who generated proceeds from illegal coal mining. Investigators alleged that hawala operators routed the money to several entities, including I-PAC. The agency claimed these transactions involved tens of crores of rupees. I-PAC works closely with the ruling Trinamool Congress (TMC) and manages its IT and media operations. Therefore, the ED said the searches formed a crucial part of its financial trail investigation. Officials also stated that teams faced no resistance before the chief minister reached the premises. Mamata Banerjee Visits Pratik Jain’s Residence Meanwhile, Mamata Banerjee arrived at Pratik Jain’s residence around noon on Thursday. Kolkata Police Commissioner Manoj Verma had reached the spot shortly before her arrival. The chief minister stayed inside for nearly 20 to 25 minutes. Later, she emerged holding a green folder. Speaking to reporters, Banerjee accused ED officials of seizing party documents and digital data. She said the material contained sensitive information related to TMC’s candidates and election planning. Consequently, she claimed she retrieved the documents during her visit. CM Attacks BJP, Warns of Political Fallout Subsequently, Mamata Banerjee accused the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) of using central agencies to intimidate opposition parties. She challenged the BJP to defeat the Trinamool Congress through democratic means. “If you cannot fight us politically, why come to Bengal using agencies?” she asked. Moreover, she addressed Prime Minister Narendra Modi directly and urged him to rein in the Union home minister. Warning the BJP, Banerjee said such actions would hurt the party’s electoral prospects. Meanwhile, the ED said it would continue its probe, keeping the ED vs Mamata Banerjee clash firmly in the political spotlight.

title: Megha Agarwal, Meesho Top Executive with ₹2.29 Crore Salary, Resigns.
content: Megha Agarwal Resigns as Meesho CXO with ₹2.29 Crore Salary E-commerce major Meesho announced on January 7 that Megha Agarwal, Chief Experience Officer (Business), has resigned. However, the company did not provide a reason for her exit. It also said it would disclose more details “at an appropriate time.” Meanwhile, Meesho has not confirmed whether it has identified a successor. This leadership change comes at a critical moment as the company adjusts to life after its December 2025 IPO. Who is Megha Agarwal? Megha Agarwal joined Meesho in September 2019 and worked with the company for over six years. During this time, she held several leadership roles, including chief of staff, vice president and general manager – user growth, and CXO-growth. In October 2023, she became CXO (Business). In addition, Agarwal earned a BTech in Electrical Engineering (Power) from IIT Delhi and a master’s degree in management from INSEAD. Before joining Meesho, she worked at A.T. Kearney Consulting (India) and Nomura Financial Advisory & Securities (India). Compensation and Contributions In FY25, Agarwal earned ₹2.29 crore, which included a variable pay of ₹9.4 lakh for FY24, paid in FY25. She significantly contributed to Meesho’s growth, strategy, and business operations. Notably, analysts say executive exits attract attention, especially in tech firms that recently went public. As a result, her departure is viewed as a key leadership change while the company navigates investor expectations and competition in India’s e-commerce sector. Meesho’s Growth and IPO Context Meesho, founded by Vidit Aatrey and Sanjeev Kumar, operates an asset-light e-commerce platform connecting consumers, sellers, logistics partners, and content creators. In addition, the platform focuses on affordable fashion, home and kitchen products, beauty, and lifestyle items. Its IPO in December 2025 was fully subscribed on the first day, offering shares at ₹111 each and valuing the company at $5.6 billion. Subsequently, Agarwal’s exit marks an important leadership shift as Meesho continues to expand in India’s value-driven e-commerce market.

title: After Tilak Varma Injury, India Turns to Shreyas Iyer for T20 World Cup Squad.
content: Tilak Varma Injury: Shreyas Iyer Set to Join India’s T20 World Cup Squad India faces a potential setback in its T20 World Cup build-up as Tilak Varma experienced severe pain while playing for Hyderabad in the Vijay Hazare Trophy and required surgery. Doctors diagnosed him with testicular torsion and performed the operation successfully. However, selectors remain concerned about his recovery and whether he can join the squad in time. If Tilak cannot recover, India may need to make a last-minute change to their World Cup line-up. Shreyas Iyer: The Ideal Replacement Selectors appear to favor Shreyas Iyer as Tilak Varma’s replacement. Iyer naturally bats at No.3/4 and thrives in the crucial middle-overs phase. He reads the field, manages spin-heavy periods, and accelerates at key moments—mirroring Tilak’s role in the squad. Moreover, Iyer has recent form, scoring 82 off 53 balls for Mumbai in the Vijay Hazare Trophy. The BCCI’s Centre of Excellence has cleared him fully fit, ensuring he can step in without doubts about readiness. Maintaining Squad Balance Choosing Iyer allows India to retain their planned batting order. Many alternatives excel as openers, but selecting them would force reshuffling and create role confusion. Iyer fits seamlessly into the top-four position and handles the middle-overs responsibilities effectively. By keeping the team’s strategy intact, he provides clarity and stability for selectors and the squad, reducing last-minute decision-making pressures. Why Not Shubman Gill? Some may wonder why Shubman Gill isn’t the replacement. However, selectors already left Gill out of the T20 World Cup squad, with Ishan Kishan and Sanju Samson projected as openers. Adding him now would disrupt the top-order balance. In contrast, Iyer directly fills the missing role—a top-order batter and middle-overs problem solver. As the 2024 IPL winning captain and consistent performer, he brings both experience and tactical stability if Tilak is sidelined.

title: Golden Globes 2026: Priyanka Chopra Joins Julia Roberts, Clooney as Presenter.
content: Golden Globes 2026 Reveals Power-Packed Presenter Lineup The Golden Globes 2026 has officially announced its presenter lineup, placing global star Priyanka Chopra Jonas among Hollywood’s biggest names. On Thursday, the organisers shared the update on their official X account. As a result, anticipation for the 83rd annual ceremony has surged worldwide. The awards will take place this weekend in the United States and will air early Monday morning in India. Priyanka Chopra Stands Alongside Hollywood Icons Priyanka Chopra will present awards alongside Julia Roberts, George Clooney, Mila Kunis, Ana de Armas, and Jennifer Garner. Moreover, the extended list includes Amanda Seyfried, Ayo Edebiri, Charli xcx, Chris Pine, Dakota Fanning, Dave Franco, Colman Domingo, and Hailee Steinfeld. In addition, Jason Bateman, Kevin Bacon, Kevin Hart, Joe Keery, and Judd Apatow will also appear on stage. Meanwhile, stars such as Miley Cyrus, Melissa McCarthy, Orlando Bloom, Pamela Anderson, Queen Latifah, Regina Hall, Snoop Dogg, Zoë Kravitz, and Will Arnett further strengthen the lineup. Overall, the list reflects a blend of cinema, music, comedy, and pop culture. Ceremony Details and Broadcast Information Meanwhile, comedian Nikki Glaser will return as the host for Golden Globes 2026. Dick Clark Productions is producing the event once again. The ceremony will air live on Sunday at 5 pm PT and 8 pm ET on CBS. Additionally, Indian viewers can tune in at 6:30 am IST on Monday. For digital audiences, the show will also stream on Paramount+ in the United States. Priyanka Chopra’s Upcoming Film and Series Lineup Beyond the awards night, Priyanka Chopra remains busy with major global projects. She will soon make her Telugu film debut in SS Rajamouli’s Varanasi, starring Mahesh Babu and Prithviraj Sukumaran. Notably, the film is slated for a Sankranti 2027 release. Additionally, she will return in Citadel Season 2 and star in The Bluff alongside Karl Urban. Most recently, she appeared in the action thriller Heads of State with Idris Elba and John Cena, further cementing her international presence.uence across global cinema.

title: Poland Backs India Amid Trump’s Tariff Threats Over Russian Oil.
content: Poland Backs India Tariffs Amid Trump’s Russian Oil Threats Poland has publicly backed India amid growing tensions between New Delhi and Washington over Russian oil imports. The support came during India’s first-ever engagement with the Weimar Triangle, a key European political grouping. Polish Foreign Minister Radoslaw Sikorski said Warsaw was “satisfied” with India’s recent reduction in Russian oil purchases. His remarks come as US President Donald Trump renews threats of punitive tariffs against countries continuing energy trade with Moscow during the Ukraine war. India-US Tensions Rise Over Russian Oil Imports External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar represented India at the landmark meeting in Paris. He held discussions with French Foreign Minister Jean-Noel Barrot, Polish counterpart Radoslaw Sikorski, and German representatives. Notably, this marked India’s inaugural participation in the Weimar Triangle format. The grouping, formed in 1991 by France, Germany, and Poland, focuses on European integration, security cooperation, and geopolitical coordination, particularly on Russia and Ukraine. According to Sikorski, India’s presence reflected growing strategic trust between New Delhi and Europe. He also confirmed plans to continue talks during his upcoming visit to India next week. Poland Supports India on Tariffs During Weimar Triangle Talks Meanwhile, India-US relations have faced fresh strain following Donald Trump’s sharp remarks on Russian oil imports. Trump has warned of tariffs as high as 500 per cent on countries that “knowingly purchase” Russian oil or uranium. Earlier, his administration imposed a 25 per cent reciprocal tariff on Indian goods. It later added another 25 per cent penalty linked to Russian oil purchases, pushing total duties on some exports to 50 per cent. Republican Senator Lindsey Graham said Trump had cleared bipartisan legislation allowing such penalties after a “productive” meeting, with a vote expected soon. Europe Signals Diplomatic Balance Despite US pressure, Poland’s remarks signal a more balanced European approach toward India. Sikorski acknowledged that India had already reduced its dependence on Russian crude, calling it a positive step. He also noted that continued dialogue remained essential amid shifting global alliances. For India, the Weimar Triangle engagement underscores its growing role in multilateral diplomacy beyond traditional blocs. At the same time, New Delhi continues to navigate complex energy needs while managing pressure from Western partners. As global geopolitics hardens, Poland’s backing offers India diplomatic breathing space amid escalating tariff threats from Washington.

title: 3 Indians Among Crew of Russian Oil Tanker Seized by US: Report.
content: 3 Indians Among Crew as US Seizes Russian Oil Tanker Marinera Three Indian nationals were among the 28 crew members onboard the Russian-flagged oil tanker Marinera seized by the United States in the North Atlantic. US military and Coast Guard forces intercepted the vessel after tracking it from the Caribbean Sea. Officials said the tanker had alleged links to Venezuela, which remains under heavy US sanctions. The seizure has triggered diplomatic tension, with Russia strongly objecting to the operation. Tanker Evaded Blockade Before Seizure According to reports, the tanker operated earlier under the name Bella 1 and sailed under the Guyana flag. It later changed its name to Marinera and adopted the Russian flag while attempting to evade US maritime enforcement. The crew included 17 Ukrainian nationals, six Georgians, two Russians, and three Indians. US officials said the vessel slipped through a maritime blockade and ignored repeated Coast Guard orders to stop. Eventually, US forces boarded the tanker in international waters. Soon after, Russia’s transport ministry confirmed it had lost contact with the ship. US Explains Operation, UK Offers Support Meanwhile, US authorities confirmed the seizure of two sanctioned oil tankers linked to Venezuela. Along with Marinera, officials also seized the Panama-flagged tanker M Sophia. US Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem said both vessels had either docked in Venezuela or were en route there. She praised the Coast Guard for pursuing Bella 1 across rough seas, even as the vessel attempted to change its identity. Additionally, the United Kingdom confirmed it provided logistical and basing support after receiving a formal US request. Russia Calls Seizure ‘Piracy’ Russia reacted sharply to the incident. Senior lawmaker Andrei Klishas described the seizure as an act of “outright piracy.” Moscow argued that the US violated international maritime law by boarding a civilian vessel in international waters. Russian officials also demanded humane treatment for all crew members, including the Indian nationals. The incident marks a rare escalation, as analysts note this appears to be the first US military seizure of a Russian-flagged vessel in recent memory. As global sanctions enforcement intensifies, the case could further strain already fragile geopolitical relations

title: Toxic Director Geetu Mohandas Hails Yash as Rare Talent-Star.
content: Toxic Director Geetu Mohandas Calls Yash a Rare Blend of Talent and Superstardom Toxic: A Fairytale for GrownUps, starring Yash in the lead, remains one of the most anticipated releases of the year. The gangster drama is scheduled to hit theatres on March 19. On January 8, coinciding with Yash’s birthday, the makers unveiled the film’s teaser, instantly sparking buzz. Around the same time, director Geetu Mohandas shared a heartfelt note on Instagram, praising Yash and reflecting on their creative collaboration. Her words offered rare insight into the actor’s process and presence on set. ‘A Rare Fusion of Talent and Superstardom’ In her post, Geetu Mohandas described Yash as “a rare fusion of talent and superstardom,” calling the combination formidable. She said she felt immense pride not only in his performance as Raya but also in the discipline and commitment he brought to the project every day. According to her, Yash didn’t merely perform a role but carved a lasting chapter into his artistic legacy. She highlighted how he constantly questioned, challenged, explored, and surrendered, always in service of the story. For Geetu, this approach elevated the film beyond performance into pure storytelling. ‘I Felt Supported Throughout the Journey’ Moreover, Geetu revealed that her collaboration with Yash allowed her to discover him not just as an actor but also as a deeply supportive producer. She said his faith in her vision made the creative journey profoundly meaningful. Despite his immense fame, she noted that many often overlook the depth beneath the surface. She credited long conversations, shared belief, and mutual trust as the foundation of their partnership. Expressing gratitude, she said the friendship and artistry they built would stay with her long after the cameras stopped rolling. Teaser Hints at Dark, Violent World of Toxic Meanwhile, the teaser for Toxic offered a glimpse into its dark and violent universe. It opens at a heavily guarded funeral before shifting to an explosion that sets off chaos. Yash appears as gangster Raya, emerging shirtless before donning a black overcoat and gunning down his enemies. The teaser ends with the chilling line, “Daddy’s home.” Co-written by Geetu Mohandas and Yash, the film boasts a strong ensemble cast including Nayanthara, Kiara Advani, Tara Sutaria, Huma Qureshi, Akshay Oberoi, Sudev Nair, and Rukmini Vasanth.

title: PSL Auction vs IPL: Why the 100x Money Gap Is So Stark.
content: PSL Expansion Exposes IPL’s Massive Financial Edge Zoom Chronicle News: The Pakistan Super League (PSL) expansion in 2026 has clearly highlighted the enormous financial gap between T20 leagues and the Indian Premier League (IPL). On January 8, 2026, the Pakistan Cricket Board sold two new franchises as the league expanded to eight teams. Hyderabad went for PKR 1.75 billion, while Sialkot fetched PKR 1.85 billion. At January exchange rates, the prices translate to roughly $6.25 million and $6.61 million, or INR 56–59 crore per team. These numbers reflect PSL’s growth, but they remain modest by global standards. IPL’s Founding Auction Still Towers Over PSL To make a fair comparison, analysts converted all values into US dollars and adjusted older figures for inflation. During the IPL’s first auction in 2008, Mumbai Indians and Royal Challengers Bangalore sold for about $111–112 million each. Rajasthan Royals closed at $67 million. After adjusting for inflation using US CPI data, those figures rise sharply in 2026 terms. Mumbai and Bangalore reach nearly $168 million, while Rajasthan crosses $101 million. Even after adjustment, an IPL founding franchise costs 16 to 27 times more than a new PSL team. Recent IPL Expansion Shows a 100x Difference The valuation gap becomes even wider when compared with IPL’s latest expansion. In 2021, Lucknow Super Giants sold for INR 7,090 crore, while Ahmedabad went for INR 5,625 crore. Using January 2026 exchange rates, Lucknow stands near $789 million and Ahmedabad near $626 million. In contrast, PSL’s Hyderabad franchise costs less than $7 million. As a result, Lucknow’s entry fee stands about 126 times higher, while Ahmedabad’s price remains nearly 100 times greater. Why the Gap Is Structural, Not Temporary According to Zoom Chronicle News, this gap reflects structural strength rather than market hype. The IPL earns massive broadcast and digital rights revenue. Central revenue sharing ensures predictable cash flows for teams. Franchises also generate income through sponsorships, hospitality, and merchandising. Moreover, the IPL markets itself as a global entertainment brand. PSL continues to build momentum, but its valuations reflect a developing ecosystem. In short, PSL offers entry into a growing league, while IPL franchises operate as global sports assets.

title: Iran Protest Escalates: Internet Shutdown After Exiled Prince’s Call.
content: Iran Protests Escalate as Economic Crisis Triggers Nationwide Unrest Iran has seen its largest anti-government protests in two weeks, as public anger against clerical rule intensified. The unrest began on December 28 with strikes at Tehran’s Grand Bazaar. It has since grown into a nationwide movement. Protesters blame a collapsing economy, soaring inflation, and the falling rial. On Thursday, rallies erupted across major cities. The scale of participation marked a sharp escalation in the standoff between citizens and the government. Authorities struggled to contain crowds as anger spilled onto the streets. Death Toll Rises as Security Forces Tighten Grip The Human Rights Activist News Agency (HRANA) reported 42 deaths between December 28 and January 8. The victims include 29 civilians, eight security personnel, and five minors. Meanwhile, Iran Human Rights, a Norway-based NGO, said 13 protesters died in a single day. Security forces launched widespread arrests to curb unrest. More than 2,277 people have been detained so far. The list includes students and minors. Reports also claim that state media aired forced confessions. These actions further fueled public outrage and fear. Protests Spread Nationwide Amid Internet Blackouts Demonstrations spread to 46 cities across 21 provinces, including Tehran, Mashhad, and Abadan. Kurdish regions also joined the protests with market shutdowns. Videos showed massive crowds chanting slogans and confronting security forces. However, the government moved swiftly to restrict communication. Internet watchdog NetBlocks confirmed a nationwide internet blackout. It called the move an escalation of digital censorship. The shutdown disrupted coordination and reporting. Still, protests continued despite the blackout. This showed the depth of public anger and resilience. Global Pressure Mounts as Trump Issues Warning The internet shutdown drew strong criticism from exiled crown prince Reza Pahlavi. He accused the regime of silencing the nation. He urged European leaders to support Iranian protesters. He also called for accountability. Meanwhile, US President Donald Trump issued a sharp warning to Tehran. He said Washington would act forcefully if authorities continued killing civilians. His statement increased international pressure on Iran. As protests intensify and deaths rise, the crisis now poses one of the biggest challenges to Iran’s leadership in years.

title: The Raja Saab Review Live: Prabhas Film Opens to Packed Houses.
content: Prabhas Returns to Family Entertainment with The Raja Saab The Raja Saab marks Prabhas’ return to theatres after nearly two years and arrives as the first major Indian release of 2026. Directed by Maruthi, the horror comedy opened to packed houses across multiple regions on its first day. Fans welcomed the actor’s shift back to a family-friendly role after a decade dominated by mass action films. Social media buzz quickly branded the film as the comeback of “vintage Prabhas,” praising his lighter tone and expressive performance. Early trade indicators suggest strong momentum, especially in Telugu-speaking markets. Massive Haveli Set Adds Visual Grandeur The film’s scale stands out as one of its biggest talking points. The makers constructed a massive haveli on the outskirts of Hyderabad, which ranks among the largest indoor film sets ever built in India.
