title: Delhi Man Dies After Falling into Ditch, Contractor Knew but Failed to Alert: DCP.
content: Eyewitness Alert Ignored After Midnight Accident A tragic accident in Delhi’s Janakpuri area claimed the life of bank employee Kamal Dhyani after he fell into a 15-foot-deep construction pit late Thursday night. The pit had been dug for a sewer pipeline rehabilitation project under the Delhi Jal Board. According to police, an eyewitness named Vipin Singh saw the motorcycle plunge into the ditch shortly after midnight. He immediately informed a security guard, who then alerted a site worker named Yogesh. However, despite this warning, no rescue effort followed. As a result, valuable time was lost, which later proved fatal. Worker Informed Contractor, But No Emergency Call Made Further investigation revealed that Yogesh contacted sub-contractor Rajesh Kumar Prajapati at around 12:22 am. He informed him about the fallen motorcycle and the presence of a person inside the pit. Soon after, Prajapati reached the spot with his colleagues. Nevertheless, he failed to inform the police or call emergency services. Instead, he allegedly left without taking action. Consequently, authorities remained unaware of the incident until nearly eight hours later. Police officials confirmed that mobile records and surveillance data supported this sequence of events. Family’s Search and Delayed Discovery Meanwhile, Kamal Dhyani’s family began searching for him when he did not return home. They visited several hospitals but found no accident record. Later, police used mobile location data to trace his last position. Together with family members, officers searched the Janakpuri area for hours. Eventually, they located the construction site where the accident occurred. Although the family alleged delay in police response, officials denied negligence. They stated that standard procedures were followed during the initial missing person inquiry. Arrest, FIR, and Action Against Officials Following the investigation, police arrested sub-contractor Rajesh Kumar Prajapati for negligence. They also launched a search for site worker Yogesh. Furthermore, authorities registered an FIR under Section 105 of the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita for culpable homicide. In addition, officials suspended three Delhi Jal Board engineers linked to the project. Police are now examining CCTV footage and awaiting the post-mortem report. Meanwhile, senior officers have assured strict action against all responsible parties to prevent similar tragedies in the future.

title: Bengaluru Woman Shares Monthly Expenses, Borrows ₹30,000 from Mother.
content: Bengaluru Woman’s Budget Breakdown Goes Viral During Unemployment A 30-year-old unemployed woman from Bengaluru has gone viral after sharing her monthly expense details on Instagram. The video, posted by content creator Nikita (@social_coded), highlights how she manages her finances after seven months without a job. Moreover, her honest breakdown has sparked widespread discussion about financial planning, family support, and survival in a high-cost city. In the video titled “January expense breakdown in unemployment,” Nikita explains her income sources. These include parental support, emergency savings, and limited earnings from LinkedIn consulting. Notably, she revealed that she borrowed ₹30,000 from her mother to cover expenses. As a result, many viewers connected with her struggles and praised her transparency. How Nikita Managed Her Monthly Expenses Nikita shared a detailed account of her spending for January. Her monthly rent stood at ₹13,000. In addition, she paid for utilities such as electricity, Wi-Fi, phone recharge, water, and gas. Together, these formed a major part of her fixed expenses. Meanwhile, food expenses reached ₹8,402, covering groceries and occasional dining. Transport and other miscellaneous costs added ₹4,284. Furthermore, she spent ₹5,000 on healthcare and self-care services, including facials and massages. Shopping expenses amounted to ₹1,398, while movies and social outings cost ₹1,331. Balancing Savings, Investments, and Regrets Despite financial pressure, Nikita continued to invest in her future. She contributed ₹2,000 to Systematic Investment Plans (SIPs). However, she admitted regretting spending ₹800 on an astrology app. According to her, the month turned out to be “expensive” after adding all costs. Social Media Reactions and Financial Advice Soon after the video gained traction, social media users flooded the comments section with advice and encouragement. Many shared similar experiences of relying on family during difficult times. Others suggested exploring online teaching, freelancing, and remote work opportunities. Some viewers also expressed interest in her LinkedIn consulting work and asked for guidance. Meanwhile, others applauded her honesty and resilience. Overall, her story has started meaningful conversations about money management, career setbacks, and emotional support. As unemployment and rising living costs affect many young professionals, Nikita’s experience reflects a growing reality. Ultimately, her viral post highlights the importance of transparency, adaptability, and family backing in challenging times.

title: Bhooth Bangla Release Date Changed Again, Akshay Kumar Film to Arrive Early.
content: Bhooth Bangla Release Date Advanced: Akshay Kumar’s Film to Arrive Early Fans are eagerly waiting to see Akshay Kumar return to the horror-comedy genre with Bhooth Bangla. Earlier, Balaji Motion Pictures had announced that the film would release in May 2026. However, the makers have now revised the schedule once again. On February 7, they confirmed that the movie will hit theatres earlier than planned, on April 10, 2026. Notably, the film marks the reunion of Akshay Kumar and director Priyadarshan after nearly 14 years, raising expectations among fans and industry observers alike. Teaser Hints at New Release Date Meanwhile, Akshay Kumar revealed the updated release date through a creative teaser on social media. The short clip featured a black cat scratching a calendar page marked “May.” Soon after, the calendar flipped to April, with milk spilling over the page highlighting the date “10.” As a result, fans quickly decoded the message. In his caption, Akshay wrote, “Bhooth Bangla ka countdown rewind! 15 May ❌, 10 April ✅. Milte hain theatres mein.” Consequently, the post went viral, drawing massive engagement and excitement across platforms. Makers Explain Reason Behind Date Change Furthermore, the producers issued an official statement explaining the decision. According to them, the shift aims to secure a favourable theatrical window and avoid heavy box-office competition. By moving the release forward, the team hopes to give the film sufficient screen time and better visibility. In addition, Akshay Kumar has reportedly ensured that each of his upcoming films receives proper theatrical exposure. With several big projects lined up in 2026, this strategic move reflects careful planning and long-term vision. Star-Studded Cast and Big Expectations Apart from Akshay Kumar, Bhooth Bangla features an impressive ensemble cast including Tabu, Wamiqa Gabbi, Paresh Rawal, Rajpal Yadav, Mithila Palkar, Jisshu Sengupta, and Asrani. Producer Ektaa Kapoor also expressed her excitement, calling the project a long-awaited reunion. Moreover, the film, produced by Balaji Telefilms and Cape of Good Films, wrapped shooting in May last year across Rajasthan, Jaipur, and Hyderabad. With Priyadarshan’s direction, a strong cast, and growing fan buzz, Bhooth Bangla now stands as one of the most anticipated Bollywood releases of 2026.

title: IND vs USA Live, T20 World Cup 2026: Suryakumar Yadav Hits Gritty Fifty in Tough Chase.
content: Early Collapse Puts India Under Pressure India’s T20 World Cup 2026 campaign began on a shaky note at the Wankhede Stadium after USA captain Monank Patel won the toss and opted to bowl first. From the start, USA’s bowlers applied pressure. Abhishek Sharma departed for a golden duck, while Ishan Kishan fell for 20. Soon after, Tilak Varma and Shivam Dube perished in consecutive deliveries. As a result, India slipped to 46/4 inside the powerplay. Moreover, tight lines and sharp fielding from the USA side forced repeated mistakes. Consequently, the hosts struggled to build momentum in the opening overs. Middle-Order Failures Deepen the Crisis After the early setback, Rinku Singh and captain Suryakumar Yadav tried to steady the innings. Initially, they rotated strike and avoided risky shots. However, Rinku failed to handle the pressure and fell for just six runs. Shortly after, Hardik Pandya also departed cheaply, leaving India reeling at 77/6. Meanwhile, USA bowlers Mohammad Mohsin and Harmeet Singh maintained discipline and controlled the middle overs. As wickets continued to fall, India’s hopes rested firmly on their skipper. Suryakumar and Axar Lead the Recovery Despite the collapse, Suryakumar Yadav showed remarkable composure. He anchored the innings and found support in Axar Patel. Together, they built a crucial partnership that revived India’s chances. Gradually, Suryakumar shifted gears and began attacking the bowlers. His clean hitting lifted the run rate and restored confidence. However, the momentum slowed again when Harmeet Singh dismissed Axar in the 17th over. Still, Suryakumar remained unfazed and reached his half-century in just 36 deliveries, guiding India past 125. Opening Match Sets the Tone for India’s Campaign This match marks India’s first major test in the T20 World Cup 2026 under a refreshed squad. With Jasprit Bumrah rested due to illness, the bowling attack lacked its usual edge. Meanwhile, USA impressed with disciplined bowling and fearless intent. Although India stumbled early, Suryakumar’s leadership prevented a complete collapse. Going forward, India must improve their top-order consistency and shot selection. Otherwise, stronger opponents could exploit similar weaknesses. Nevertheless, the captain’s fighting knock sends a positive message as India look to build momentum in the tournament.

title: Iran Says U.S. Military Deployment ‘Does Not Scare Us’ as Trump’s ‘Armada’ Approaches.
content: Iran Rejects US Pressure as Nuclear Talks Resume Iran on Sunday reaffirmed its firm stance during renewed nuclear negotiations with the United States. At the same time, the country said it will not surrender its uranium enrichment programme. Moreover, it refused to bow to military intimidation. Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said Tehran has little trust in Washington. In addition, he questioned whether the US is sincere about diplomacy. While speaking at a forum in Tehran, he stressed that Iran’s sovereignty remains non-negotiable. ‘Military Deployment Does Not Scare Us’: Araghchi Meanwhile, Araghchi dismissed the recent US military build-up in the Middle East. According to him, Iran remains unmoved by Washington’s show of force. For example, referring to the arrival of the USS Abraham Lincoln in the Arabian Sea, he remarked, “Their military deployment in the region does not scare us.” Furthermore, he added that Iran will not change its policies under threat. As a result, he stressed that foreign powers cannot dictate Iran’s decisions. Uranium Enrichment Declared a Matter of Sovereignty Notably, the foreign minister ruled out any compromise on uranium enrichment. Instead, he called it a matter of national dignity. In other words, Araghchi said enrichment reflects Iran’s independence. “No one has the right to dictate our behaviour,” he stated. At the same time, Iran is seeking relief from US sanctions. In return, it has offered limited confidence-building measures. However, continued sanctions have raised doubts in Tehran. Similarly, military pressure has weakened trust in talks. Trump’s ‘Armada’ and Rising Diplomatic Pressure Meanwhile, the renewed talks in Oman follow months of rising tensions. Previously, these tensions increased after last year’s conflict involving Israel and Iran. Despite this, Donald Trump has reinforced military pressure. For instance, he deployed a powerful naval fleet in the Gulf. Moreover, senior US officials recently visited the carrier group. Trump described it as an “armada.” Meanwhile, Washington imposed fresh sanctions and tariffs. Consequently, these measures have tightened economic pressure on Tehran. At the same time, Iran continues to coordinate with China and Russia. However, it still rejects talks on missiles and regional groups.

title: PCB May Reverse T20 World Cup Boycott in 24 Hours, Decision Hinges on PM Shehbaz Sharif.
content: PCB Awaits PM Shehbaz Sharif’s Call on India Match With the India-Pakistan clash in the T20 World Cup just days away, uncertainty continues to surround Pakistan’s participation. The marquee match is scheduled to be held at the R Premadasa Stadium in Colombo. However, questions remain over whether Pakistan will take the field. To resolve the impasse, the International Cricket Council (ICC) sent a two-member delegation to Lahore on Sunday to hold talks with Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) chairman Mohsin Naqvi. ICC Delegation Meets Mohsin Naqvi in Lahore The ICC delegation, led by Deputy Chairman Imran Khwaja and Associate Members’ representative Mubashir Usmani, met Naqvi at the Gaddafi Stadium. Sources said both sides showed willingness to find common ground. The discussions encouraged Naqvi to review the situation and consult the government. As a result, he is now preparing to meet Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif on Monday to brief him on the talks and explore possible solutions. Government Approval Key to Final Decision According to sources, the PCB cannot make the final decision independently. Any move to play against India requires approval from the Pakistani government. Officials confirmed that a final call is expected within the next 24 to 48 hours. Earlier this month, the government announced that Pakistan would not play India in the tournament. The stance was later reaffirmed by Prime Minister Sharif. Therefore, the upcoming meeting between Naqvi and the Prime Minister is seen as crucial for breaking the deadlock. ICC Warns Against Boycott, Revenue Talks Held The Lahore meeting was also attended by Bangladesh Cricket Board chief Aminul Islam, highlighting the regional impact of the issue. During the discussions, the PCB and BCB raised several demands, including higher revenue shares and the revival of bilateral cricket with India. However, ICC officials reportedly warned that a continued boycott is unsustainable and harmful to the sport. With commercial interests, fan expectations, and diplomatic concerns at stake, the next two days are expected to shape Pakistan’s final stance on the high-profile encounter.

title: Prakash Raj Breaks Silence on Exit Rumours from Prabhas–Sandeep Reddy Vanga’s ‘Spirit’.
content: Prakash Raj Dismisses Exit Rumours from ‘Spirit’ Recent speculation claimed that actor Prakash Raj had quit Sandeep Reddy Vanga’s much-awaited film Spirit due to creative differences. These rumours spread quickly on social media and worried fans. The film stars Prabhas in the lead role and remains one of the most anticipated projects in Indian cinema. However, Prakash Raj has now directly addressed the reports and called them baseless. ‘These Are Nonsense Speculations’: Prakash Raj In an exclusive interaction, Prakash Raj firmly denied any disagreement with director Sandeep Reddy Vanga. He rejected claims of an on-set argument and said, “Some nonsense speculations these are. I am not aware of it.” He also confirmed that he continues to work on the project. His statement has reassured fans and ended fears of another major casting change. Spirit’s Casting Changes and Growing Buzz Earlier, Spirit saw a major casting shift when the makers replaced Deepika Padukone with Triptii Dimri as the female lead. Despite this change, the film continues to generate strong interest. The team released the sound story in October last year and featured Prakash Raj’s voiceover. The first-look poster, unveiled in December, received a strong response across social media platforms. Prabhas–Vanga Collaboration Raises Expectations Spirit marks the first collaboration between Prabhas and Sandeep Reddy Vanga and has created massive buzz. The makers promise high production values and a powerful storyline. Apart from Prabhas and Prakash Raj, Vivek Oberoi also plays a key role. With rumours now cleared, the team has shifted focus to completing the shoot and delivering a film that meets audience expectations.

title: Lok Sabha Standoff: Rahul Gandhi vs Rijiju Over Speaker’s Assurance, Opposition Targets Om Birla.
content: Lok Sabha Adjourned Amid Opposition Protest On Monday, the Lok Sabha faced repeated disruptions as Opposition members demanded a discussion on the India-US interim trade deal framework. As a result, the House assembled at 11 am but encountered several interruptions. First, it adjourned twice in the morning and resumed briefly at 2 pm. However, fresh protests soon forced another adjournment till Tuesday. Overall, these developments highlighted rising tensions between the government and the Opposition. Rahul Gandhi Claims Speaker’s Assurance Meanwhile, Leader of Opposition Rahul Gandhi said the Speaker had personally assured him an opportunity to speak before the budget discussion. According to him, the chair later withdrew the promise. During the session, Gandhi asked for clarity on whether he could raise key issues. Furthermore, he expressed disappointment and accused the chair of breaking its commitment. Kiren Rijiju Rejects Allegations In response, Parliamentary Affairs Minister Kiren Rijiju strongly denied Gandhi’s claims and called them incorrect. He maintained that Speaker Om Birla had never given such an assurance. Earlier, leaders discussed the matter in a meeting that Congress MP KC Venugopal also attended. Moreover, Rijiju said the Speaker only urged all parties to cooperate for smooth functioning. Therefore, he insisted that Gandhi’s statement was “100 per cent false.” No-Confidence Motion Talk Adds to Tension At the same time, reports suggested that the Opposition may move a no-confidence motion against Speaker Om Birla. Meanwhile, MP Sandhya Ray, who presided over the session, said she had received no formal notice from Gandhi. Consequently, she stressed that members must follow parliamentary procedures. As the deadlock continued, she adjourned the House for the day. Ultimately, the standoff has raised concerns about legislative productivity and political stability in the coming days.

title: Samir Soni ‘Loves New Generation’ for Calling His Baghban Role a Green Flag.
content: Gen Z Reinterprets Baghban, Sparks Fresh Debate More than two decades after its release, Baghban has found new relevance among Gen Z audiences. While earlier generations viewed the film as a lesson on respecting parents, young viewers now see it differently. Many argue that the story unfairly pressures children by focusing only on parental sacrifice. Recently, a Gen Z influencer reignited the debate by questioning Amitabh Bachchan’s character and defending Samir Soni’s role in the film. Influencer Calls Samir’s Character a ‘Green Flag’ In a viral video, the influencer praised Samir Soni’s character for being practical, responsible, and emotionally aware. She highlighted how he questioned his father’s lack of savings and financial planning. According to her, the film unfairly portrayed him as a villain despite raising valid concerns. She also pointed out scenes where Samir’s character politely asks for basic adjustments at home to support his working wife, showing maturity and empathy. Samir Soni Welcomes ‘Redemption’ After 20 Years Reacting to the viral clip, Samir Soni reshared the video on Instagram and expressed his happiness over the renewed appreciation. “Finally, some redemption after 20 years. Just love the new generation,” he wrote. The actor recalled that audiences once labelled him as the ‘bad son’ when the film released. However, he now feels gratified that younger viewers understand his character’s perspective and emotional struggles. Baghban’s Legacy and Changing Audience Mindset Directed by B. R. Chopra, Baghban tells the story of an elderly couple struggling to find support from their four sons after retirement. The film starred Amitabh Bachchan and Hema Malini in lead roles and achieved massive commercial success. Over time, it also gained cult status. Today, changing social values and financial awareness have reshaped how audiences view its message. The renewed discussion reflects how each generation interprets cinema through its own lived experiences and evolving priorities.

title: Dubai-Based Indian Billionaire Satish Sanpal Buys 3kg Gold for Wife Yearly, says ‘Money Is Not God’.
content: Netflix’s Desi Bling Showcases Dubai’s Indian Elite Netflix has recently released the trailer for its upcoming reality series Desi Bling. As a result, viewers are getting a closer look at the luxurious lives of Dubai’s wealthy Indian community. Moreover, the show features popular actors Karan Kundrra and Tejasswi Prakash, along with leading entrepreneurs such as Rizwan Sajan and Satish Sanpal. Through lavish homes, designer fashion, and high-end cars, the series, therefore, highlights the extravagant lifestyle of Indian-origin tycoons in the Middle East. Tabinda Reveals Satish Sanpal’s Love for Gold Meanwhile, one of the most talked-about moments in the trailer features Tabinda Sanpal speaking about her husband’s fondness for gold. In particular, she revealed that Satish buys her nearly three kilograms of gold every year as a gesture of love. “Satish loves buying gold. He buys me 3 kilos of gold every year,” she said. Consequently, at current market rates, this annual gift is estimated to be worth over ₹4.5 crore, making it one of the most striking revelations from the show. From Jabalpur to Dubai’s Business Elite Notably, Satish Sanpal, the chairman of Anax Holding, began his journey in Jabalpur, India, before moving to Dubai with limited financial resources. However, over the years, he built a successful business empire across real estate, finance, hospitality, and media. Furthermore, in early 2025, he gained widespread attention after gifting his young daughter a customised pink Rolls Royce. As a result, his rise from humble beginnings to global success continues to inspire many aspiring entrepreneurs. ‘Money Is Not God’: Sanpal on Success and Values At the same time, despite his immense wealth, Satish Sanpal believes in balancing success with strong personal values. In a previous interview, he remarked, “Money is not God, but it is also no less than God.” Additionally, his wife Tabinda has spoken about the challenges they faced due to cultural differences early in their relationship. Nevertheless, their journey reflects resilience, mutual support, and determination. Ultimately, through Desi Bling, the couple now offers viewers an inside look at their lives, blending ambition, luxury, and emotional depth.

title: ZIM vs OMA Live Score: Zimbabwe Near Easy Win as Oman Struggle in T20 World Cup.
content: ZIM vs OMA T20 World Cup 2026: Zimbabwe Dominate Early Zimbabwe produced a commanding performance against Oman in the 8th match of the T20 World Cup 2026 in Colombo. After winning the toss, Zimbabwe chose to bowl first and immediately put pressure on the Oman batters. As a result, Blessing Muzarabani and Richard Ngarava struck early, reducing Oman to 16/4 within four overs. Consequently, Oman struggled to recover from the early setbacks and failed to build stable partnerships. Oman’s Batting Collapse Under Pressure Despite losing early wickets, Oman attempted to rebuild through Vinayak Shukla and Mehmood, who briefly steadied the innings. However, Sikandar Raza quickly broke their resistance with a crucial breakthrough. Moreover, Ngarava returned to dismiss Shukla and claimed another wicket in the same over, accelerating Oman’s downfall. Eventually, Oman were bundled out for 103 runs in the final over, falling short of a competitive total. Zimbabwe’s Confident Chase and Key Partnership In reply, Zimbabwe began their chase confidently, scoring briskly in the first three overs. However, Oman fought back in the fourth over by removing two quick wickets. Nevertheless, Brian Bennett and Brendan Taylor responded calmly and built a steady partnership to regain control. Meanwhile, they rotated the strike well and punished loose deliveries. As a result, Zimbabwe maintained a healthy run rate and moved closer to victory without panic. Milestones, Team Line-ups, and Tournament Context Notably, this match marked Zimbabwe’s return to the T20 World Cup after 1,191 days, with their last appearance coming in 2022. In contrast, Oman played their fourth World Cup, aiming to improve their modest record. Earlier, Oman had defeated Zimbabwe in a warm-up match, which added intrigue to this encounter. However, Zimbabwe’s disciplined bowling and composed batting proved decisive. Zimbabwe fielded a strong XI featuring Bennett, Taylor, Raza, Ngarava, and Muzarabani, while Oman relied on Jatinder Singh, Aamir Kaleem, and Vinayak Shukla. Ultimately, Zimbabwe’s all-round performance highlighted their intent to make a strong comeback in the tournament. Therefore, with momentum on their side, the Chevrons now look set to challenge stronger teams in the upcoming fixtures.

title: Starmer Says ‘Not Prepared to Walk Away’ Amid Epstein Row Fallout as UK PM.
content: UK PM Stands FirmUnited Kingdom Prime Minister Keir Starmer is facing intense criticism over links between his former officials and convicted US sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. Despite calls to resign, Starmer said on Monday he is “not prepared to walk away.” Speaking to Labour lawmakers in Parliament, he stated, “Every fight I have ever been in, I’ve won.” He stressed his commitment to serve the country. Resignations Rock Downing StreetThe controversy escalated after new Epstein documents surfaced. High-profile resignations followed, including UK communications chief Tim Allan and former Downing Street Chief of Staff Morgan McSweeney. Both resigned after recommending Peter Mandelson as UK ambassador to the United States in 2024, despite his Epstein links. Some Labour members, including Scotland’s Anas Sarwar, called for a leadership change. They argued that “too many mistakes” have distracted the government. Labour Leaders Rally Behind StarmerDespite the pressure, senior Labour figures backed Starmer. Deputy PM David Lammy, finance minister Rachel Reeves, and foreign secretary Yvette Cooper urged colleagues to stay focused. They emphasized Starmer’s upcoming role at the Munich Security Conference. Starmer called the controversy “the fight of our times” and reaffirmed his commitment to renters’ rights, the Employment Rights Act, and lifting children out of poverty. Accountability and Apology to VictimsStarmer apologized publicly to Epstein victims. He admitted mistakes in trusting Mandelson and acknowledged delays in accountability. Mandelson was dismissed last year, but documents show he misled the UK government about Epstein ties. A police investigation is ongoing. Starmer promised to release additional documents to ensure transparency. Despite the scandal, he vows to continue leading the UK through the political crisis.

title: Inside PCB’s Shift: From India Boycott Threats to T20 Talks.
content: Pakistan Reverses DecisionAfter weeks of uncertainty, the Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) confirmed that Pakistan will face India on February 15 in Colombo. Earlier, the team had threatened to boycott the match due to perceived unfair treatment of Bangladesh. The confirmation followed a five-hour meeting in Lahore with PCB chairman Mohsin Naqvi, ICC representatives, and Bangladesh Cricket Board president Aminul Islam. Subsequently, Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif approved the team’s participation, ensuring the marquee fixture remains on schedule. ICC and Boards Mediate TalksMeanwhile, the ICC described its discussions with PCB and BCB as “open and constructive.” Several member boards, including England, Australia, Sri Lanka, and Emirates, urged Pakistan to reconsider. In addition, Sri Lanka Cricket president Shammi Silva warned that a boycott would cause significant economic fallout in Colombo. As a result, ICC mediation emphasized that all alternatives be explored. Ultimately, these efforts persuaded PCB to change course. Back-Channel NegotiationsTensions escalated after Pakistan initially refused to play India on February 1. Between February 3 and 9, ICC deputy chair Imran Khwaja, PSL adviser Salman Naseer, and PCB officials held multiple meetings. On February 7, PCB requested the ‘Force Majeure’ clause to justify the boycott; however, the ICC rejected the claim. Following repeated appeals from Sri Lanka, Emirates, and Bangladesh, along with consultations with the Pakistani government, PCB reversed its decision on February 9. Protecting Cricket’s SpiritThe Pakistani government stated that the reversal aims to protect the spirit of cricket and maintain the global continuity of the sport. Consequently, PCB chairman Naqvi emphasized that the decision preserves the T20 World Cup’s commercial and sporting stakes. Finally, fans worldwide can look forward to the highly anticipated India vs Pakistan clash. In addition, the decision strengthens cooperation among cricket boards and ensures the tournament proceeds smoothly.

title: Rani Mukerji on Salman Khan’s Work Ethic: ‘His Dedication Is Different’.
content: Career Milestone and Industry Experience Actor Rani Mukerji is enjoying strong praise for her performance in Mardaani 3. The film adds another success to her 30-year-long career. Recently, she spoke to Galatta Plus about her journey in Bollywood. She shared that she is among the few actresses who have worked with Shah Rukh Khan, Aamir Khan, and Salman Khan. According to Rani, each superstar follows a different working style. However, she stressed that Salman’s dedication often remains hidden from public view. Salman Khan’s Work Ethic and Swag While speaking about Salman Khan, Rani described his presence on set as confident and effortless. She said he arrives with natural swag and a relaxed attitude. At first, people may think he is not fully involved. However, she explained that this impression is misleading. Salman remains deeply focused on his performance. He prefers to keep his preparation private. As a result, many people fail to notice his serious commitment to acting. Hidden Hard Work Behind the Scenes Rani revealed that Salman’s creative process mostly happens in his mind. He studies scenes carefully and suggests improvements. Moreover, he looks for ways to make every moment better on screen. Despite his easygoing nature, he works extremely hard. He rarely allows others to enter his creative space. Consequently, his dedication often goes unnoticed. Rani added that his charm and popularity sometimes overshadow his professional discipline. Rani Compares the Three Khans During the interview, Rani also spoke about Shah Rukh and Aamir Khan. She praised Shah Rukh for his energy and respect toward co-stars. Meanwhile, she described Aamir as a perfectionist who focuses on every detail. According to Rani, all three actors are legends in their own way. However, their approaches remain very different. She concluded by saying that she admires all three equally. Having worked with Salman in Chori Chori Chupke Chupke, Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega, and Hello Brother, she called her experiences memorable and inspiring.main very different. She concluded by saying that she admires all three equally. Having worked with Salman in Chori Chori Chupke Chupke, Har Dil Jo Pyar Karega, and Hello Brother, Rani said her experiences with him remain memorable and inspiring.

title: Gold and Silver Rates Today: Should You Invest Now? Check Delhi, Mumbai Prices.
content: Gold and silver prices declined on Tuesday after recording gains in the previous two sessions. The fall came as the US dollar strengthened from a more than one-week low. Investors remained cautious while awaiting key US jobs and inflation data due later this week. These reports are expected to influence future interest rate decisions. Spot gold dropped nearly 1% to $5,016.56 per ounce in early Asian trade. On Monday, the metal had gained around 2% after the dollar weakened. Gold had earlier touched a record high of $5,594.82 per ounce on January 29, according to Reuters. Recent Performance of Gold and Silver In recent weeks, precious metals have shown sharp fluctuations. After hitting record highs in late January, prices corrected due to profit booking. Gold fell nearly 11% from its January peak by the end of last week. However, it still remains up nearly 15% for the year so far. Meanwhile, gold later recovered slightly to $5,028.77 per ounce in Singapore trade. Silver also showed strength, rising 1.7% to $79.18. These movements reflect changing global economic signals and investor sentiment. Why Gold Remains a Preferred Investment Despite short-term volatility, gold continues to attract long-term investors. It is widely considered a safe-haven asset during economic uncertainty. Moreover, gold protects purchasing power during periods of high inflation. Many investors also use gold to diversify their portfolios and reduce overall risk. In times of market instability, demand for gold usually rises. Therefore, financial experts often recommend allocating a portion of savings to this precious metal. Silver Investment and Price Factors in India Silver also remains popular among Indian investors and jewellery buyers. It enjoys steady demand across industrial and ornamental sectors. Since silver is more affordable than gold, it attracts small and first-time investors. Limited availability may also push prices higher in the future. In India, gold and silver rates depend on multiple factors. These include import duties, state taxes, transportation costs, and local demand. Bullion associations and currency movements also influence daily prices. As a result, rates vary across cities such as Delhi and Mumbai.

title: After Delhi Biker’s Death, Another Man Dies After Falling into Open Drain in Rohini.
content: Second Fatal Accident in Days Raises Safety Concerns in Delhi Barely four days after a tragic biker’s death in west Delhi’s Janakpuri, another fatal incident shocked the national capital. A 32-year-old man lost his life after he slipped into an open drain in Rohini’s Sector 32 area near Mahashakti Kali Temple on Tuesday. This incident once again exposed serious safety lapses at public infrastructure sites. Residents and commuters across the city have raised concerns about uncovered drains and pits that continue to endanger lives. Victim Identified as Bihar Native Birju Kumar News agency ANI identified the victim as Birju Kumar, a resident of Bihar’s Samastipur district. Local witness Sunil Kumar confirmed the identity and described the incident. He said the accident happened late at night under poor visibility. After spotting the victim inside the drain, residents immediately contacted the authorities. “We informed the administration, and they arrived and took away the body,” he said. Officials believe Birju Kumar lost his balance while walking near the open drain. Witnesses Question Emergency Response Time The Begumpur police station handled the case. Police officials stated that they received a call around 7:45 pm and sent a rescue team without delay. However, several residents challenged this claim. Tejpal Yadav said authorities responded only after he dialled the emergency number 112. He added that the victim remained inside the pit for several hours before help arrived. These statements have raised serious concerns about coordination among civic bodies and emergency services. Earlier Janakpuri Tragedy Fuels Public Anger Last week, another accident occurred in Janakpuri, where a 25-year-old banker fell into a 20-foot-deep pit dug by the Delhi Jal Board while riding his motorcycle. Police later recovered his body and vehicle and registered a case under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023. These consecutive incidents have intensified public anger and strengthened demands for accountability. Citizens now urge authorities to install proper barricades, display warning signs, and conduct regular safety inspections. As Delhi continues infrastructure development, experts emphasize that officials must place public safety above all else.

title: India-US Trade Deal: White House Revises Fact Sheet, Omits Tariff Details.
content: White House Revises India-US Trade Deal Fact Sheet The White House has quietly revised its official fact sheet on the India-US trade framework. It removed several key claims from the original version released earlier this week. The updated document no longer says that India would reduce tariffs on “certain pulses.” It also drops references to eliminating digital services taxes. In addition, it removes the claim that India committed to buying $500 billion worth of American goods. These changes have drawn strong attention from trade experts and policy analysts. Tariff Reference on Pulses Removed In the revised version, the White House deleted “certain pulses” from the product list. Earlier, the document had mentioned pulses along with tree nuts, soybean oil, wine, and spirits. Pulses remain politically sensitive in India. The country is the world’s largest producer and consumer of lentils, chickpeas, and dry beans. Therefore, experts believe India pushed back against this claim. The change also reflects efforts to protect farmers and ensure food security. Digital Services Tax Language Softened The updated fact sheet also changes the wording on digital services taxes. Earlier, it stated that India “will remove” these taxes. Now, it says India has “committed to negotiate” digital trade rules. This wording matches current policy. India had already removed its 6% equalisation levy on digital advertising. The change took effect on April 1, 2025, under the Finance Bill 2025. As a result, officials say the earlier version overstated India’s commitments. Purchase Commitments Reframed In another major revision, the White House softened language on India’s purchases of US goods. The document now says India “intends to buy” American products. Earlier, it said India had “committed to buy” them. This wording matches the joint statement issued on February 7. The revised sheet also removes the word “agricultural” from the list. Experts say these changes show that talks remain ongoing. They also highlight the complex nature of India-US trade negotiations.

title: Paresh Rawal Confirms Govinda’s Exit from Bhagam Bhag 2, Praises Akshay-Manoj Pairing.
content: Paresh Rawal Confirms Cast Change in Bhagam Bhag 2 Bollywood actor Paresh Rawal has confirmed that Manoj Bajpayee has replaced Govinda in Bhagam Bhag 2. Recently, several reports hinted at the casting change. As a result, fans shared their disappointment on social media. Now, Rawal has addressed the issue publicly. In an interview with Bollywood Hungama, he clarified the situation. Moreover, he said that the makers have finalized the cast. Therefore, the film has entered the preparation stage. Manoj Bajpayee Joins Akshay Kumar in Lead Role Meanwhile, Paresh Rawal spoke about the new pairing in the sequel. He said Manoj Bajpayee and Akshay Kumar will bring fresh energy to the film. According to him, their combination will feel “different and unique.” Earlier, Govinda and Akshay Kumar created strong comic chemistry. However, Rawal believes the new duo can connect with today’s audience. Additionally, he confirmed that he will play a double role. As a result, fans can expect more humour and drama. Paresh Rawal Says He Is Unaware of Exit Reason While confirming Govinda’s departure, Rawal admitted that he does not know the reason. “I genuinely have no idea. However, we will miss Govinda,” he said. Therefore, the exit remains unclear for now. Meanwhile, fans continue to react online. Many have requested the makers to reconsider the decision. Moreover, several viewers feel that Govinda remains the heart of the franchise. Consequently, the debate continues across platforms. Legacy of Bhagam Bhag and Fan Reactions Released in 2006, Bhagam Bhag became a major comedy hit. Director Priyadarshan received praise for his storytelling style. Furthermore, the film gained popularity for its witty dialogues and slapstick humour. Over time, it turned into a cult favourite. Now, the sequel carries high expectations. However, opinions remain divided among fans. Some support the new cast. Others remain uncertain. Nevertheless, Bhagam Bhag 2 continues to generate strong buzz in the entertainment industry.

title: Thailand School Shooting LIVE: Gunman Shot, 3 Injured in Attack.
content: Incident Sparks Panic at Hat Yai School A shooting incident at a school in Hat Yai district, southern Thailand, triggered panic on Wednesday evening. An armed suspect entered Phatong Prathan Khiriwat School and opened fire, officials said. Students and teachers were attending classes when the attack began. Soon, fear spread across the campus as people rushed for safety. Meanwhile, parents arrived near the school in search of information. Police officers and rescue teams reached the spot within minutes. As a result, authorities quickly took control of the situation and prevented further damage. Police Confront Gunman and Secure Campus Thai police confronted the suspect and stopped the attack through swift action. The Central Investigation Bureau confirmed that officers shot the gunman during the operation. Earlier, officials said they had detained him. Later, police clarified that they used force when he resisted arrest. Deputy Superintendent Wichian Soboon told Reuters that officers captured the attacker after a brief standoff. Soon after, security teams cleared the building and escorted students and staff to safety. Consequently, no further injuries occurred after police intervention. Victims Receive Treatment, Suspect Identified Authorities confirmed that the attack injured at least three people. A teacher suffered a gunshot wound, while two others received minor injuries. Medical teams rushed the victims to nearby hospitals. Doctors later confirmed that all patients remain in stable condition. In addition, officials identified the suspect as an 18-year-old student. Investigators believe he entered the campus with a firearm and started shooting. Police now question witnesses and review CCTV footage to understand his motive and trace the source of the weapon. Investigation Continues, Security Tightened Meanwhile, some media outlets reported the involvement of multiple attackers. Nation Thailand claimed that more than one gunman entered the school. However, police have not confirmed these claims. Instead, officers continue to verify all available evidence. Furthermore, authorities have launched a detailed probe into the incident. Education officials have increased security around schools in the region. They also plan to revise safety guidelines and emergency response systems. Overall, the Hat Yai shooting has raised serious concerns about campus safety in Thailand. Although quick police action stopped a major tragedy, the incident highlights the urgent need for stronger security measures. Officials have assassured citizens that they will take strict steps to protect students and teachers.

title: EXILE Act Explained: US Bill Targets H-1B Visas in Congress.
content: New Bill Targets H-1B Visas in Congress The US Congress has introduced a new bill that could end the H-1B visa program. Republican lawmaker Greg Steube from Florida presented the EXILE Act in early February 2026. The bill aims to stop companies from hiring foreign workers through the H-1B route. According to Steube, many corporations misuse the system to hire cheaper labour. As a result, he believes American workers lose job opportunities. Therefore, the proposed law seeks to put domestic workers first. Moreover, the bill comes at a time when immigration remains a key political issue. Since the 2024 presidential election, lawmakers have debated visa reforms more frequently. In this context, the EXILE Act reflects growing pressure to change employment-based immigration policies. What Is the EXILE Act and How It Works The EXILE Act stands for Ending Exploitative Imported Labour Exemptions Act. If lawmakers pass it, the bill will amend the Immigration and Nationality Act. It will reduce the number of H-1B visas to zero from the 2027 financial year. Consequently, the government will end the programme completely. In addition, companies will no longer submit petitions for foreign workers. At present, thousands of firms rely on this system to hire skilled professionals. However, the new bill plans to remove this option. Steube argues that this step will protect young American workers and graduates. Lawmakers Cite Impact on US Workforce Supporters of the bill say the H-1B programme harms local workers. Steube claims that over 80 percent of visa holders come from India and China. He also says employers prefer younger foreign employees due to lower costs. As a result, many Americans struggle to find stable jobs. Furthermore, he points to the healthcare sector. According to him, the programme limits access for US medical graduates. He says foreign doctors often take residency positions. Therefore, he believes the system weakens long-term workforce development. What Ending H-1B Means for Indians The H-1B visa has helped millions of Indians build careers in the US. Many top executives once entered the country through this route. These include Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella and Google CEO Sundar Pichai. For years, India has remained the largest beneficiary. In 2025, nearly 70 percent of H-1B holders came from India. Similarly, in 2024, Indians received over 70 percent of approved visas. If Congress passes the EXILE Act, this pathway will close. Consequently, Indian professionals may face fewer opportunities in the US job market. Meanwhile, experts expect strong reactions from the global tech industry.

title: AI 171 Crash: Italian Report Claims Pilot Shut Fuel Switches Intentionally.
content: Italian Report Reveals Shocking Findings An Italian newspaper has claimed that the Air India Flight 171 crash resulted from an intentional action by one of the pilots. Corriere della Sera reported that investigators believe a pilot switched off the fuel supply shortly after takeoff. Considered one of India’s worst aviation disasters, the crash killed 242 people on board, including 12 crew members. The aircraft was flying from Ahmedabad to London on June 12, 2025. It crashed just seconds after leaving the runway. According to the report, investigators found no technical failure in the Boeing 787 Dreamliner. Instead, they focused on cockpit recordings and flight data. These materials reportedly point to human intervention as the main cause of the tragedy. Fuel Switch Analysis and Black Box Evidence Sources cited by Corriere said experts carefully examined the aircraft’s black box data. Investigators also enhanced cockpit voice recordings for better clarity. Through this process, they identified which pilot operated the fuel switches. The engines lost power after the switches moved from “run” to “cutoff.” Furthermore, simulator tests conducted by US experts failed to recreate the shutdown without human involvement. As a result, analysts ruled out mechanical failure. The sequence of events showed that the left engine stopped first, followed by the right engine. This pattern matched the pilot’s seating position in the cockpit. Captain Emerges as Key Focus of Investigation The Italian report named Captain Sumeet Sabharwal as the main suspect in the incident. He was monitoring the flight while First Officer Clive Kunder handled the controls. According to the findings, Kunder attempted to regain altitude in the final seconds. However, the captain’s controls remained inactive. Meanwhile, pilot associations and Sabharwal’s family have strongly rejected these claims. They argue that authorities are unfairly targeting the crew. They have demanded a deeper review of airline procedures and aircraft systems. In addition, they called for greater transparency in the investigation process. Political Pressure and Final Report Expectations Sources told Corriere that international pressure influenced the investigation’s direction. Western aviation agencies reportedly urged Indian authorities to recognise human error. They warned that ignoring such findings could affect India’s aviation safety ratings. In December 2025, Indian investigators re-examined flight data in Washington. They worked closely with the US National Transportation Safety Board. Their analysis strengthened the case for human involvement. However, officials may soften the final report to avoid controversy. So far, the Aircraft Accident Investigation Bureau and the Civil Aviation Ministry have not issued formal statements. The final report is expected soon. Its conclusions will likely shape future aviation safety policies in India and abroad.

title: Bangladesh Election 2026 Live: Voters Turn Out in Key Democracy Test.
content: Voting Begins in Historic General Election Bangladesh began voting on Wednesday in a high-stakes general election that many see as a major test of democracy. Polling started at 7 am IST and will continue until 4:30 pm. This is the first national election since former Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina was removed from power. Her party, the Awami League, is not contesting after losing its registration. More than 127 million voters are eligible to cast ballots across the country. Nearly 1,981 candidates are competing for parliamentary seats. The interim government, led by Nobel Peace Prize winner Muhammad Yunus, is supervising the process. It has promised free, fair, and peaceful elections. Security forces remain on alert to ensure smooth voting. Main Political Parties and Key Contenders For decades, two major families have dominated Bangladesh politics. Sheikh Hasina and Khaleda Zia led rival camps for years. However, Hasina’s party now stands excluded from the polls. As a result, the Bangladesh Nationalist Party has emerged as the leading contender. The BNP has projected Tarique Rahman as its main face. He returned from exile in December after 17 years abroad. Rahman has promised judicial reforms, economic revival, and stronger democratic institutions. Meanwhile, an 11-party alliance led by Jamaat-e-Islami has also entered the race. This bloc includes the National Citizen Party, formed by young activists after the 2024 uprising. Gen Z Influence and Youth-Led Politics This election marks a turning point for young voters. Generation Z makes up nearly one-fourth of the electorate. Many of them played a key role in protests that led to Hasina’s removal. Now, they want political change through ballots instead of street movements. The National Citizen Party represents this youth movement. Although it failed to gain wide support alone, it joined hands with Jamaat-e-Islami to strengthen its position. Political analysts say young voters could decide several close contests. Nearly five million first-time voters are also participating, adding to the election’s importance. Key Issues and Future of Democracy Several major concerns dominate voter discussions. Corruption remains the biggest worry, according to recent surveys. Inflation has crossed 8.5 percent, increasing pressure on household budgets. Economic recovery and job creation also remain critical, especially for the young population. Sheikh Hasina, speaking from exile in India, criticised the polls. She warned that excluding her party could weaken democratic legitimacy. At the same time, voters will also decide on proposed political reforms. These include limits on prime ministerial terms and stronger checks on executive power. The election outcome will shape Bangladesh’s political future. It will show whether the country canstrengthen democratic institutions. It will also reveal if youth movements can create lasting change.

title: Nurse Dies After Nipah Virus Infection in West Bengal Hospital.
content: Death After Weeks of Critical Care A nurse who tested positive for the Nipah virus in West Bengal died after a cardiac arrest while receiving treatment at a Barasat hospital, the Union Health Ministry said on Thursday. According to officials, doctors placed her under intensive medical care for several weeks due to her critical condition. Despite continuous efforts, her health worsened in the final hours. Eventually, medical teams failed to revive her. Recovery Followed by Severe Complications Initially, health officials reported the nurse as one of two confirmed Nipah cases on January 11, 2026. Later, she showed signs of recovery, and doctors removed ventilator support at the end of January. At that time, medical reports confirmed that she had recovered from the virus. However, multiple complications continued to affect her health and weakened her immune system. Post-Viral Illness Led to Cardiac Failure Meanwhile, officials told PTI that the nurse suffered from a prolonged coma, which reduced her immunity. As a result, she developed a serious lung infection that strained her vital organs. Although doctors managed the viral infection, post-viral complications caused her condition to deteriorate. Ultimately, these complications triggered cardiac arrest, leading to her death. Contacts Test Negative, Situation Under Control In the meantime, health authorities confirmed that the second patient, a male nurse, has fully recovered and returned home. Furthermore, the National Centre for Disease Control identified and monitored 196 contacts linked to the confirmed cases. So far, all have tested negative and shown no symptoms. Therefore, officials said the situation remains under control. Meanwhile, the Centre and West Bengal government continue enhanced surveillance and laboratory testing. Finally, authorities urged the public to avoid misinformation and follow health advisories.

title: Indian Man Leaves US, returns to Punjab for Community and Belonging
content: Choosing Community Over Convenience An Indian man who previously lived and worked in the United States has gone viral after explaining why he decided to leave his life abroad and return permanently to Punjab. In a widely shared video, he said his decision was not driven by rising expenses or financial pressure. Instead, he chose to move back because he missed the strong sense of community, family support, and cultural belonging that he felt was missing in his life overseas. Life in the US Felt Lonely Despite Comforts According to the man, life in the US offered modern facilities, stable income, and professional opportunities. However, over time, he began to feel emotionally disconnected. He said that most social interactions remained limited to workplaces and formal gatherings. “People are busy, and everyone focuses on their own life,” he explained. Although he respected the lifestyle, he felt that relationships lacked warmth and everyday human connection, which he deeply valued. Punjab Offered Emotional Security and Belonging After returning to Punjab, he experienced a renewed sense of peace and satisfaction. He shared that neighbors, relatives, and friends welcomed him warmly. Daily interactions, shared meals, and local celebrations helped him rebuild strong social ties. Moreover, he said that living close to family provided emotional support during difficult times. For him, this environment created a feeling of security that no amount of financial stability could replace. Message Inspires Many Young Indians Abroad His story has resonated with many Indians living overseas, especially students and professionals who often struggle with isolation. Several users praised his honesty and courage to prioritize mental well-being over material comfort. Experts also note that more Indians are now reconsidering long-term settlement abroad and exploring opportunities at home. While global exposure remains valuable, this story highlights that emotional fulfillment, cultural identity, and community bonds continue to play a powerful role in shaping life decisions.

title: Bangladesh Election Results 2026: BNP Leads, Jamaat Wins 34 Seats.
content: BNP Takes Early Lead in Key Constituencies Bangladesh Nationalist Party recorded strong early gains in the Bangladesh general elections as officials continued counting votes on Friday. According to local media, party leaders secured important seats in Dhaka and Bogra. Meanwhile, reports said the BNP led in more than 175 constituencies. As a result, the party moved closer to a simple majority in the 300-member Jatiya Sangsad. At the same time, Bangladesh Jamaat-e-Islami maintained leads in nearly 30 seats. Notably, election officials confirmed that voting ended peacefully. Furthermore, they recorded a turnout of about 48 percent by the afternoon. Interim Government and Referendum in Focus Meanwhile, the interim government, led by Nobel laureate Muhammad Yunus, supervised the election process. From the start, the administration promised transparent and fair polls. In addition, citizens took part in a national referendum on the July National Charter. For this purpose, voters used separate white and pink ballots. At the same time, more than 127 million people qualified to vote nationwide. Moreover, nearly 2,000 candidates contested seats in Parliament. Because of these factors, observers described the election as one of the most closely watched in recent years. Sheikh Hasina Calls Polls a ‘Farce’ However, former prime minister Sheikh Hasina, now living in exile in India, strongly criticised the elections. In a statement, the Awami League shared her allegations online. Specifically, she accused authorities of vote-buying and booth capturing. Furthermore, she claimed officials restricted her party unfairly. As a result, she argued that the ban weakened democratic values. Nevertheless, election officials rejected these allegations. Instead, they insisted that authorities followed legal and constitutional procedures. Political Rivals and Youth Vote Shape Outcome Historically, Bangladesh’s politics has centred on rivalry between Hasina and former prime minister Khaleda Zia. Now, with the Awami League absent, the BNP, led by Tarique Rahman, has emerged as the main challenger. At the same time, the party faces competition from a coalition that includes Jamaat and the youth-led National Citizen Party. According to experts at the Centre for Governance Studies, young voters could decide the final outcome. Therefore, analysts believe the results will shape Bangladesh’s political future. Ultimately, the election will test whether protest movements can bring lasting democratic reform.

title: Irrfan Khan’s Wife Sutapa Sikdar Says He’s Blessing ‘O Romeo’ From Heaven.
content: Emotional Message From Sutapa Sikdar Filmmaker Sutapa Sikdar recently shared an emotional message ahead of the release of O Romeo. She said that her late husband, Irrfan Khan, was sending his blessings from heaven. Her words quickly touched fans and film lovers on social media. Moreover, many people felt her message reflected deep love and strength. She congratulated the entire team and expressed pride in their journey. She also thanked director Vishal Bhardwaj for completing a project that once involved Irrfan. As a result, her post became a heartfelt tribute to the late actor’s legacy. A Film With a Long and Challenging Journey Directed by Vishal Bhardwaj, O Romeo faced several delays before reaching theatres. However, the team continued working with dedication. Eventually, the film neared completion after years of effort. The movie stars Shahid Kapoor in the lead role. According to Bhardwaj, the film reflects his thoughts on violence, justice, and social conflict. He believes honest storytelling matters more than box office numbers. Therefore, he considers this project deeply personal. Connection With Irrfan’s Unfulfilled Dream In her message, Sutapa recalled that Bhardwaj had originally planned the film with Irrfan. At that time, the project carried a different title. Unfortunately, health issues and scheduling conflicts stopped the plan from moving forward. Despite this setback, Sutapa praised the director’s determination. She said he never gave up on his vision. Meanwhile, many fans appreciated her honesty and courage. They also admired how she continues to honour Irrfan’s memory through meaningful cinema. Story Inspired by Real-Life Crime O Romeo draws inspiration from a chapter in S. Hussain Zaidi’s book Mafia Queens of Mumbai. The film follows the story of gangster Hussain Ustara and explores the dark side of the underworld. Through strong performances and intense storytelling, the movie aims to engage audiences emotionally. As it finally reaches cinemas, viewers see it as both a creative achievement and a tribute to Irrfan’s unfinished dreams.

title: Abhishek Sharma’s Pakistan Match in Doubt After Weight Loss Due to Stomach Infection.
content: Abhishek Sharma’s Fitness Scare Ahead of Key Clash India opener Abhishek Sharma is facing a race against time to regain full fitness ahead of the high-voltage match against Pakistan in the ongoing ICC Men's T20 World Cup. The 25-year-old recently suffered a stomach infection that forced him into hospital care. Although doctors discharged him earlier this week, he has not yet returned to full training. As a result, his participation in the next fixture remains uncertain. Team officials are monitoring his recovery closely, especially after reports confirmed that he has lost noticeable weight due to illness. Practice Session to Decide Selection India will take on Pakistan on February 15 at the iconic R Premadasa Stadium in Colombo. According to sources, Abhishek’s inclusion in the playing XI depends largely on his performance in practice. If he manages to bat for long durations during net sessions, selectors may consider him fit enough to start. However, he skipped recent training sessions, which has raised concerns. Stomach infections often weaken players, and regaining stamina usually takes time. Therefore, the team management does not want to rush his return. Captain Suryakumar Yadav’s Update Indian captain Suryakumar Yadav addressed Abhishek’s condition during the toss against Namibia. He admitted that the youngster is still recovering and may need one or two more games to regain peak fitness. Earlier in the tournament, Abhishek played despite being unwell, which affected his performance. He struggled with energy levels and had to leave the field midway through a match. This experience has encouraged the team to take a cautious approach this time. India’s Strong Form Despite Injury Worries Despite Abhishek’s absence, India has maintained impressive form in the tournament. The team secured a convincing win over Namibia, posting a massive total and dominating with the ball. Senior players stepped up, ensuring that the batting and bowling units remained balanced. However, Abhishek’s explosive starts at the top remain crucial against strong opponents like Pakistan. His aggressive style can shift momentum early in the innings. For now, fans will have to wait for updates from the Colombo practice sessions. If Abhishek responds well and regains strength, he could still feature in the marquee clash. Otherwise, India may opt to rest him and focus on his long-term fitness. Either way, the final decision will prioritize both his health and the team’s campaign.ssment, hoping he can recover in time for the high-voltage encounter.

title: Suryakumar Yadav Breaks Silence on Handshake Row Ahead of ICC Men's T20 World Cup Clash with Pakistan.
content: “Let’s Wait 24 Hours,” Says Indian Captain Before Crucial World Cup Encounter India captain Suryakumar Yadav has chosen to remain tight-lipped on whether Indian players will shake hands with their Pakistani counterparts during their much-anticipated Group A clash in the ICC Men's T20 World Cup. Speaking at the pre-match press conference in Colombo on Saturday, Suryakumar avoided giving a direct response when asked about the handshake protocol ahead of Sunday’s match at the R. Premadasa Stadium, located in Colombo. “Wait for 24 hours. Eat well, sleep well, we will see tomorrow,” Suryakumar told reporters, keeping fans and media guessing. He later added that the focus should remain on cricket rather than off-field narratives. “What’s more important is the game. Let’s play the match first. Whether the handshake happens or not, we’ll see tomorrow,” he said. Background of Recent Tensions The handshake issue has gained prominence due to past incidents, particularly during the Asia Cup 2025, where India and Pakistan met three times without exchanging post-match pleasantries. Those encounters came in the aftermath of regional tensions, which heightened emotions on both sides. During that tournament, India’s refusal to shake hands reportedly upset the Pakistan Cricket Board, which later lodged a complaint with the International Cricket Council. The PCB claimed that match referee Andy Pycroft failed to enforce the spirit of the game. Pakistan Captain Calls for Sportsmanship Earlier, Pakistan skipper Salman Ali Agha also addressed the issue, emphasizing fair play and mutual respect. “The game should be played in the right spirit. What I expect doesn’t matter. It depends on what the other side wants,” Agha said, urging both teams to uphold cricketing values. Focus Remains on the Big Match Despite the surrounding controversy, Suryakumar insisted that his team remains focused on performance rather than symbolism. “We were prepared for all fixtures. Our flights were booked. We were focused only on preparation,” he stated. He also acknowledged the pressure that comes with an India-Pakistan encounter. “It’s a big occasion. You may call it just another game, but deep down, you know its importance. We try to keep things simple and execute our plans,” he added. As anticipation builds for Sunday’s blockbuster clash, fans will not only watch the cricketing battle but also observe whether the two rivals choose to exchange handshakes—an act that could signal a thaw in recent tensions.

title: Ranbir Kapoor Praises Ranveer Singh’s Dhurandhar, Calls It His ‘Current Favourite’ Film.
content: Actor Showers Praise During Live Fan Interaction Bollywood star Ranbir Kapoor has heaped praise on Dhurandhar, calling it his “current favourite movie.” The actor expressed his admiration for the film during a live interaction with fans on Saturday through his lifestyle brand, Ark. During the session, a fan asked Ranbir about his most-loved recent film. Without hesitation, he named Dhurandhar and applauded the entire team for delivering a memorable cinematic experience. “The last, current favourite movie was Dhurandhar. Absolutely loved that film. I think the entire cast and crew smashed it. Really good times at the movies,” Ranbir said. A Big Boost for Ranveer Singh’s Blockbuster Directed by Aditya Dhar, Dhurandhar features Ranveer Singh in the lead role as an undercover Indian spy operating in Pakistan’s Lyari region. The high-octane thriller revolves around his mission to dismantle a dangerous terror network targeting India. Ranbir’s endorsement adds to the film’s growing list of admirers from the industry. Several prominent figures, including Karan Johar and Ram Gopal Varma, have also praised the film publicly. Meanwhile, Eternal Sunshine Productions, associated with Alia Bhatt, celebrated the movie’s historic box office success on social media, calling it “the voice and choice of today’s India.” Record-Breaking Box Office Performance Dhurandhar has emerged as one of the biggest commercial successes in Bollywood history. The film reportedly grossed over ₹1300 crore worldwide and became the first Hindi movie to cross ₹1000 crore at the domestic box office. Alongside Ranveer, the film stars Akshaye Khanna, Arjun Rampal, Sanjay Dutt, and R Madhavan in key roles. Sequel and Future Projects Fans are now eagerly waiting for the sequel, Dhurandhar: The Revenge, scheduled to hit theatres on March 19, 2026. Ranveer Singh will reprise his role, joined once again by Arjun Rampal, Sanjay Dutt, and R Madhavan. The film is set to clash with Toxic: A Fairytale for Grown-Ups, starring Yash. Meanwhile, Ranbir Kapoor was last seen in Animal and has major projects lined up, including Ramayana and Love and War. With industry heavyweights and audiences united in praise, Dhurandhar continues to strengthen its legacy as one of modern Bollywood’s most celebrated blockbusters.

title: Mumbai Metro Pillar Collapse: 5 Arrested, Contractor Fined ₹5 Crore After 1 Death.
content: Tragic Collapse on Mumbai’s Metro 4 Corridor A deadly accident occurred in Mulund on Saturday when a parapet segment from the under-construction Metro 4 corridor fell onto vehicles on LBS Road. The collapse crushed an autorickshaw and a car, killing 46-year-old Ramdhani Yadav and injuring three others. Commuters and locals rushed to help the victims before emergency teams arrived. The incident triggered panic in the busy area and raised serious questions about construction safety. Maharashtra Chief Minister Devendra Fadnavis expressed grief and promised strict action against those responsible. MMRDA Fines Contractors, Launches Safety Review After the incident, the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) took swift action. It imposed a ₹5 crore fine on Reliance Infrastructure and its sub-contractor, Milan Road Buildtech LLP. The authority also penalised the project’s consulting agencies and ordered an immediate safety audit. Officials began reviewing construction practices at similar sites across Mumbai. They also halted work on the affected stretch to prevent further risks. MMRDA stated that it would strengthen monitoring systems and enforce stricter safety rules. Police Action, Inquiry, and Government Support Police arrested five people, including senior officials of the sub-contractor and a project manager linked to the project. Investigators started examining quality checks, supervision methods, and contractor compliance. The government announced ₹5 lakh in compensation for the victim’s family. It also assured free medical care for the injured. Authorities suspended an MMRDA engineer for negligence and demanded detailed reports from all agencies involved. The inquiry committee aims to submit its findings at the earliest. Officials said they would hold individuals accountable if evidence proves misconduct. Political Response and Calls for Accountability Local BJP MLA Mihir Kotecha blamed weak supervision for the tragedy. He said earlier inspections had exposed multiple safety violations. He claimed that he had warned officials about risks at the site. Kotecha also wrote to MMRDA Commissioner Sanjay Mukherjee, urging strict action against the contractor. Opposition leaders accused the government of ignoring public safety. They demanded long-term reforms and transparent monitoring. As investigations continue, the tragedy has intensified public demand for safer infrastructure and stronger enforcement across Mumbai.

title: India vs Pakistan at T20 World Cups: From Bowl-Out Drama to Last-Ball Thrillers.
content: Pressure Defines the India-Pakistan T20 Rivalry India vs Pakistan at the T20 World Cup has never been a slow-burning rivalry. Instead, it unfolds in sharp bursts of tension, where a single over or delivery can decide the outcome. Every decision becomes magnified under pressure, turning routine moments into defining ones. Players like Suryakumar Yadav and Salman Ali Agha have often found themselves at the center of these high-stakes phases. What separates victory from defeat is not talent alone, but the ability to think clearly when the match begins to feel chaotic. From Bowl-Out Drama to Last-Over Thrillers The rivalry’s modern story began in 2007 with a dramatic bowl-out in Durban, where India held their nerve to prevail. Later that year, the final in Johannesburg showed how one over could define a lifetime, as India defended a narrow total. Over the years, similar patterns emerged. In 2012 and 2014, India won by keeping emotions in check and controlling the tempo. In 2016, they adapted better to difficult conditions. Each match reinforced the same lesson: India-Pakistan clashes rarely reward aggression without planning. They reward players who manage risk and timing under intense scrutiny. Turning Points: Dubai, Melbourne, and New York Some matches stand out as emotional turning points. In Dubai 2021, Pakistan broke their World Cup jinx with a flawless chase built on discipline. A year later in Melbourne, Virat Kohli produced one of the greatest T20 innings under pressure, rescuing India from near defeat. In New York 2024, India defended a modest 119 through tight bowling and sharp fielding. These games proved that even low-scoring or one-sided situations can swing suddenly if one team loses mental control. In this rivalry, momentum is fragile and confidence can shift within minutes. The Real Battlefield: Winning the Pressure Phases When the defining matches are viewed together, a clear pattern emerges. India vs Pakistan at the T20 World Cup is decided in pressure phases rather than on paper strength. These phases usually come in three forms: powerplay control, middle-over stability, and death-over clarity. Teams that manage the new ball well set the tone. Those who rotate strike in the middle overs avoid panic. And those who stay calm at the end make better decisions. Ultimately, this rivalry tests psychological strength more than raw skill. The team that stays composed when the game turns unpredictable is the one that usually walks away victorious.
